subject: We reviewed your response — and it raised a few eyebrows.

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. The Electoral college is an outdated system and should be abolished forever. [**_Donald Trump NEVER would have become President in 2016 without it!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69845?t=4&akid=23589%2E4449941%2EZcSiB1) [ **So, please, before you read any further, chip in to our emergency campaign to help ABOLISH the Electoral College >> ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69845?t=5&akid=23589%2E4449941%2EZcSiB1) | [RUSH $5 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69846?t=6&akid=23589%2E4449941%2EZcSiB1)

[**_This outdated system disenfranchises millions of Americans’ votes every single Presidential election!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69845?t=7&akid=23589%2E4449941%2EZcSiB1)

So, we need good Democrats across the country to help fund our campaign or else Republicans will continue their reign of terror over our Democracy.

PLEASE, don’t waste another second. We need all of the support we can get to gather the resources to fight back against Trump and his MAGA Cronies!

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
Michiganders and the people I love are afraid

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8045?t=2&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8046?t=3&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
null – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there.
But don’t be fooled by school picture day (_and my trendy beaded necklace_). Growing up as the daughter of small-business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. **I wouldn’t have had it any other way.**
My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class.
In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. **But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8046?t=4&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and the GOP are inflicting upon our nation.
All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. **This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is**** _unacceptable._**
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. But the path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan – and this battleground race is being called a “Toss Up” by elections experts.
**null, I need your support to continue reaching out to voters and win in Michigan.[Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8046?t=5&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8047?t=6&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8048?t=7&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8049?t=8&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8046?t=9&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8050?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8045?t=11&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=12&akid=1301%2E49239%2Ely5QIL)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: I just walked out of a meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
Democrats are targeting this district and I need your help to fight back before it’s too late.
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
| | Peter,
I just walked out of a meeting with my campaign team and I’ll be honest with you: **we need your help if we’re going to win this seat and keep it red.**
The Democrats are doing everything they can to flip conservative districts like ours. They’re raising millions from coastal elites, flooding the airwaves with attack ads, and targeting hardworking Nebraskans with lies about our campaign.
They want to take this seat. They want to take the House majority. And they’ll stop at nothing to do it.
But I refuse to let that happen, Peter.
---
[STAND WITH BRETT](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
| | We have the plan to win — to reach every voter, to get our message out, and to protect this seat for the Republican majority. But to put that plan into action, we need an army of grassroots supporters behind us.
**[Will you step up right now and help us defend this district from the Democrats’ attacks?](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**
---
[Yes, I'll donate now to keep Nebraska RED.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Every dollar you contribute goes straight toward reaching voters, responding to the Democrats’ false ads, and building the momentum we need to win.
We need extra patriots to step up this month if we are going to reach our November fundraising goal and if we fall short, we risk losing any momentum we’ve gained.
That’s why I’m asking you personally:
**[Will you chip in $26, $35, or even $50 today to help us keep this seat red?](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**
[RUSH A DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Nebraska deserves a representative who will fight for our values, not a Democrat rubber stamp for Chuck Schumer and the far-Left agenda.
Let’s send a clear message that the Heartland stands strong.
Let’s keep this district and the Republican House majority — RED.
**[Contribute now to defend Nebraska and protect our Republican majority →](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**
Thank you for always having my back,
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Brett Lindstrom Republican Candidate for Congress

| | |
---
**Stay Connected with Team Lindstrom**
| | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---|---|---
|
---
Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress.

name: ALERT FROM TEAM TRUMP
subject: Friend, we’re waiting for you.

name: Mikie Sherrill (via Democrats.org)
subject: Thank you.
body:
---
Derek, I am so honored to be the governor-elect for the great state of New Jersey. But I didn’t do it alone. I want to thank everyone who played a part in this victory — I wouldn't be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted, as well as my team, my family, and my running mate, Dr. Dale Caldwell. New Jersey has sent a message that will be heard across the country, and the world. As you might imagine, I’ve been reflecting a lot on what that message is, and I keep coming back to New Jersey’s state motto: _Liberty and Prosperity._ As we see our government at the federal level backing away from liberty, we here in New Jersey are bound to fight for a different future for our children. But liberty alone isn’t good enough if the government makes it impossible for you to feed your family, or get a good education, or a good job. That doesn’t seem like too much to ask, but right now, all of it seems at risk. Governors have never mattered more. I have heard from thousands of New Jerseyans about liberty and prosperity. And I intend to deliver. I’m going to take care of your kids, drive down your costs, and deliver a government that doesn’t just manage problems, it solves them. I’m going to build on New Jersey’s great legacy of innovation that changes the world, relentless advocacy for a better future, and a stubborn refusal to bow down to kings for 250 years running. That’s the course we’re charting for the entire nation, and if you’re reading this email, you were a part of it. [**Now, it’s up to us to keep charting that course forward. If you can, I hope you’ll consider contributing to the DNC today to help elect more Democrats across the country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251109_5191_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5191_22930333_Ig44XW&akid=5191%2E22930333%2EIg44XW) Thank you for loving this country and this state enough to fight for it. Sincerely, Mikie Sherrill
Governor-elect, New Jersey

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: INGOP
subject: Putting Hoosiers First—At Home and in Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Together, we’re showing the nation what real leadership looks like — rooted in fairness, focused on results, and committed to putting Hoosiers first.
Together, we're showing the nation what real leadership looks like -- rooted in fairness, focused on results, and committed to putting Hoosiers first. No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-e-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-iy/) _**Putting Hoosiers First --At Home and in Washington**_ Dear Hoosier Republicans,While Washington Democrats continue to hold the government hostage, Governor Mike Braun is staying focused on what matters most -- keeping costs low and protecting Hoosier families. From energy prices to everyday expenses, he's proving that conservative leadership delivers real results even when Congress can't.Last week, Governor Braun joined Purdue President Mung Chiang for the Nuclear Energy Summit, outlining his plan to lower energy costs and strengthen Indiana's power supply. The new Clear Creek Welcome Center, a celebration of Hoosier craftsmanship and our racing heritage, is just one example of how Governor Braun's focus on economic strength and investment is paying off across the state.Early this week, our Legislature announced that the special session on redistricting will begin as soon as December 1st. Democrats have spent decades rigging maps in their favor, and Governor Braun is making sure conservative voices won't be silenced. This special session is about defending our voice, restoring balance, and ensuring Democrats don't get to play by a different set of rules. Together, we're showing the nation what real leadership looks like -- rooted in fairness, focused on results, and committed to putting Hoosiers first.As always, thank you for being a part of our team, and please feel free to reach out if there's any way I can be of assistance.Yours in service, Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman _**Governor Braun Celebrates Indiana's Basketball Tradition as New Season Tips Off**_ At the Purdue Nuclear Energy Summit, Governor Braun reaffirmed his commitment to lowering Hoosiers' cost of living by ensuring affordable, reliable energy. In a fireside chat with Purdue President Mung Chiang, he outlined efforts to expand baseload energy production, strengthen the energy workforce, and promote innovation to meet growing demand. Governor Braun has appointed Abby Gray as Utility Consumer Counselor, ordered a review of utility profits, and established a Strategic Energy Task Force--all focused on protecting ratepayers and keeping energy costs low for families and businesses across Indiana._" Indiana is uniquely positioned to be the national leader in energy generation. To ensure affordable prices for ratepayers, we must increase energy supply. I am taking bold steps to make sure Indiana can meet increased electricity demand reliably and affordably into the future."_ \- Governor Braun via a [press release](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-r/) _**Governor Braun Opens Clear Creek Welcome Center**_ Governor Mike Braun joined INDOT, IndyCar, and Indianapolis Motor Speedway President Doug Boles in Vigo County to celebrate the grand opening of the new Clear Creek Welcome Center on eastbound I-70 near the Indiana-Illinois border. Inspired by the Indianapolis 500, the state-of-the-art facility features IndyCar exhibits, including a replica Borg-Warner Trophy, a racing pylon, and a real IndyCar. The center also offers expanded amenities such as playgrounds, walking paths, a dog park, and 128 semi-truck parking spaces--part of INDOT's $600 million statewide effort to modernize rest areas and nearly double truck parking capacity by 2034._" The new Clear Creek welcome center showcases Indiana's deep roots in racing and provides a warm welcome for travelers entering the Crossroads of America. This state-of-the-art facility is a destination for fellow Hoosiers and visitors alike."_ \- Governor Braun via a [press release](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-y/) **Congress of Counties 2026** [Click Here for More Information](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-j/) [Click Here to Register](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-t/) _**Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Fall Semester**_ **📱 _News You Can Use_ ** **Governor Mike Braun **[celebrated](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-i/) the start of the 2025 - 2026 NCAA basketball season, wishing all Indiana teams the best of luck as they begin a new year of competition.**Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith** [emphasized](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-d/) that redistricting is fully constitutional and essential to restoring fair representation for Hoosiers. He argued that policies from the Biden and Obama administrations have undermined this fairness.**Secretary Diego Morales **[visited](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-h/) polling locations across the state during special elections, thanking poll workers and encouraging voter participation. Morales emphasized the significance of every election, noting that local decisions profoundly shape communities and that recent reforms will enhance future referendums, making them more efficient, transparent, and cost-effective.**Treasurer Daniel Elliott **[visited](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-b/) Warren County to meet with local leaders and discuss community needs. Elliott said hearing directly from officials like Commissioner Greenwood and Council President Foxworthy ensures state resources are used effectively to keep Indiana moving forward.**Attorney General Todd Rokita **[filed](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-n/) a lawsuit against Indianapolis Public Schools, alleging the district's policies obstruct federal immigration enforcement and violate Indiana law. Rokita said the action aims to ensure schools cooperate with ICE to protect student safety and uphold the rule of law.**Senator Todd Young **[released](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-p/) a statement explaining his vote against the Caribbean War Powers Resolution after gaining a better understanding of the legal basis for recent U.S. strikes. Young warned against unchecked executive war powers and urged greater transparency and congressional oversight in military decisions.**Senator Jim Banks **[praised](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-x/) President Trump's tariffs for holding China accountable for years of unfair trade practices. He said the policies are helping rebuild America's manufacturing base and protect good-paying American jobs.**Congressman Rudy Yakym **[urged](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-m/) Democrats to stop playing politics and focus on serving the American people. He emphasized the need for bipartisan action that prioritizes the nation's interests over party agendas.**Congressman Marlin Stutzman **[marked](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-c/) the anniversary of Trump's election victory, which he called a major victory for America, criticizing Democrats for obstructing progress through political tactics and gridlock. He called for action to redraw Indiana's maps and end the filibuster on the continuing resolution, saying it's time to put an end to partisan obstruction.**Congressman Jim Baird **[celebrated](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-q/) plans for the nation's first closed fuel cycle nuclear energy plant to be built in Indiana. He said the project highlights Indiana's leadership in innovation, energy independence, and nuclear energy development.**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz **[joined](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-a/) the inaugural Global Nuclear Energy Economic Summit at Purdue University, highlighting Indiana's role in advancing clean energy innovation. She said nuclear energy will power the future of sustainable and reliable growth.**Congressman Jefferson Shreve **[announced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-f/) that his team will host mobile office hours in Johnson and Bartholomew Counties to assist Hoosiers with federal agency issues. He said the events bring constituent services directly to local communities, ensuring residents can easily get help with agencies like the VA, IRS, and Social Security.**Congressman Mark Messmer **[criticized](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-z/) Democrats for prolonging the federal government shutdown, saying it's hurting families across Indiana's 8th District. He highlighted the impact on Hoosiers who rely on programs like Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) for essential support.**Congresswoman Erin Houchin** [criticized](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qkujlo-hhlljjcji-v/) Democrats for the ongoing government shutdown, noting that it's grounding flights and forcing thousands of air traffic controllers to work without pay. She urged Democrats to support the Republican clean funding resolution and put the constituents first. **_Upcoming Events_****November 7: [Brown County Lincoln Day I came ready to take the oath, but Republicans are blocking me. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118983016/581567980/-1103115293?&refcode=E16124-20251107-AdelitaGrijalva-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM1NGYyYTktZDBiZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vMdjWZm_gktibzfR2_yc7595b6EnfaHiqq6bzEA_QXg=) Peter, it's Adelita Grijalva. I want to thank Josh Harder for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Six weeks ago, voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona’s 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most. **As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026.** [_**Peter, will you split a donation of $5 or whatever you can today between my campaign and Josh Harder to help us fight back and make sure their obstruction backfires?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118983017/581567981/-1103115293?&refcode=E16124-20251107-AdelitaGrijalva-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM1NGYyYTktZDBiZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vMdjWZm_gktibzfR2_yc7595b6EnfaHiqq6bzEA_QXg=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | **[**DONATE $5 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118983018/581567984/-1103115293?express_lane=true&&refcode=E16124-20251107-AdelitaGrijalva-EG-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM1NGYyYTktZDBiZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vMdjWZm_gktibzfR2_yc7595b6EnfaHiqq6bzEA_QXg=)** | **[DONATE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118983019/581567987/-1103115293?express_lane=true&&refcode=E16124-20251107-AdelitaGrijalva-EG-Surrogate&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjM1NGYyYTktZDBiZC1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vMdjWZm_gktibzfR2_yc7595b6EnfaHiqq6bzEA_QXg=)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 11/9/2025
body:
Billions for Illegals. Cuts for Citizens.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**November 9, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Readers,
Colorado Democrats are crying “budget crisis” while shoveling your hard-earned tax dollars straight into programs for people who aren’t even supposed to be here.
Let’s start with the numbers. A new federal audit just revealed that **[five states — including Colorado — funneled over $1.4 billion in federal Medicaid funds to illegal immigrants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**. You read that right: billions meant for American citizens quietly rerouted to cover those who broke the law to get here. Colorado made the list right alongside California, D.C., Illinois, Washington, and Oregon — the usual suspects of reckless, blue-state “compassion” that punishes taxpayers and rewards lawlessness.
And while all that was happening, **[Gov. Jared Polis stood at a podium this week and admitted Medicaid spending in Colorado is “unsustainable.”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** His words, not ours. He’s warning the program will soon “crowd out everything but funding for schools.” But what he didn’t say is why it’s ballooning so fast — because that would mean owning up to the fact that his administration expanded coverage for noncitizens, stretched eligibility far beyond what taxpayers can handle, and now can’t pay the bill.
Here’s where it gets even more outrageous: **Polis’ fix for the mess he created is to[cut dental benefits](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for low-income Coloradans — while keeping taxpayer funding for abortion and so-called “gender-affirming care.”** He’s protecting the fringe ideological spending that pleases his donors and activist base while gutting the practical care that families actually need.
So let’s get this straight:
🔹 Polis is cutting services for Colorado families while his party funnels Medicaid funds to illegals.
🔹 He’s warning about [“unsustainable growth”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) — but refuses to stop the reckless spending that caused it.
🔹 And Democrats in D.C. are _days away from a record-breaking shutdown_ because they’d rather [fund health care for illegal immigrants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) than protect citizens and seniors.
This isn’t “compassion.” It’s corruption disguised as kindness — and it’s draining Colorado dry.
The same politicians who claim to care about working families are letting our hospitals overflow, our schools buckle, and our budgets implode. All while they write blank checks to those who cut the line.
**Coloradans deserve better.**
It’s time to put citizens first again — not bureaucrats, not special interests, and certainly not illegal immigrants living off taxpayer-funded benefits.
In liberty and truth,
Team RMV
**📲 Read more:**
[Colorado Among States That Handed Out $1.4B in Medicaid Funds to Illegals](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) [Polis Sounds Alarm on Medicaid Spending: “We Can’t Fund Everything”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

---
**[When Democrats steal political yard signs, are they “protecting our democracy”?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RUSS ANDREWS, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Two local, moderate women are running for the Roaring Fork School District Board with their campaigns focused on the three R’s (reading, writing, and arithmetic). Their opponents are running their campaigns based on DEI (division, entitlement, and illiteracy)._

**[Erasing My Line in the Sand: How Montrose County Proved Colorado’s “Blueprint” is Complete](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Earlier this year, I wrote in these pages that “The Constitution isn’t a suggestion. It’s a line in the sand.” I meant every word of it. I said I was done being quiet. I said this was no longer about politics, it was about survival. The survival of liberty, of local control, and of the rural Colorado way of life._
__
**[Inside the 2025 Colorado elections: What voters rewarded, rejected—and why it matters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado voters made their message plain this year, though not all spoke with one voice. In city halls and school races they favored those who stayed engaged, turned away those who coasted and reminded every leader that trust has an expiration date.

|
---
**STATE**
**[Meet Senator Iman Jodeh: Zohran Mamdani’s Radical Colorado Counterpart](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY AHNAF KALAM, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _New York City has inflicted Zohran Mamdani on itself—the socialist assemblyman who parlayed his anti-Israel bile and Islamist sympathies into the mayoralty, all while whining about “racist attacks” from those who dare call out his jihadist flirtations. Colorado, not to be outdone in this parade of self-destruction, has Iman Jodeh: our own state senator, the so-called “trailblazer” whose Palestinian fixation and alliances with terror cheerleaders make her a mirror image of Mamdani’s radicalism._

**[Colorado River reality check: The problem isn’t the compact, it’s overuse.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY STEVE HARRIS, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _This is my final article on the centennial of the Colorado River Compact (CRC) and the 75th anniversary of the Upper Colorado River Compact (UCRC), collectively referred to as the ‘Compacts.’” In water time, the Compacts are not that old. I have been in the water business in the Colorado River basin for 50 years – half of the CRC’s life – and watched how people viewed the implications of the Compacts over time. The Compacts have gone from background documents to front and center of water discussions._

**[Why Colorado’s Elections No Longer Belong to Its Voters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ”Why is Michael Bloomberg, the former presidential candidate, three-term New York mayor and founder of the financial info firm that bears his name, spending millions on Colorado elections? The short answer: because he can.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[DOJ Pushes to Move Tina Peters to Federal Custody After Trump Calls for Her Release](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Justice Department has requested that the Bureau of Prisons looks into ways to have ex-Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters transferred out of Colorado state prison and into a federal facility following her conviction last year and after President Donald Trump’s calls for her to be freed.
**[Documents Show Activists Readying Hard Left Agenda For NYC](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A self-described “democratic socialist” will now govern New York City, capitalism’s hub in America and the free world, and Just the News has obtained internal plans from the Democratic Socialists of America detailing how the NYC-DSA branch that Zohran Mamdani belongs to intends to pressure him to inject arguably extreme anti-Israel policies into the management — and life — of the Big Apple.
**[Congress uses little-known law to roll back Biden-era BLM public lands lockup](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY GREG WALCHER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Last week, the Senate passed three Congressional Review Act resolutions overturning BLM resource management plans. What would have been called an earth-shattering precedent not so long ago was this time hardly noticed except by those who closely follow Interior and energy issues. The Biden-era resource management plans were designed to lock up millions of acres of public lands from the “multiple uses” required by law._
__
_**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[A Conservative Tide in Montrose County Education, Tempered by a Disturbing Underbelly](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MICHAEL J BADAGLIACCO "MJB", [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _As the dust settles on the November 4, 2025, election in Montrose County, Colorado, the unofficial results paint a clear picture of voter priorities: a resounding endorsement of conservative values in the classroom, coupled with a sharp rebuke of personality clashes and certain local measures._
**[False report, bad judging, real results: Montezuma schools find their footing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) For two difficult years, Superintendent Tom Burris and the Montezuma-Cortez board were cast as the problem in a community at odds. Detractors said they buried misconduct. The situation became a tangle of problems—courtroom misconduct, staff discipline, politicized claims and social-media outrage—all amplified by one-sided reporting that drained time, money and focus.
**[Democratic Socialists Claim Local Victories in Colorado School Board Races](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) An unusual twist on candidate support appears to have paid off for the Fort Collins chapter of Democratic Socialists of America (DSA) – an overtly extreme left-wing organization. __
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[How a CPR survey of 400 Coloradans on illegal immigration became “statewide opinion”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _To say that CPR’s coverage leans left is to say that the sky is blue. There was a recent article by CPR which questioned (I think you could probably go as far as to use the verb “downplayed”) claims by ICE that their agents are facing more and more assaults and threats._ __
**[The Warning in New York’s Vote: A Nation Forgetting What It Knew](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _New York’s decision to elect an openly socialist mayor is not an isolated event. It is a symptom – an unmistakable sign that one of America’s greatest cities is entering the next phase of a cycle human history has recorded with brutal consistency._
__

**[On the five-year anniversary of 2020, Michigan court moves goalposts on attorneys who exposed Antrim County’s machines](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY A.L. GOODWIN,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _On November 3, 2025—the five-year mark of the 2020 election—the Michigan prosecution of attorneys Matt DePerno and Stephanie Lambert took a troubling turn. The Oakland County Circuit Court order (Case No. 2023-285759-FH) leaves no question where the balance tilts. Judge Jeffrey Matis denied every defense request—fifteen in all—and granted the prosecution’s positions in full._
____

**[The Shoes of Peace: Stepping Into Purpose Instead of Panic](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _During my time in the Air Force around the year 2000, I had the wonderful opportunity to work as a high-ropes instructor for youth in Cheyenne, Wyoming. The high ropes courses were built to challenge people beyond their comfort zones — encouraging them to trust their harnesses, stay level, and keep moving with confidence._
__
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
🇺🇸**DID YOU KNOW?** **The Declaration of Independence was the first official document to use the name “The United States of America.”** Before that, the colonies were often called the “United Colonies.” Thomas Jefferson included the phrase in his June 1776 draft, approved on July 4 — though the term appeared earlier in an April 1776 Virginia Gazette essay and even in a January 2, 1776 letter from a secretary of George Washington. _So, could the name of our nation have come from Washington himself?_
|

Cuts for Citizens. | | | | November 9, 2025 SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST | | Dear Readers, Colorado Democrats are crying “budget crisis” while shoveling your hard-earned tax dollars straight into programs for people who aren’t even supposed to be here. Let’s start with the numbers. A new federal audit just revealed that . You read that right: billions meant for American citizens quietly rerouted to cover those who broke the law to get here. Colorado made the list right alongside California, D.C., Illinois, Washington, and Oregon — the usual suspects of reckless, blue-state “compassion” that punishes taxpayers and rewards lawlessness. And while all that was happening, His words, not ours. He’s warning the program will soon “crowd out everything but funding for schools.” But what he didn’t say is why it’s ballooning so fast — because that would mean owning up to the fact that his administration expanded coverage for noncitizens, stretched eligibility far beyond what taxpayers can handle, and now can’t pay the bill. Here’s where it gets even more outrageous: Polis’ fix for the mess he created is to for low-income Coloradans — while keeping taxpayer funding for abortion and so-called “gender-affirming care.” He’s protecting the fringe ideological spending that pleases his donors and activist base while gutting the practical care that families actually need. So let’s get this straight: 🔹 Polis is cutting services for Colorado families while his party funnels Medicaid funds to illegals. 🔹 He’s warning about — but refuses to stop the reckless spending that caused it. 🔹 And Democrats in D.C. are days away from a record-breaking shutdown because they’d rather than protect citizens and seniors. This isn’t “compassion.” It’s corruption disguised as kindness — and it’s draining Colorado dry. The same politicians who claim to care about working families are letting our hospitals overflow, our schools buckle, and our budgets implode. name: Voter Action Project
subject: They won't stop until we make them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Whether it's these 27 different state bills, folks, or the SAVE Act in Congress, it's abundantly clear that opponents of voting rights are only ramping up their attacks on our fundamental rights . We have to put pressure on them to stop at both the state and federal level.
RUSH $25 or more right now to stand with us and fight to defend our right to vote wherever it's under attack >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=110925_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
BCJ: State Bills Would Require Passport or Birth Certificate to Register to Vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=110925_2&amount=25]
Team,
We've told you that voter I.D. laws are unfairly biased against people of color, young people, and unmarried women. However, across the country, states are introducing bills to make these laws even MORE restrictive at an alarming rate.
The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has the details: “ Lawmakers in at least 27 states have introduced...bills in 2025 that would require some or all voters to show citizenship documents to vote .” Not just when you register, but every single time you show up to cast a ballot.
While citizenship is required to vote, rigorous research shows time and again that instances of votes cast by non-citizens are extremely rare. At least 21 million citizens, however, do not have immediate access to the I.D. documents these laws would demand, including 3.1 million voters who lack documents entirely.
The suppressive SAVE Act is stalled in Congress. So opponents of voting rights have turned to the states. These bills aren’t motivated by a desire for free and fair elections – they’re just another voter suppression tactic.
We need your help to defend the right to vote in these 27 states and beyond. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against voter suppression and intimidation? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=110925_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=110925_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=110925_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=110925_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=110925_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=110925_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=110925_2&amount=35]
The problem is not only that these bills would block millions of Americans from voting, but also that these requirements to vote are a massive burden for election officials and many voters alike.
These intimidating requirements also come alongside other suppressive policies stocked into these bills: Mandatory voter purges, reduced early voting, closing polling places, restrictions on mail-in ballots, and so much more.
We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to resist $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=110925_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110925_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110925_2&amount=20]

Peter ,
Last Tuesday, was a huge night for Democrats -- and for GOTV PAC!
Our team helped deliver victories in every race where we invested in turning out voters, but that success comes with a new challenge: the map for 2026 just got bigger.
After Tuesday’s results, it’s clear we can win in districts no one thought were competitive, but that means expanding our battlefield, fast.
But here’s the kicker: our post-election funds are running low. We poured everything we had into turnout programs that worked. Now, before we can plan our next phase, we need a quick boost to refill the tank.
If you can help, please chip in whatever you can today, $10, $25, or whatever feels right, to help us rebuild our budget and expand the fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11092025]

Every dollar you give helps us reach new voters in places that were once written off. Let’s keep proving that when Democrats show up, we win.

name: True The Vote
subject: Sunlight, Progress, and PoweringWhat’s Next 🇺🇸
body:
August 10, 2025 | Read Online (
https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/qdunm92pw8f7h4n2epvtlh82dzdkki4hkovx9/owhkhqhwgxl8kgbv/aHR0cHM6Ly9ja2FyY2hpdmUuY29tL2IvNXF1dmg3aG43bzMyMHNwNXh4ZDUyYTkybG9sNDRhbmhnMG1wbw==
)

Hi Friend —

Lots of updates to share!

First, a quick word on last Tuesday’s elections: Democrats ran
disciplined, well-funded operations — using the government
shutdown, street protests, and chaos to drive turnout.
Republicans fell short across the board.

The takeaway for all of us who care about liberty is crystal
clear: 2026 will belong to those who show up. Get involved
locally. Volunteer. Support candidates you believe in. Serve as
an election worker or poll watcher. Leave nothing to chance.

I’m excited to share that True the Vote is gearing up in a big
way. For the first time ever, we’re uniting all of our trainings,
technology, and resources on one secure platform — making it
easier than ever for citizens to organize, connect, and protect
our elections.

More details soon, but know this: the past does not have to be
prologue. The future belongs to the engaged, the steadfast, and
the faithful.

Next Up — Encouraging News for Election Integrity in Georgia

Encouraging news out of Georgia: DOJ Assistant Attorney for Civil
Rights Harmeet Dhillon has filed a motion to unseal key evidence
in the Georgia State Election Board case — a long-overdue step
toward real transparency.

As Wendi Mahoney reports in American Thinker (
https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/qdunm92pw8f7h4n2epvtlh82dzdkki4hkovx9/z2hghnhep5rd4wfp/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1lcmljYW50aGlua2VyLmNvbS9ibG9nLzIwMjUvMTEvaGFybWVldF9kaGlsbG9uX3dhbnRzX3RoZV9lbGVjdGlvbl9pbnRlZ3JpdHlfZGlydF9pbl9nZW9yZ2lhLmh0bWw=
), those sealed records may reveal what really happened in Fulton
County’s 2020 vote counts — including serious chain-of-custody
and tabulation irregularities that state officials have fought to
keep hidden.

True the Vote has firsthand experience with the systemic
obstruction of Georgia leadership. Now, with the DOJ engaged and
willing to lift the veil, we look forward to the chance to share
what we know and to help ensure that Georgia’s elections are
lawful, auditable, and worthy of public trust.

A word to the critics — outlets like the Atlanta
Journal-Constitution want to frame this as an inability to “move
on” from 2020. That’s false. This isn’t about looking back; it’s
about learning the truth so it doesn’t happen again.

Those who refuse to learn from history are destined to repeat it
— and that's not politics, it’s common sense.

Speaking of 2020 Nightmares Not to be Repeated ... Let's Talk
About China Cover-up.

The Senate Judiciary Committee (
https://click.convertkit-mail2.
) has now released a report confirming the declassification of
FBI documents alleging that the People’s Republic of China
manufactured counterfeit U.S. driver’s licenses and shipped them
into the U.S. as part of a scheme to facilitate tens of thousands
of fraudulent mail-in ballots during the 2020 election.

The FBI originally issued an Intelligence Information Report
(IIR) in August 2020, but then abruptly “recalled” it and
suppressed any further investigation because it reportedly would
have contradicted testimony by then-FBI Director Christopher
Wray.

But fake IDs were only part of the story. As our True the Vote
investigation into Konnech (
https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/qdunm92pw8f7h4n2epvtlh82dzdkki4hkovx9/x0hph6he9kd7rkc5/aHR0cHM6Ly90cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmcva29ubmVjaC1jb2xsZWN0aW9u
) revealed, the FBI also knew that massive amounts of U.S.
election data were being managed in China — by a company whose
leadership pledged loyalty to the Chinese Communist Party.

This is far from over.

If you’ve followed our work, you’ll remember the “Perpetual P.S.”
we used to post — a standing list of evidence we were willing to
share with the Trump Administration:

* Geospatial data showing ballot drop-box abuse
* Non-citizen database evidence buried since 2016
* 10,000+ Konnech documents proving CCP-linked data management
* Banking records tied to a multi-state ballot trafficking ring
* Full correspondence with FBI agents from 2020–2022

I said we’d keep posting that list until someone in authority
finally called.

Well — we don’t have to post it anymore. 🙂 Stay tuned.

The Latest on FOIA Responses

You may remember that True the Vote’s FOIA Project filed 278 open
records requests with state and county election offices across
the country, seeking transparency about their compliance with
Executive Order 14248.

So far, 30 offices have produced documents, 17 have issued
invoices or demanded payment (many of those for “research only,”
with no guarantee of records), and an astonishing 121 have not
responded at all.

The results reveal what we’ve long suspected — transparency in
election administration is wildly inconsistent. Some offices have
cooperated fully, while others have denied access, imposed steep
fees, or simply ignored the law.

Even more telling: most of the non-responsive offices are in
blue-leaning states, underscoring the uneven, and often partisan,
application of public-records laws that are supposed to serve
every American.

We’ll keep pressing forward — people have a right to know how
their elections are run.

👉 You can review all responses and documents on our website. (
https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/qdunm92pw8f7h4n2epvtlh82dzdkki4hkovx9/dpheh0he8dw74vsm/aHR0cHM6Ly90cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmcvb3Blbi1yZWNvcmRzLWhvbmVzdC1lbGVjdGlvbnM=
)

Thank You, TTV Community Testers!

And before I sign off, I want to give a ginormous THANK YOU to
the entire True the Vote Team and our amazing Volunteer Testers,
led by the incredible Meg Denning!

You’ve been tirelessly testing every corner of our new TTV
Community platform, and your hard work, insight, and honest
feedback are shaping it into something truly special — an
intuitive, engaging, and dynamic app built to empower citizens
for the 2026 election season.

We couldn’t do this without you. Thank you for your dedication,
your patience, and your belief in this mission.

Lots of good work ahead — and together, we’ll make it count. 💪🇺🇸

Keep the faith. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW!

Ever onward —

-->Help Us Keep Going (
https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/qdunm92pw8f7h4n2epvtlh82dzdkki4hkovx9/e0hph7h7qmwnpvi8/aHR0cHM6Ly90cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmcvZG9uYXRlP19iaGxpZD0wYTJkOWQwMjVkMTM5MGJkY2FlMTFkZWRiZjc2MjRmOGNmMGRiOGU2JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1vdmVyd2hlbG1lZC1ieS15b3VyLWtpbmRuZXNzJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09bmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW5ld3NsZXR0ZXIudHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3Jn
)
Help Us Keep Going (
https://truethevote.org/donate?utm_source=newsletter.truethevote.org&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=overwhelmed-by-your-kindness&_bhlid=0a2d9d025d1390bdcae11dedbf7624f8cf0db8e6
)https://truethevote.org/donate (
https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/qdunm92pw8f7h4n2epvtlh82dzdkki4hkovx9/e0hph7h7qmwnpvi8/aHR0cHM6Ly90cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmcvZG9uYXRlP19iaGxpZD0wYTJkOWQwMjVkMTM5MGJkY2FlMTFkZWRiZjc2MjRmOGNmMGRiOGU2JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1vdmVyd2hlbG1lZC1ieS15b3VyLWtpbmRuZXNzJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09bmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW5ld3NsZXR0ZXIudHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3Jn

Speaking of 2020 Nightmares Not to be Repeated ... Let's Talk About China Cover-up. The Senate Judiciary Committee ( == ) has now released a report confirming the declassification of FBI documents alleging that the People’s Republic of China manufactured counterfeit U.S. driver’s licenses and shipped them into the U.S. as part of a scheme to facilitate tens of thousands of fraudulent mail-in ballots during the 2020 election. The FBI originally issued an Intelligence Information Report (IIR) in August 2020, but then abruptly “recalled” it and suppressed any further investigation because it reportedly would have contradicted testimony by then-FBI Director Christopher Wray. But fake IDs were only part of the story. As our True the Vote investigation into Konnech ( ) revealed, the FBI also knew that massive amounts of U.S. election data were being managed in China — by a company whose leadership pledged loyalty to the Chinese Communist Party. This is far from over. If you’ve followed our work, you’ll remember the “Perpetual P.S.” we used to post — a standing list of evidence we were willing to share with the Trump Administration: Geospatial data showing ballot drop-box abuse Non-citizen database evidence buried since 2016 10,000+ Konnech documents proving CCP-linked data management Banking records tied to a multi-state ballot trafficking ring * Full correspondence with FBI agents from 2020–2022 I said we’d keep posting that list until someone in authority finally called. Well — we don’t have to post it anymore. 🙂 Stay tuned. The Latest on FOIA Responses You may remember that True the Vote’s FOIA Project filed 278 open records requests with state and county election offices across the country, seeking transparency about their compliance with Executive Order 14248. So far, 30 offices have produced documents, 17 have issued invoices or demanded payment (many of those for “research only,” with no guarantee of records), and an astonishing 121 have not responded at all. The results reveal what we’ve long suspected — transparency in election administration is wildly inconsistent. Some offices have cooperated fully, while others have denied access, imposed steep fees, or simply ignored the law. Even more telling: most of the non-responsive offices are in blue-leaning states, underscoring the uneven, and often partisan, application of public-records laws that are supposed to serve every American. We’ll keep pressing forward — people have a right to know how their elections are run. 👉 You can review all responses and documents on our website. ( = ) Thank You, TTV Community Testers! And before I sign off, I want to give a ginormous THANK YOU to the entire True the Vote Team and our amazing Volunteer Testers, led by the incredible Meg Denning! You’ve been tirelessly testing every corner of our new TTV Community platform, and your hard work, insight, and honest feedback are shaping it into something truly special — an intuitive, engaging, and dynamic app built to empower citizens for the 2026 election season. We couldn’t do this without you. Thank you for your dedication, your patience, and your belief in this mission. Lots of good work ahead — and together, we’ll make it count. 💪🇺🇸 Keep the faith. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW! Ever onward — -->Help Us Keep Going ( ) Help Us Keep Going ( ) ( ) ( ) ( == ) ( ) ( == ) Update your email preferences ( ) or unsubscribe here ( ) © 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128, Houston, Texas 77098-4520

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: What pundits are saying about this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=971%2E181023%2EI3J-fn)
Team —
Before I ask you to donate to my campaign for Governor, please give me a chance to explain why your support and donation matter so much, especially in such a close race.
I hope you’ll keep reading, but if you are ready to make a donation now, here is a link to give: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/jmb-em-q42025](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251109_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=971%2E181023%2EI3J-fn)**
_Cook Political Report_ labeled Michigan one of five toss-up governors' races next year.
I’m not surprised — **races are won and lost here by the smallest of margins.** Literally just a couple hundred votes could make the difference.
But I’m not worried. This is my fourth statewide campaign, and I won my most recent statewide race in 2022 by 14 points. I know firsthand that we win through hard work, showing up in every community, listening to voters, and getting things done.
That’s what I’ve done as secretary of state. And that’s exactly what I’ll do as Michigan’s next governor.
**Even after winning races before, though, I still have people who doubt me. So I need YOUR HELP to show the strength of our people-driven campaign.**
**[That means hitting our fundraising goals. Will you chip in to make sure I have the resources to connect with voters in all 83 Michigan counties?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251109_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=971%2E181023%2EI3J-fn)**

I hope you’re with me.
— Jocelyn

clean_body: Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw our email from yesterday and Jena’s interview on MSNBC. [] Jena has never been afraid to stand up to Trump and MAGA extremists. Now, as she runs for Attorney General, we need to make sure she has the resources to keep fighting for Colorado, our rights, and our democracy. If you haven’t yet, please take a minute to watch Jena’s interview — and if you can, pitch in to power this grassroots campaign forward. [] Thank you, Jena for CO ----- Original Message ----- [] Peter – Jena was just on MSNBC to discuss David Graham’s article in the The Atlantic , titled “Donald Trump’s Plan to Subvert the Midterms Is Already Under Way”. The article makes one thing crystal clear: Donald Trump is a danger to our democracy and elections. Watch her interview here → [] [] It’s exactly what Democratic Secretaries of State have been warning about for years. Trump and his allies will stop at nothing to undermine our democracy and spread lies about our elections. As Colorado’s Secretary of State, Jena never backed down in the fight against Trump’s attempts to dismantle democracy. Now, as she runs for Attorney General, Jena is ready to keep fighting to protect our rights, our votes, and our democracy from those who would destroy them. But we can’t wait until it’s too late. To stand up to Trump and his enablers, we need to build the strongest grassroots campaign in Colorado right now. Chip in today to help Jena Griswold defend democracy — in 2025, 2026, and beyond. name: State Democrats HQ
subject: Two scenarios. One clear choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Your support today could make the difference. Seriously.
#
Just imagine this scenario, Peter... It’s exactly one year from today.
There are two situations we could find ourselves in:
1. **Democrats just dominated the midterms.** We built on the momentum we saw last week and used it to flip the Senate, take back the House, and make serious gains for Democrats across the country.

2. **We let our energy fade and the GOP gained even more ground.** Now, they’re empowered to continue their assault on our democracy – unchecked for another two years, the remainder of Donald Trump’s term.

**The choice is clear, but we’re going to need your help to make it a reality every step of the way.[So please, if you’re ready to help us build on the historic momentum for Democrats we’ve seen across the country this month, rush a donation of $5 or whatever you can today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97535?refcode=em20251109-9692&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9692%2E614464%2EjXBwaU)**

name: Congressman Al Green, TX-09
subject: Why Governor Newsom came to Houston
body:
Friend,
I was incredibly honored this week to welcome my friend and a true progressive fighter, Governor Gavin Newsom, to Houston.
He didn't come just for a photo-op. He came because he knows what we know: the corrupt, racist gerrymander that carved up our district isn't just a Texas problem—it's a national threat.
https://www.chron.com/politics/article/green-hints-at-run-for-tx-18-21145707.php [https://www.chron.com/politics/article/green-hints-at-run-for-tx-18-21145707.php]
This is what our movement looks like: unified, strong, and ready to fight.
Governor Newsom came to Houston to stand with a proven fighter. He knows I'm one of the few voices in Congress who has never backed down from the tough fights—from being the first to call for impeachment to standing up for the human rights of all people.
The GOP and Trump are targeting me for a reason. They want my voice silenced.
But today, I officially filed for re-election in the new 18th Congressional District. Their illegal map backfired—they just moved my home and 75% of my constituents into this district, and I am following my people to continue the fight.
This campaign starts now .
Governor Newsom and leaders across the country are standing with us. Now I need you to.
Please, chip in to our "Day 1" Founding Donor fund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em] . Let's send a message to the GOP that our national progressive movement is united and ready to win.
In solidarity,
Congressman Al Green
DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
In the fight,
Congressman Al Green
Stand with Cong. Al Green! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251025txftbackeml [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251025txftbackeml]

Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign

Houston, TX 77256
United States

---
**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=f615080b7f3044d987ddda43190b9c34&_e=HKZfeBEQzUv0S8AfrtV9mmXZVRa7DcUB0h6LHjHW8seH6D6Vm3GIj2O99cTAFg9A9dRbP00U9GntWUZxHJYsF9MPSYAV-mKqV_BJqwvKBAv4bN1IQaj-nMzEEu7vZyuCNDmkc57gRGVPsuKTmk2gaHTdqdSlD2u-EiAQvGR2D3BNCWlcirQLc2IZNFSOzc9ebCWVRKQ4n8U9HNJ768U7XzdbIYQ6YUq4lF1iSgu-GhXTyZf02qGISZHPmWymsuYzEwyWJdewCs0lWd72dW8d1MNNPvFbGsc1uRmdlH32GopjYUqEhHV0zshgmAP4brosOTJp-Vr_uWk53DNftb1STGCa0YbRNl4wEfb8zpNongsfCw6eFKFwVp8L82qblKxlZKO2hGEFPPlpRukxQyMtHEtdgGsRsQdjY7Tjde5OiRaLQbDSpIvJp1pudTntT2mlje6HpIccPPKgX9erDnZYJQ8_r0AkWk1bQqA-wCl2EjhqPrfsh4_eMoZvGqFYJRJ92ueSutfTXgyP6J10CEHW3FMi8YBTGtU6YgWfGZcGmNCQGaaANSr78mANcOp9lglXGM0Tr07YiZLQwCikpPVAGFzpTsj_-mRe2OgLDKOwUqcGCl9FT7tl74eTrLbqrvYy)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Fellow Patriot.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=f615080b7f3044d987ddda43190b9c34&_e=HKZfeBEQzUv0S8AfrtV9mmXZVRa7DcUB0h6LHjHW8seH6D6Vm3GIj2O99cTAFg9A9dRbP00U9GntWUZxHJYsF9MPSYAV-mKqV_BJqwvKBAv4bN1IQaj-nMzEEu7vZyuCNDmkc57gRGVPsuKTmk2gaHTdqdSlD2u-EiAQvGR2D3BNCWlcirQLc2IZNFSOzc9ebCWVRKQ4n8U9HNJ768U7X2cg8NEqUPQ3AP7WAu6Q_FVFKuh5JNp6x8Eiuva3iJkcUEUgswj7PavdZGWCxN3kp7Z-wrnO9Eo6WQupC8UDnJRJMF-1UEm5XSas0GA3ngvO6lQk0bvE7tVsghTtQWx3LEcFdsgFdn4BYU8OWefcVobQBNzbUaDXBshQQk4V0qOrbMgrUfFjPzUFAw71Tz2GuRqKfnvi795wtCRPvZbEfMatoJWpIVvMlyVOtGgGgIfUFzOgxhFMAap6GoOW6EFUulFnoVEIN9B9ZSXsCx_POX6z1N1ag5-VJHu_F98ckqAbI3l0kluPdd5i3ENpgJFaQhltyWAXbw6GHwdnJYuv466q-cNmbhgMi6Kazvckj-GgLw6kVxICiVWZzRRfANqLaoAsjkoFys0J6dlqOCbpHPuf9yftGt3Hs69bg9LhFRLr)

As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover! This isn’t just another election, Fellow Patriot. It’s the FINAL BATTLE to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever! Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees. But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the FINAL FIREWALL that protects New Yorkers from this insanity! We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a ONE-POINT LEAD – and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign! As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory. That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign. Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state! That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,600% MATCH! When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank... Our Founding Members like YOU who had my back on day one! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

| Tuesday night was a huge moment for California Democrats and for all Americans who value our democracy. When our campaign to stop Donald Trump’s election-rigging plot began, many pundits thought we were unlikely to win. Some reporting even had Governor Newsom’s Election Rigging Response Act starting underwater in the polls. **But on Tuesday, the California bear roared with a message as clear as day:** Voters decide elections, not MAGA politicians. Whether you donated, volunteered, or just voted and followed along with the campaign in the news — thank you. Throughout the course of this campaign, 3910 new donors joined our team for the very first time. Thousands more stepped up and renewed past support. Early organizing made a difference in this race, and we are elated at the outcome. _But here’s the hard part_ : Our work is not done. Voters in California have decided that Donald Trump cannot rig next year’s elections before a single vote is cast, but now we have to win these critical U.S. House races that will determine control of the House of Representatives. If we defend vulnerable blue seats and flip our targets here in California, Democrats will be in a great position to fire Speaker Mike Johnson and put an ironclad “check” on Donald Trump. **[That means the work begins right now to retool our strategy and prepare to win races in California’s new maps. subject: You won’t believe who tried to cancel Tucker Carlson

Tucker Carlson is one of the most popular figures in conservative media and one of the strongest supporters of President Trump’s agenda. Dear Reader,

RFK Jr just took dead aim on Big Pharma... and he is **NOT** messing around.

In a prime-time press conference he took them to task on everything from Tylenol and autism to COVID vaccines...

And Big Pharma is _**HORRIFIED**_.

For the first time in decades, they're face-to-face with a politician their money _**CAN NOT**_ control.

And that means their # 1 fear may be about to come true.

RFK Jr is now poised to EXPOSE [**Big Pharma 's biggest secret**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=51a8de678c7a81b1802158baef6a695e17048595cbe2270238921e7ff8c59acc14e2b316b65188916ff50c54bdc6657e0b856f6ddd9d0198a6eced6a457a9ca5).

Which is why they'll do everything in their power to stop you from hearing [**THIS**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=51a8de678c7a81b1802158baef6a695e17048595cbe2270238921e7ff8c59acc14e2b316b65188916ff50c54bdc6657e0b856f6ddd9d0198a6eced6a457a9ca5).

P.S. It's not every day the US Secretary of Health and Human Services calls out one of Big Pharma's biggest cash cows. But that's exactly what RFK Jr just did. And they're terrified he's going to go one step further by revealing [**Big Pharma 's Biggest Secret yet**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=51a8de678c7a81b1802158baef6a695e17048595cbe2270238921e7ff8c59acc14e2b316b65188916ff50c54bdc6657e0b856f6ddd9d0198a6eced6a457a9ca5).

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: I Vote No on the CR
body:
|

---
Friends and neighbors, I will be voting NO on the CR proposed last night. I have voted eight separate times to reopen the government. And each of those times, I voted for a CR that addresses the health care crisis Republicans have unleashed on working families across this country. After weeks of refusing to negotiate, Senate Republicans have finally put forth a new CR that reaffirms their indifference to the health care crisis and growing unaffordability of our country. As I look at this new CR, I am glad to see it includes language I fought for to reverse the draconian RIFs. But, I have maintained from the beginning of this Republican shutdown that I could not vote for anything that does not address the rising health care costs. The first 11 months of this Administration have been a disaster. Marylanders are struggling to pay their bills because of soaring energy costs and grocery prices. Patriotic civil servants have been fired after years of dedicated service. Our economy has been wrecked by chaotic tariffs. And after all that, Republicans have put forth a CR that does absolutely nothing to help struggling Marylanders afford health care. I made a promise to the people of Maryland that I would always vote in their best interests. That's why I'm voting NO. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=15621.13796675.5746409.7190525)
