name: John Nagel
subject: Ilhan Omar’s radical agenda ends here
body:
It’s time to take our country back

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt7g/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, I never planned to run for Congress.
For three decades, I proudly served Minnesota as a Lieutenant with the State Patrol, protecting our communities and upholding the law.
But now, I’m watching everything I fought for being dismantled by radical anti-American socialists like Ilhan Omar.
Omar and her far-left allies attack our police, divide our communities, and push a socialist agenda that leaves hardworking Minnesotans behind. They are turning our state into a testing ground for their Marxist experiment - and I refuse to let that happen.********
**[That’s why I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 5th Congressional District to Fire Ilhan Omar.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt7g/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)******
**I’m John Nagel - a husband, father, man of faith, and proud Minnesotan who has spent his life serving others.**
Over 30 years in the State Patrol, I earned the Meritorious Service Award, Employee of the Year, and several community service honors - not for politics, but for service.
Now, I’m stepping up again - this time to protect our state and our country from Ilhan Omar’s dangerous vision for America.
But I can’t do it alone. Omar’s allies in Washington and the media are already mobilizing against me, and they’ll stop at nothing to keep their grip on power.
**It’s time to replace Ilhan Omar with a true America First warrior who will actually fight for Minnesota**** _[and I need your help to make it happen](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt7g/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt7g/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | [HELP DEFEAT ILHAN OMAR](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt7g/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, Chuck Schumer and the old Democrat moderates are being replaced by the literally nuts Ilhan Omar and her radical socialist cohorts.
**These aren’t Democrats anymore - they’re socialist thugs, a ball of snakes determined to rip apart the very fabric of our nation.**
But Minnesota is better than this. _America is better than this._
It’s time to get behind honest American values - faith, family, and freedom - and remind Ilhan Omar that Minnesota belongs to the people, not to the radicals in Washington.
**_[If you’re ready to take our state back from Ilhan Omar and her socialist machine, I need you in this fight with me today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt7g/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
Together, we can send a message that will echo from Minneapolis to Washington: Minnesota stands with America - not socialism.
_For Minnesota and America,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt7g/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**John Nagel**
Candidate for U.S. Congress - Minnesota’s 5th District
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt7g/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt5R/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzUyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=332352&trkid=1076550894&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

# [Eight Democrats break ranks to advance shutdown-ending bill](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=178495581&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4NDk1NTgxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjI3ODk3NzksImV4cCI6MTc2NTM4MTc3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aIzOv3GAe6EG8p1oqjaWx4HClAHP1EQn97Dm8AOOM7k)
### Democrats joined Republicans in advancing a revamped plan to end the 40-day government shutdown, marking a significant cave by Democrats...
| | [Politibrawl](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---
| Nov 10
---

Eight Senate Democrats, including number two Democrat Dick Durbin, **[crossed the aisle Sunday to join Republicans](https://substack.com/redirect/601509e7-199d-4e8d-8e06-b18e3690ffc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in advancing a revamped plan to end the 40-day government shutdown, marking a significant cave by Democrats who had long insisted on extending expiring Obamacare subsidies as a condition for reopening the government.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/601509e7-199d-4e8d-8e06-b18e3690ffc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Democrats gain little from compromise:** The updated continuing resolution included some wins like reversals of Trump administration furloughed worker firings and guaranteed back pay, but provided no concrete victory on the Obamacare issue--only a promise from Senate Majority Leader John Thune to schedule a vote on the subsidies by the second week of December, which is likely to fail.
* **Schumer condemns deal as GOP healthcare attack:** Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer panned the compromise, saying "this healthcare crisis is so severe, so urgent, so devastating for families back home that I cannot, in good faith, support this CR that fails to address the healthcare crisis," while Sen. Bernie Sanders warned that Democratic capitulation gives Trump "a green light to go forward toward authoritarianism."
* **Long road ahead to fully reopen government:** Sunday's vote was just the first in a series needed to modify the House-passed continuing resolution and combine it with a three-bill spending package that would reopen the government until January 30, 2026, with the changes still requiring House approval before reaching President Trump's desk, and Democrats potentially able to extract pain through procedural hurdles without unanimous Senate agreement.

* * *
**[Together with American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/e3864824-06d1-4930-9066-2912ecf7388d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Trump's Reset Can Give Birth To America's Greatest Era Yet](https://substack.com/redirect/e3864824-06d1-4930-9066-2912ecf7388d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e3864824-06d1-4930-9066-2912ecf7388d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate.**
Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen.
**Now, 92 years later,[President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](https://substack.com/redirect/e3864824-06d1-4930-9066-2912ecf7388d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people.
**A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price.**
That's a 72x increase!
**If activated, it could**
* **Reinforce America 's financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

**Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump 's Gold Reset.**
However, only those who download a copy of our **2025 Wealth Protection Guide** will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset.
**[Claim Your FREE Guide Now](https://substack.com/redirect/e3864824-06d1-4930-9066-2912ecf7388d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and discover how to position yourself for this golden opportunity.**

* * *
# **Trump announces $2,000 tariff dividends for Americans- Here 's what you need to know...**
President Trump stated Sunday on Truth Social that most Americans **[will receive"at least" $2,000 from tariff revenue](https://substack.com/redirect/99de4388-d06f-435c-804d-f7c253364971?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, saying "a dividend of at least $2000 a person (not including high income people!) will be paid to everyone," though he did not specify income eligibility thresholds or implementation details.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/99de4388-d06f-435c-804d-f7c253364971?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Bessent suggests dividend could take multiple forms:** Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent told ABC News the "$2,000 dividend could come in lots of forms" beyond direct stimulus checks, potentially including Trump's proposed tax cuts such as eliminating taxes on tips, overtime, Social Security, and making auto loans deductible, rather than resembling the pandemic-era stimulus payments.
* **Tariffs generating billions but rebalancing is primary goal:** While tariffs generated $195 billion through September--a 250% increase representing an additional $118 billion compared to fiscal 2024--Bessent insisted the primary purpose is "rebalancing" unfair trade imbalances rather than revenue generation, with the announcement coming after Democrats won elections focused on affordability and as the Supreme Court appeared skeptical of Trump's tariff authority.

* * *
# **Trump pardons 77 allies in 2020 election case**
President Donald Trump **[granted"full, complete and unconditional" pardons](https://substack.com/redirect/8e0269f1-b2ab-4a7f-9231-95664986ea95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** late Sunday to 77 individuals tied to the plot to overturn the 2020 presidential election, including close allies Rudy Giuliani, Sidney Powell, Kenneth Chesebro, Mark Meadows, and John Eastman, who were allegedly involved in organizing alternate slates of fake electors from battleground states won by Joe Biden.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3a7060fb-0ae8-4b31-9a1a-7fbd671e4198?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani/ Fulton County Sheriff's Office
* **Pardons signed Friday, announced by "clemency czar":** The pardon document, signed by Trump on Friday, was posted to X just before 11 p.m. Sunday by Trump's "clemency czar" attorney Ed Martin in a reply to his May 2025 post reading "No MAGA left behind," with Trump writing the proclamation "ends a grave national injustice perpetrated upon the American people following the 2020 Presidential Election."
* **Largely symbolic as no federal charges filed:** The pardons are mainly symbolic because none of the 77 individuals were charged on the federal level, though they could prevent future administrations from prosecuting the alleged co-conspirators involved in the "fake electors" scheme that eventually led to the violent January 6, 2021 attempt to halt election certification, with the document notably stating "this pardon does not apply to the President of the United States, Donald J. Trump."

name: Brian Lenney
subject: How Idaho Got Flooded with 7,750+ Third-World “Refugees” While 13M+ Illegals Invaded America Under Bipartisan Open…
body:
They told you Idaho was "safe." They lied.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..YIqqq6x5zB3N0YLrNOstQAMsz8_OLFCaMHEyPEC2wYY?) for more
---
# [How Idaho Got Flooded with 7,750+ Third-World "Refugees" While 13M+ Illegals Invaded America Under Bipartisan Open-Border Schemes](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=178508121&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4NTA4MTIxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjI3ODkyNjgsImV4cCI6MTc2NTM4MTI2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CQdCiTTYnqB_KY6AXZtFMqR_s7_gwpQfAJKJQ2FtQ3I)
### They told you Idaho was "safe." They lied.
| | [Brian Lenney](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Nov 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=178508121&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4NTA4MTIxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2Mjc4OTI2OCwiZXhwIjoxNzY1MzgxMjY4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjExNDgyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.D3ZM_pXagX3n7cyQYL4yk0kiesOidFbreLqOGi2yWo0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=178508121&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4NTA4MTIxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjI3ODkyNjgsImV4cCI6MTc2NTM4MTI2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CQdCiTTYnqB_KY6AXZtFMqR_s7_gwpQfAJKJQ2FtQ3I&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2114823&post_id=178508121&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4NTA4MTIxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjI3ODkyNjgsImV4cCI6MTc2NTM4MTI2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIxMTQ4MjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CQdCiTTYnqB_KY6AXZtFMqR_s7_gwpQfAJKJQ2FtQ3I)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/how-idaho-got-flooded-with-7750-third?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[](https://substack.com/redirect/e14d185c-62b9-4cec-be12-3c538d0ab94b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Originally posted on [Gem State Patriot News](https://substack.com/redirect/f6531e82-f2c5-45ee-b7d5-ebfb5d20746d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)]
* * *
I came to Idaho because it represented everything America used to be...
A place where hardworking Americans could raise families without apology. Where children learned English as their first language. Where our tax dollars stayed in our community.
Most built this life through sacrifice. Some work multiple jobs to afford the mortgage while others work overtime every week to pay for the kid's sports equipment. Years of saving for a family vacation while others get handouts. Now you watch immigrant families move into subsidized housing while your own children can't afford simple apartments. You see your kid's classroom overcrowded with non-English speakers while your property taxes skyrocket to fund translation services you never voted for.
You followed every rule America asked of you. You earned your place here through blood, sweat, and tears. Yet somehow, you're being displaced in your own homeland by people who contributed nothing to build what you're losing.
## **The Government Chose Them Over You**
But this transformation didn't happen by accident...
Here's the betrayal nobody dared tell you: for over thirty years, your own government has systematically replaced American workers and families with immigrants who cost taxpayers billions while contributing nothing.
The numbers tell the story. More than[ 7,750 foreign nationals](https://substack.com/redirect/e0e697dd-933f-405c-a039-f78c920790f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have been resettled in Idaho since 2015 alone, with Idaho now ranking[ one of the highest in the nation](https://substack.com/redirect/590dc426-7536-48e5-bbc4-72807adbc6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for refugee resettlement per capita. Meanwhile, Biden's open border policies brought[ over 10.8 million encounters](https://substack.com/redirect/3afe52e9-da89-4d43-9545-a7cebf402723?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at U.S. borders, with[ 2.5 million released](https://substack.com/redirect/a72e6594-6599-46cf-a01d-75f4473a7eab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into American communities. In 2021, Qatar's Al Udeid Air Base processed fifty-eight thousand Afghan evacuees in just four weeks during what officials called "one of the largest efforts to relocate noncombatants from a war zone in U.S. history."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/281a0df7-20fe-4815-84e8-d708ed64059b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So while you scraped together down payments, they got free housing. While you paid insurance premiums, they got free healthcare. While you worked overtime to afford groceries, they got loaded EBT cards. This isn't immigration. This is organized displacement of the American people.
_**Your government chose them over you**_.
Your tax dollars funded your own replacement. Every refugee placement was a deliberate decision to prioritize foreign interests over American families who built this state with their bare hands. The system you believed would protect American citizens has been weaponized against you.
Yes, [President Trump's executive order](https://substack.com/redirect/14d790de-7bee-4e90-abd5-7a03c8c90060?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in January gave Americans a temporary reprieve. But the globalist machine that orchestrated this invasion remains intact, waiting for the first opportunity to flood your communities again.
The precedent has already been set. The same pipeline that brought over[ 124,000 people](https://substack.com/redirect/5d10fa34-9373-4ae6-beb9-317bbf2cb2b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during what officials called "one of the largest efforts to relocate noncombatants from a war zone in U.S. history" can be activated again at any moment.
This is our last chance to stop the reactivation of a system designed to replace American workers and families. Fail now, and our children will inherit a country that no longer belongs to them.
## **America First or a Globalist Empire?**
We're at a crossroads between American restoration and national destruction.
There's no middle ground left. We can either:
* **Surrender:** accept that your children will grow up as minorities in their own homeland. Watch American workers permanently replaced by cheap foreign labor. Stand silent as your communities become unrecognizable welfare colonies funded by your own tax dollars. Or...

* **Fight for America First:** put American families before foreign interests. Support legislation that ends taxpayer-funded demographic replacement. Demand that your government serve American citizens first, last, and always.

This moment will define whether America survives or becomes another failed multicultural experiment. Your children are counting on you to choose America over the globalist agenda that seeks to destroy everything your ancestors built.
The choice you make right now determines whether Idaho remains American territory or becomes another conquered province in the global empire.
## **Why Every Political Promise Failed You**
You trusted politicians who promised to put America First.
[Governor Brad Little chose federal dollars over American families](https://substack.com/redirect/c23a6b9b-3772-41dc-a3f2-477226eebbf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), writing to Secretary of State Mike Pompeo in December 2019: "I consent to the requirements set forth in Executive Order 13888" that allowed refugee resettlement to continue in Idaho.
You voted for senators who campaigned on American worker protection. Instead, your entire Idaho congressional delegation funds the very programs that import foreign labor to undercut American wages. They bow to corporate interests who profit from cheap foreign workers while American families struggle.
Consider Russ Fulcher. The moment he got into office in 2019, he voted for the "Farm Workforce Modernization Act" to import even more foreign agricultural workers while Idaho farmers struggled to hire Americans at decent wages (thankfully, he voted against it a few years later). Meanwhile, [most of your Idaho lawmakers and Governor Little rolled out the red carpet](https://substack.com/redirect/3cbfe652-6869-41c8-86de-19e4033cc877?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that helped Micron import thousands of H-1B visa workers to fill high-paying tech jobs that should go to American graduates.
Mike Simpson has been even worse. Simpson has spent decades as the chief architect of Idaho's foreign worker replacement programs. He authored and repeatedly pushed the Farm Workforce Modernization Act, which he admits would grant work authorization to over one million illegal agricultural workers. Simpson openly stated "I guarantee you the one thing this is not is amnesty" while simultaneously creating pathways to permanent legal status for foreign workers. He even voted for the Further Consolidated Appropriations Act of 2020, which nearly doubled available H-2B visas, flooding American communities with even more foreign workers.
Simpson has consistently supported DACA, expanded guest worker programs, and every piece of legislation that prioritizes foreign labor over American workers. When criticized for supporting policies that amount to amnesty, Simpson dismisses concerns [by claiming](https://substack.com/redirect/71d9f736-bc05-4860-9b20-6c28c1bb7df4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _" these are not jobs that Americans will take." _This is the same lie politicians have used for decades to justify replacing American workers with cheaper foreign alternatives.
Yes, your elected officials have partnered with NGOs, unelected burecrats, and tech lords to support H-2B expansion for seasonal workers, H-1B increases for tech positions, and agricultural worker programs that systematically undercut American wages. And yes, every visa program, every foreign worker import scheme, and every corporate giveaway prioritizes cheap foreign labor over American families.
_Yet, you keep voting for these guys..._
Maybe it's because you believe the system will eventually correct itself. Funny, I once believed that too. Instead, immigrant placements exploded and each placement represents another American family priced out, another American worker displaced, another American community transformed. You tried working within a system designed to ignore American interests entirely. The political establishment profits from your displacement. They have no incentive to stop the process that enriches them while impoverishing you.
Traditional politics can't solve a problem created by deliberate betrayal of the American people.
## **Follow the Money**
The entire anti-American replacement system depends on one vulnerable point: taxpayer funding that can be cut off completely.
The Office of Refugee Resettlement received[ more than $7 billion in FY 2024](https://substack.com/redirect/7b232304-0647-42c5-b3a8-f9af5011d884?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) under Biden. Every foreign placement generated $12,750 in immediate federal grants, but the real theft happened through state matching requirements that multiplied costs exponentially. Yet as I write this, you'llbe pleased to know that Trump has slashed the entire operation. His administration[ suspended refugee resettlement](https://substack.com/redirect/05a71951-ea16-4e4f-b89b-ec2ffe2713e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),[ froze millions in federal funding](https://substack.com/redirect/b688508d-4d76-42ba-9e0b-45e509c69dd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and[ proposed eliminating](https://substack.com/redirect/bc5b6709-d539-4818-9b8f-910b745ebd31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the $307 million Refugee Support Services program and the $564 million Transitional and Medical Services program entirely.
In Idaho, orgs like the[ International Rescue Committee](https://substack.com/redirect/abfc333c-f8a7-4ab4-ad85-8621e17da9f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and[ Agency for New Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/15066ea8-90f2-45bb-95b4-e91a7f0d11e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (aka Jannus) have siphoned millions from American taxpayers, processing thousands of foreign placements while American veterans sleep homeless and American families struggle with medical debt.
## **What Do You Mean, "You People?"**
Who are the "they" behind this system?
Start with the global architects: the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees cherry-picks candidates from war zones. The International Organization for Migration books the flights. George Soros's Open Society Foundations fund the advocacy groups that lobby for more placements.
Domestically, it's a revolving door of federal bureaucrats, NGO executives, and corporate beneficiaries. Former State Department officials join refugee contractors. Corporate lobbyists push for more foreign worker visas. Chamber of Commerce types demand cheap labor while wrapping it in humanitarian rhetoric. The local enablers cash the checks: IRC executives in Boise pull down six-figure salaries while "serving refugees." Agency for New Americans (aka Jannus) administrators expand programs that generate more federal grants. USCRI Twin Falls directors see placement operations as job security.
When you expose these financial flows and demand America First budget priorities, the entire system collapses. These organizations can't survive without massive taxpayer subsidies funding your own replacement.
Cut their funding, end their operation. It's that simple.
This is about power, money, and the deliberate transformation of America against the will of the American people.
## **The Great Awakening**
Americans are discovering they have the power to reject demographic replacement entirely. When citizens demand their tax dollars serve American families first, entire anti-American programs collapse under scrutiny.
The financial pressure is devastating organizations that built fortunes on American displacement.[ USCRI Twin Falls](https://substack.com/redirect/980eea31-ce60-4def-a153-c63cd12b87bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is laying off staff as 90% of their funding disappears. When forced to justify why foreign interests should receive taxpayer money while Americans struggle, these organizations have no defense.
American workers are waking up to the reality that their displacement was planned and funded by their own government. This awakening is creating political pressure that makes continued replacement programs impossible to sustain. The America First movement is bigger than anyone imagined.
It represents the survival instinct of a people who refuse to be replaced.
## **Your Marching Orders**
The future of American Idaho depends on what you do right now. As your state senator, I'm giving you these orders:
Contact every representative (congress, Governor, your reps) immediately. Demand they choose American families over foreign interests or face primary challenges. Tell them: "Fund Americans first or find a new job." Demand county opt-outs, zero NGO funding, and full financial audits. Connect with patriots in other states and multiply pressure on anti-American funding.
And for crying out loud, show up to the damn polls and VOTE IN EVERY ELECTION. If you don't, you have nobody to blame but yourself. You saw the results from last week, right? Only [28% of Idahoans](https://substack.com/redirect/19e64651-42a5-4c70-9320-ab58f2cfdd44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) showed up to vote. Sad. This is a war for the survival of American communities. Act like it.
In his prophetic book, _The Death of the West_ , Pat Buchanan said: "In half a lifetime, many Americans have seen their God dethroned, their heroes defiled, their culture polluted, their values assaulted, their country invaded, and themselves demonized as extremists and bigots for holding on to beliefs Americans have held for generations." Our ancestors didn't cross an ocean and tame a wilderness so foreigners could inherit what Americans built. Idaho's forefathers carved this state from nothing through American blood, sweat, and determination.
They fought wars, survived winters, and died young to give their descendants a homeland. Miners in Coeur d'Alene and ranchers in the Owyhees didn't sacrifice everything so their great-grandchildren could become minorities in their own state.
They built Idaho for Americans. Not for UN bureaucrats. Not for NGO profiteers. Not for immigrants who contribute nothing but take everything. You're their heir. This is your inheritance. These are your people. This is your fight. The thousands of refugees represent American families who could have been housed instead.
Trump's pause gave you this moment. Now you must seize it.
Your ancestors' blood bought this land. Your children's future depends on what you do today. America First means Americans first. Always. No exceptions.
Fight for it, or lose it forever.

clean_body: They told you Idaho was "safe." They lied. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more They told you Idaho was "safe." They lied. | | | Nov 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | ] I came to Idaho because it represented everything America used to be... A place where hardworking Americans could raise families without apology. Where children learned English as their first language. Where our tax dollars stayed in our community. Most built this life through sacrifice. Some work multiple jobs to afford the mortgage while others work overtime every week to pay for the kid's sports equipment. Years of saving for a family vacation while others get handouts. Now you watch immigrant families move into subsidized housing while your own children can't afford simple apartments. You see your kid's classroom overcrowded with non-English speakers while your property taxes skyrocket to fund translation services you never voted for. You followed every rule America asked of you. You earned your place here through blood, sweat, and tears. Yet somehow, you're being displaced in your own homeland by people who contributed nothing to build what you're losing. The Government Chose Them Over You But this transformation didn't happen by accident... Here's the betrayal nobody dared tell you: for over thirty years, your own government has systematically replaced American workers and families with immigrants who cost taxpayers billions while contributing nothing. The numbers tell the story. More than have been resettled in Idaho since 2015 alone, with Idaho now ranking for refugee resettlement per capita. Meanwhile, Biden's open border policies brought at U.S. borders, with into American communities. In 2021, Qatar's Al Udeid Air Base processed fifty-eight thousand Afghan evacuees in just four weeks during what officials called "one of the largest efforts to relocate noncombatants from a war zone in U.S. history." | | ---|---|--- So while you scraped together down payments, they got free housing. While you paid insurance premiums, they got free healthcare. While you worked overtime to afford groceries, they got loaded EBT cards. This isn't immigration. This is organized displacement of the American people. Your government chose them over you. Your tax dollars funded your own replacement. Every refugee placement was a deliberate decision to prioritize foreign interests over American families who built this state with their bare hands. The system you believed would protect American citizens has been weaponized against you. Yes, in January gave Americans a temporary reprieve. But the globalist machine that orchestrated this invasion remains intact, waiting for the first opportunity to flood your communities again. The precedent has already been set. The same pipeline that brought over during what officials called "one of the largest efforts to relocate noncombatants from a war zone in U.S. history" can be activated again at any moment. This is our last chance to stop the reactivation of a system designed to replace American workers and families. Fail now, and our children will inherit a country that no longer belongs to them. America First or a Globalist Empire? We're at a crossroads between American restoration and national destruction. There's no middle ground left. We can either: Surrender: accept that your children will grow up as minorities in their own homeland. Watch American workers permanently replaced by cheap foreign labor. Stand silent as your communities become unrecognizable welfare colonies funded by your own tax dollars. Or... Fight for America First: put American families before foreign interests. Support legislation that ends taxpayer-funded demographic replacement. Demand that your government serve American citizens first, last, and always. This moment will define whether America survives or becomes another failed multicultural experiment. Your children are counting on you to choose America over the globalist agenda that seeks to destroy everything your ancestors built. The choice you make right now determines whether Idaho remains American territory or becomes another conquered province in the global empire. Why Every Political Promise Failed You You trusted politicians who promised to put America First. , writing to Secretary of State Mike Pompeo in December 2019: "I consent to the requirements set forth in Executive Order 13888" that allowed refugee resettlement to continue in Idaho. You voted for senators who campaigned on American worker protection. Instead, your entire Idaho congressional delegation funds the very programs that import foreign labor to undercut American wages. They bow to corporate interests who profit from cheap foreign workers while American families struggle. Consider Russ Fulcher. The moment he got into office in 2019, he voted for the "Farm Workforce Modernization Act" to import even more foreign agricultural workers while Idaho farmers struggled to hire Americans at decent wages (thankfully, he voted against it a few years later). Meanwhile, that helped Micron import thousands of H-1B visa workers to fill high-paying tech jobs that should go to American graduates. Mike Simpson has been even worse. Simpson has spent decades as the chief architect of Idaho's foreign worker replacement programs. He authored and repeatedly pushed the Farm Workforce Modernization Act, which he admits would grant work authorization to over one million illegal agricultural workers. Simpson openly stated "I guarantee you the one thing this is not is amnesty" while simultaneously creating pathways to permanent legal status for foreign workers. He even voted for the Further Consolidated Appropriations Act of 2020, which nearly doubled available H-2B visas, flooding American communities with even more foreign workers. Simpson has consistently supported DACA, expanded guest worker programs, and every piece of legislation that prioritizes foreign labor over American workers. When criticized for supporting policies that amount to amnesty, Simpson dismisses concerns " these are not jobs that Americans will take." This is the same lie politicians have used for decades to justify replacing American workers with cheaper foreign alternatives. Yes, your elected officials have partnered with NGOs, unelected burecrats, and tech lords to support H-2B expansion for seasonal workers, H-1B increases for tech positions, and agricultural worker programs that systematically undercut American wages. And yes, every visa program, every foreign worker import scheme, and every corporate giveaway prioritizes cheap foreign labor over American families. Yet, you keep voting for these guys... Maybe it's because you believe the system will eventually correct itself. Funny, I once believed that too. Instead, immigrant placements exploded and each placement represents another American family priced out, another American worker displaced, another American community transformed. You tried working within a system designed to ignore American interests entirely. The political establishment profits from your displacement. They have no incentive to stop the process that enriches them while impoverishing you. Traditional politics can't solve a problem created by deliberate betrayal of the American people. Follow the Money The entire anti-American replacement system depends on one vulnerable point: taxpayer funding that can be cut off completely. The Office of Refugee Resettlement received under Biden. Every foreign placement generated $12,750 in immediate federal grants, but the real theft happened through state matching requirements that multiplied costs exponentially. Yet as I write this, you'llbe pleased to know that Trump has slashed the entire operation. His administration, and the $307 million Refugee Support Services program and the $564 million Transitional and Medical Services program entirely. In Idaho, orgs like the and (aka Jannus) have siphoned millions from American taxpayers, processing thousands of foreign placements while American veterans sleep homeless and American families struggle with medical debt. What Do You Mean, "You People?" Who are the "they" behind this system? Start with the global architects: the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees cherry-picks candidates from war zones. The International Organization for Migration books the flights. George Soros's Open Society Foundations fund the advocacy groups that lobby for more placements. Domestically, it's a revolving door of federal bureaucrats, NGO executives, and corporate beneficiaries. Former State Department officials join refugee contractors. Corporate lobbyists push for more foreign worker visas. Chamber of Commerce types demand cheap labor while wrapping it in humanitarian rhetoric. The local enablers cash the checks: IRC executives in Boise pull down six-figure salaries while "serving refugees." Agency for New Americans (aka Jannus) administrators expand programs that generate more federal grants. USCRI Twin Falls directors see placement operations as job security. When you expose these financial flows and demand America First budget priorities, the entire system collapses. These organizations can't survive without massive taxpayer subsidies funding your own replacement. Cut their funding, end their operation. It's that simple. This is about power, money, and the deliberate transformation of America against the will of the American people. The Great Awakening Americans are discovering they have the power to reject demographic replacement entirely. When citizens demand their tax dollars serve American families first, entire anti-American programs collapse under scrutiny. The financial pressure is devastating organizations that built fortunes on American displacement. is laying off staff as 90% of their funding disappears. When forced to justify why foreign interests should receive taxpayer money while Americans struggle, these organizations have no defense. American workers are waking up to the reality that their displacement was planned and funded by their own government. This awakening is creating political pressure that makes continued replacement programs impossible to sustain. The America First movement is bigger than anyone imagined. It represents the survival instinct of a people who refuse to be replaced. Your Marching Orders** The future of American Idaho depends on what you do right now. As your state senator, I'm giving you these orders: Contact every representative (congress, Governor, your reps) immediately. Demand they choose American families over foreign interests or face primary challenges. Tell them: "Fund Americans first or find a new job." Demand county opt-outs, zero NGO funding, and full financial audits. Connect with patriots in other states and multiply pressure on anti-American funding. And for crying out loud, show up to the damn polls and VOTE IN EVERY ELECTION. If you don't, you have nobody to blame but yourself. You saw the results from last week, right? Only showed up to vote. Sad. This is a war for the survival of American communities. Act like it. In his prophetic book, The Death of the West , Pat Buchanan said: "In half a lifetime, many Americans have seen their God dethroned, their heroes defiled, their culture polluted, their values assaulted, their country invaded, and themselves demonized as extremists and bigots for holding on to beliefs Americans have held for generations." Our ancestors didn't cross an ocean and tame a wilderness so foreigners could inherit what Americans built. Idaho's forefathers carved this state from nothing through American blood, sweat, and determination. They fought wars, survived winters, and died young to give their descendants a homeland. Miners in Coeur d'Alene and ranchers in the Owyhees didn't sacrifice everything so their great-grandchildren could become minorities in their own state. They built Idaho for Americans. Not for UN bureaucrats. Not for NGO profiteers. Not for immigrants who contribute nothing but take everything. You're their heir. This is your inheritance. These are your people. This is your fight. The thousands of refugees represent American families who could have been housed instead. Trump's pause gave you this moment. Now you must seize it. Your ancestors' blood bought this land. Your children's future depends on what you do today. America First means Americans first. Always. No exceptions. Fight for it, or lose it forever. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Brian Lenney ? ?

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: My statement on the Senate shutdown vote last night:
body:
---
| [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251110_5235_fr&refcode2=5235_22930333_J3_MQe&akid=5235%2E22930333%2EJ3_MQe)
---
Derek,
For seven weeks, we have stood firm and spoken with one voice: we must save health care for millions of Americans. Donald Trump has made it impossible for families to make ends meet, forcing them to choose between putting food on the table or paying their medical bills. The last thing Americans can afford is their health insurance premiums doubling overnight.
Let me be crystal clear: Donald Trump and the Republican Party that orchestrated this betrayal of the American people are responsible for the men, women, and children who will suffer because they cannot get the health care they need to survive. These are the same people who rushed to vote for tax breaks for billionaires. It is clear whose side they are on.
As this vote moves to the House, I stand with Democratic leadership as they refuse to rubber stamp the full-scale Republican assault on Americans’ health care and I am proud of the majority of Senate Democrats who opposed this vote.
The voters will never forget the day Trump turned his back on them so he could focus on building his gilded ballroom.
Thank you,
Ken
Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251110_5235_fr&refcode2=5235_22930333_J3_MQe&akid=5235%2E22930333%2EJ3_MQe)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: The most extreme and dangerous legislation in years.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251110-1-b&t=1&akid=11028%2E3935704%2EzRKfRH)
Team,
It’s Gabby Giffords. I need you to hear this from me.
Republicans in Congress are preparing to move forward a dangerous bill that would force states to allow people to carry hidden, loaded guns — without having to meet that state’s standards.
This proposal, a concealed carry mandate, would be the most extreme and dangerous legislation in years. Let me explain.
Currently, all 50 states and the District of Columbia have the power to decide and implement their own laws about who can carry loaded, concealed handguns in public. _This bill would allow states with the weakest laws to set the standard for all states._
Law enforcement from around the country have already rallied about how dangerous this bill would be. States that weakened their standards for concealed carry saw violent crime increase by 13-15% — and put countless police officers in danger.
Even after a year of deadly shootings, the gun lobby and its allies in Congress are still trying to weaken your state’s laws. They know if this passes, they will be able to profit and sell even more guns.
We must fight back.
I am working closely with the GIFFORDS team to demand lawmakers in Congress vote NO on this bill. We need more grassroots support to counter the NRA’s lies and ensure we stop this legislation.
[**Please, I am humbly asking you to make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today. We are working tirelessly to stop this national concealed carry mandate, and your support would go a long way.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251110-1-b&t=2&akid=11028%2E3935704%2EzRKfRH)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: A giant, flashing neon warning sign for Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
We have to fix this before the midterms...
| Peter,
---
If this year’s special election results were red flags, then Tuesday’s election results were a giant, flashing neon warning sign for Republicans...
---
**_...we’re not turning out our voters when President Trump isn’t on the ballot._**
---
**I've vowed to always be honest with you, so I’m not going to mince words:_If we see the same kind of margins we did on Tuesday in the midterms, our House majority is as good as gone._**
---
Approval ratings, poll numbers, and fundraising all mean _NOTHING_ if Republican voters don’t show up to vote when it matters most!
---
In the midterms, we need to turn out and vote like President Trump is on the ballot – _because for all intents and purposes,**he is**._
---
The Democrats have all but promised to IMPEACH President Trump.
---
**As House GOP Leadership Chair, I’m leading the GOP’s project to verify EVERY Republican voter we have on file and get their commitment to vote in the midterms.**
---
That project just got even more urgent following Tuesday’s results!
---
_Peter, can I check off your name as one of the voters that President Trump and the GOP can count on to show up and vote for us in the midterms no matter what?_
---

Peter, can I check off your name as one of the voters that President Trump and the GOP can count on to show up and vote for us in the midterms no matter what? Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt6suv11p10btj8084ep0bm9k27nu50dilngok90_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c3g6epb6c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbh68aif34m12f6d7279u1mtht8v6i9ohe4onjeg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c3g6epb6c9h2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcubbe961ht6891m7eqo731287vfnt65816atma0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c3g6epb6c9h2bs)

_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/fb69d0ed-d3b2-4412-b08a-f4b4ac1cffb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/fb69d0ed-d3b2-4412-b08a-f4b4ac1cffb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I don't know why everything in the Democratic Party has to be two steps forward, one step back -- but here we are. After our huge wins in last week's election, the vibe was good. People were energized. And now? We're frustrated. Eight Democratic senators just caved to the GOP on the shutdown last night.
Yes, the fight's not over. But we're in a spot where stopping this trainwreck without a Senate defection is damn near impossible. And the so-called deal these senators negotiated? It sucks.
Of course I want the shutdown to end. I want people to get their SNAP benefits. I want federal workers to get paid. I want the chaos at the airports to stop. But not at the expense of people's healthcare premiums doubling or tripling. Not at the expense of once again proving the Democratic Party can't deliver.
Taking this deal -- this toothless, empty promise of a Senate vote on healthcare premiums -- is just more proof we don't know how to fight. It's objectively bad. A promised Senate vote means nothing. First, there's no guarantee Republicans will support extending the Obamacare subsidies.
If these enhanced ACA tax credits expire, premiums don't just "go up" -- they skyrocket. The average enrollee would pay 114% more, jumping from roughly $888 to $1,900 a year. This will send millions of hardworking families, already hanging by a thread in Trump's economy, into a financial free-fall.
And this deal? It doesn't fix a damn thing. It doesn't lower costs, it doesn't make groceries or rent more affordable, it doesn't improve people's lives in any measurable way. It's performative politics while real people drown financially.
Second, Speaker Johnson has already said he won't even bring a fix to the floor. He dodged questions about it this morning. And ending the shutdown won't change that. It won't get Congresswoman-elect Adelita Grijalva sworn in any faster. It won't get SNAP benefits out the door any quicker. Because the GOP budget already slashes them -- nearly $300 billion cut from SNAP over the next decade. It guts veterans' services and police funding. It sunsets the ACA subsidies that keep millions insured.
This budget doesn't deliver relief -- it delivers pain. It's austerity dressed up as fiscal conservatism.
So why does anyone think this GOP -- this party of cruelty, especially in recent weeks, using hungry families and holiday travelers as pawns -- would ever negotiate in good faith? This is Trump's party. They're not here to help people. Why do we keep pretending otherwise?
* * *
_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/fb69d0ed-d3b2-4412-b08a-f4b4ac1cffb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/fb69d0ed-d3b2-4412-b08a-f4b4ac1cffb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Still, for all my frustration, it's not all doom and gloom. Most Democrats oppose this deal -- loudly, angrily. Hakeem Jeffries has done a good job keeping the House caucus together. And when the vote comes, yeah, we might lose a few -- but the vast majority of Democrats will stand up and say no.
That won't stop it from passing. But it's a sign. A sign that we're building something better. The next generation of Democrats -- the ones on the ballot, the ones who are pissed off -- are speaking up. And they're right.
Mallory McMorrow dropped a great video last night calling this out. She _is_ the future of the party. And let's talk about Jon Ossoff -- up for reelection in Georgia, arguably our most vulnerable seat. He voted against the deal too. That tells you something: we're on the right side politically, and the future is bright.
As for those eight Democratic senators who brokered this mess? A lot of them are on their way out. Dick Durbin -- my senator, and someone I've loved working with in the past -- is retiring. So are many others. I know folks online are screaming about primaries, but that's not going to happen. These senators are exiting stage left.
To me, this feels like the final gasp of an older Democratic Party. The new one is under construction -- by people like you and me. It won't be perfect. It'll have new problems and old ones. But it'll be different. It'll be built to fight and deliver in a way the current one just hasn't.
This isn't the end of the world. The cracks are showing. And I honestly believe those senators who caved? They did it because they care. They want people to get food assistance. They want their constituents to be okay. I get that. I'm mad at the politics -- but I understand the humanity behind it.
Still -- the pain people are feeling? That's not on Democrats. That's Republican cruelty. That's on Donald Trump. In negotiations, the person who cares less usually wins. That's the oldest rule in the book. And this GOP? They don't care. Not about people. Not about decency. Not about governing.
What really guts me is that -- for the first time all year -- it felt like Democrats were united around something that mattered. We were fighting. Together. As a united front. And we were winning.
Polls showed the public blamed Republicans for the shutdown. Their tactics pissed people off. We had them on tilt, poker-style. Their moves over the last month and a half were politically toxic: the House GOP skipped work for 45+ days, Trump melted down on Truth Social over the filibuster, and Mike Johnson went on TV and admitted he was using SNAP as leverage. Just raw, stupid cruelty on full display.
We had the nation's attention. We were pulling the curtain back. And even now, I don't think that progress disappears. People don't just forget who these Republicans are. We showed the country exactly what they stand for.
So here's the deal: two steps forward, one step back is still one step forward. Be angry. But don't doomscroll. Don't wallow. Breathe. Then ask yourself: what's my next move?
Democrats can't keep negotiating against ourselves. We can't keep trading long-term pain for short-term calm. Because the truth is, the only way out of this mess is through it -- together.
The shutdown will end. The headlines will fade. But what comes next is up to us. The party that fights for working people -- not corporations, not billionaires, not the political class -- has to start acting like it again.
That means holding the line. That means staying angry, staying organized, and refusing to settle for politics that make life harder for the people we claim to fight for.
We don't need another reset. We need a rebuild. And it starts with us -- the voters, the organizers, the candidates who still believe government can actually make people's lives better.
And for me? My next move, right now, is getting back to work with my clients this morning -- and supporting the candidates who actually represent the future. The ones who aren't just fighting against a party that's succumbed to cruelty, but fighting for a country where people can afford to live, to eat, to get care, to dream a little again.
This morning I'm donating again to Mallory McMorrow in Michigan and Peggy Flanagan in Minnesota. I believe in them. I'll keep working to elevate more leaders who'll stand up to this bullshit -- and help build a new Democratic Party that takes on the GOP with no hesitation.
Because we can win big. We've exposed the Republicans in this fight. And there's still work to do within our own party -- but don't drown in the rage.
Use it.

It's not all bad news, though. | | | Nov 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | I don't know why everything in the Democratic Party has to be two steps forward, one step back -- but here we are. After our huge wins in last week's election, the vibe was good. People were energized. And now? We're frustrated. Eight Democratic senators just caved to the GOP on the shutdown last night. Yes, the fight's not over. But we're in a spot where stopping this trainwreck without a Senate defection is damn near impossible. And the so-called deal these senators negotiated? It sucks. Of course I want the shutdown to end. I want people to get their SNAP benefits. I want federal workers to get paid. I want the chaos at the airports to stop. But not at the expense of people's healthcare premiums doubling or tripling. Not at the expense of once again proving the Democratic Party can't deliver. Taking this deal -- this toothless, empty promise of a Senate vote on healthcare premiums -- is just more proof we don't know how to fight. It's objectively bad. A promised Senate vote means nothing. First, there's no guarantee Republicans will support extending the Obamacare subsidies. If these enhanced ACA tax credits expire, premiums don't just "go up" -- they skyrocket. The average enrollee would pay 114% more, jumping from roughly $888 to $1,900 a year. This will send millions of hardworking families, already hanging by a thread in Trump's economy, into a financial free-fall. And this deal? It doesn't fix a damn thing. It doesn't lower costs, it doesn't make groceries or rent more affordable, it doesn't improve people's lives in any measurable way. It's performative politics while real people drown financially. Second, Speaker Johnson has already said he won't even bring a fix to the floor. He dodged questions about it this morning. And ending the shutdown won't change that. It won't get Congresswoman-elect Adelita Grijalva sworn in any faster. It won't get SNAP benefits out the door any quicker. Because the GOP budget already slashes them -- nearly $300 billion cut from SNAP over the next decade. It guts veterans' services and police funding. name: Roy Cooper
subject: A few things I’m considering today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Will you help me fight for a better country?
#
I want to tell you about a few things that are important to me, so I hope you’ll give me just a minute or two of your time today:
**Public education:** My mom was a public school teacher right here in North Carolina, and I attended public schools all the way from first grade through university and law school. Our future leaders are learning in public schools today. I believe every child deserves an excellent public education — no matter where their parents live or what they earn — and I’ll make public education a priority in the Senate.
**Health care access:** Expanding Medicaid was one of our most impactful accomplishments during my service as Governor of North Carolina. America is the richest country in the world, and every one of us deserves the care we need to stay healthy — and bringing Medicaid Expansion to NC helped more than 670,000 people get it. But the entire Medicaid system is now at risk because national Republicans decided to slash Medicaid funding and give a handout to the rich instead. I will fight to save Medicaid for all Americans.
**Voting rights:** North Carolina has been a proving ground for the GOP’s worst efforts to undermine voting rights and access. They’ve enacted ultra-partisan gerrymanders and restrictive anti-voter laws. In the wake of a 2024 election loss, Republicans even launched a lawsuit attempting to throw out tens of thousands of valid ballots and change the result. We must defend and expand voting rights to ensure that every one of us can have our fair say in our democracy — and we have to be prepared for the GOP to try to steal future elections that they lose.
[**Friend, I know we share many of the same values, beliefs and hopes for our nation’s future. I’m ready to do everything in my power to make this country better for all of us, but I need your help to make it to the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to split a $5 or more donation between our campaign and Long Run PAC right now?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=lrp-em-spl-cooper.puLpNU&refcode=SBD_LRP_EM_FR_Tier1_111025_D1_S1_RCSplit&t=1&akid=5660%2E196590%2ETVBMiJ)

body:

__These conservative veterans didn 't enter public service for praise or power. They answered the call because they believe in something bigger than themselves.__

Now, they're fighting every day in the Senate to defend our American values, secure our borders, and keep America strong, prosperous, and free.

Peter,
While her fellow Republicans in Congress dressed up as jedis, Taylor Swift, and zombies, Lauren Boebert could not help but go the racist route for her Halloween costume.
She donned a sombrero and wore a vile sign, meant to be read in a crude Mexican accent that stated, "Mexican word of the day: Juicy. Tell me if juicy ICE coming."
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pWPddmyOqcy7gozpBYI-1ep2DjTKTit6-rX_WqU3J5UYKuLDn22oTXDGHj_dzFG5-lbuIYn53ETTBNtb8AZoTfzXudq1kaz0EI8Lg5h71xFcKuPysCvoxGl01lfqLtOjBWSr1YYwRyEC5ecgZ9vnJF0vH5rCjwAW7MDi8KjoKvHW9TwvH24Fu_J4M9TeMX7rmO-f_371KqRIm8OubLeWyoX1sAWOZT7lMnU3doHmLe8=&c=4Q83Lc7GZbwIc9voJeFAIbcYwgxTvmZelFAbC0LyNt4E1W18AZJEYA==&ch=jnYTnb7tt9yB1nCz0ONx1jj_Hh67hFjTaVCRabuEwAcDq5fnU2j_Ng==)
---
2025 has been ICE's deadliest year in two decades. Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared. Boebert can't help but mock them.
Boebert and her costume embodies the rot that has metastasized within the Republican party and threatens to turn our nation into a totalitarian hell. They are devoid of empathy, compassion, and any decency toward their fellow man.
Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when she went head to head with her Democratic opponent, labor leader Trisha Calvarese, she massively underperformed Trump in every county whereas Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district. She is vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job in 2026.
These violent delights have violent ends. clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, While her fellow Republicans in Congress dressed up as jedis, Taylor Swift, and zombies, Lauren Boebert could not help but go the racist route for her Halloween costume. She donned a sombrero and wore a vile sign, meant to be read in a crude Mexican accent that stated, "Mexican word of the day: Juicy. Tell me if juicy ICE coming." | == 2025 has been ICE's deadliest year in two decades. Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared. Boebert can't help but mock them. Boebert and her costume embodies the rot that has metastasized within the Republican party and threatens to turn our nation into a totalitarian hell. They are devoid of empathy, compassion, and any decency toward their fellow man. Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when she went head to head with her Democratic opponent, labor leader Trisha Calvarese, she massively underperformed Trump in every county whereas Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district. She is vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job in 2026. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

name: Janet Mills
subject: So when Donald Trump personally called me out and threatened me…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
My dad taught me never to back down to bullies |
#
---
I don’t tolerate bullies, folks. So when Donald Trump personally called me out and threatened to withhold federal funding from Maine unless we folded to his demands, I told him I’d see him in court. So I did. And we won. Rather than back down, we were able to restore millions in funds for Maine students. _**This is proof that when we fight, we win.**_ Now we’re bringing that fight to Susan Collins. For too long, she has failed our state and it’s time we finally defeat her. **[Republicans are desperate to keep Susan Collins in the Senate, and will spend millions of dollars to attack me and spread lies about my record. I’ll need you every step of the way. | | My opponent has been gaining on me in the polls. Far-right actors are attacking me online. National GOP groups are pouring money into NC to defeat me and our people-first campaign.

_This is all weighing on my mind, friends._

I know we have a tough race ahead of us — the most competitive of my career. The coming months won’t be easy.

**But here’s what keeps me going:** We’ve earned financial support from tens of thousands of folks across the country. More than 90% of donors are giving $100 or less. Even more are sharing news of our campaign online.

Together, we’re building the momentum we need to win the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the nation. I’m deeply grateful to everyone who has joined us so far.

[**I’m asking for you to join our fight by splitting a contribution between our campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester today. name: Katie Britt
subject: When someone tells you who they are believe them

body:
this is where the Democrat Party is

Friend,

On Election Day, Democrats elected a socialist to run the financial capital of the world, and an Attorney General who fantasized about murdering a Republican lawmaker and his children.

_**[Democrats are embracing extremism at every single level.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkpfettc947rfb526urn4dktsb3bf4h634bivlc0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c3i64o34c3h2bs)**_

These elections weren't a referendum on where America is. They were a referendum on where the Democrat Party is.

_**[When someone tells you who they are, believe them.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ermo4m2a10ilgt31eai2lrol3houtntdl1im00_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c3i64o34c3h2bs)**_

And in this case, responding with strength is the only option.

Democrats are coming after our Majority, and they're doing so with candidates who embrace Mamdani's Marxism and have no problem with their base's extremism.

**[This conservative mom isn't going to let them win, but I need you to stand with me.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4elc74ihoupij5b5b9j77oontk88feiqi762vg8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c3i64o34c3h2bs)**
[DEFEND OUR SENATE MAJORITY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5im63p8tge467a6g68m00emr5gjkinmuljij0e0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c3i64o34c3h2bs)
This is not a drill. America's future is on the line.

God Bless,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zemh40octleuvmlm9fta8jimc7p402n9joponbt0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c3i64o34c3h2bs)

clean_body: I’d be heartbroken if I missed your response! | Fellow American, You're probably getting lots of fundraising emails. Believe it or not, I get them too! In fact, Senate Republicans recently OUTRAISED Senate Democrats, so I'm not going to give you a sky-is-falling fundraising pitch. Senate Majority Leader, I'm focused on the ONE and ONLY thing that wins elections: So, my priority right now is fixing the fact that our party's voter file isLAGGING behind the Democrats'. Look, we can be winning in the polls (we are), we can be winning by passing President Trump's agenda in the Senate and HOLDING THE LINE against Schumer's Shutdown (we are), and we can be winning in popularity over the Democrats (we absolutely are)... ...But unless we have a 100% verified voter file, we'll lose everything to the Democrats, We need to MATCH that energy and determination. We can't let Democrats take back the reins of the Senate for the second half of the Trump-Vance presidency. name: George Conway
subject: No Crowns. No Thrones. No Kings!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
She’s running against one of those corrupt morons and I’m more than ready to see his reign end.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T822f9257-1288-4b83-a593-6fc10ba59425/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44aeec6f-1f22-4845-a2ad-998846827cd3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Recently, I got to hang out with my favorite pediatrician and candidate for Senate, Annie Andrews. We talked about all she’s doing in South Carolina to put spineless Lindsey Graham’s feet to the fire to finally kick him to the curb next year, and how she OUTRAISED him this past quarter, showing the momentum her campaign has. And frankly, Peter, it’s momentum I know we all witnessed last month at the No Kings Rallies across the country. The No Kings initiative is important because we have to stand up for our rights, for our democracy, and against authoritarianism. [If you agree, I’m hoping I can count on your support to split a donation between Annie’s campaign and Blue Amp Action right now. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f0b0b31-6a40-4916-9509-f98558afc51e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e074332-df7c-429e-9bd9-6e7febf52c8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Annie had someone tell her this was a “hate America rally.” That kind of language truly pisses me off — because it couldn’t be further from the truth. These are people who love this country. We love America and this country stands for things that Donald Trump wants to take away from us: the right to free speech, the right to vote, and the right to basically have a government that's not run by a bunch of corrupt morons. That’s why we came together and that’s why we have to elect Annie to the Senate. She’s running against one of those corrupt morons and I’m more than ready to see his reign end. But Annie can’t do this alone, she needs all of us having her back. [So I’m asking you directly: Will you split a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can today to join me in this fight and help Annie Andrews and Blue Amp Action send spineless Lindsey Graham packing once and for all? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td66dbabf-279d-4fc8-a8fb-4da83fc3cc11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0ac3a95-ce13-4524-b40c-9b2ba58be269/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T817221a9-3444-4e6d-9ab4-ee4c733259e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73055f5b-b789-454a-8bb5-3591d73f2524/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|

| | | | | Let’s get this done, Peter. George Conway

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20251110_andrews-conway2_b2_f1_s1_c1_warmup_rs-t0?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c17f0cc-e3f4-4435-924f-f4a9759fb22e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
