name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Inflation cooled in September. Here's what that means.
body:
| Hi Peter,
---
All signs pointed to potential trouble. Sticky inflation. Tariffs heating up. Energy costs on the rise. Economists warned that the next inflation report would signal surging prices and stall any hope of a rate cut. But then the numbers came in, and they told a different story. Prices did rise in September, but not as much as expected. In fact, the report showed signs of cooling across several key categories. That's a rare moment of relief for investors, policymakers, and anyone trying to stay financially grounded in a volatile year. Why? Recently, the Bureau of Labor Statistics dropped one of the only official economic reports we've seen since the government shutdown began: the September inflation data. The takeaway? Inflation is still rising...but more slowly than expected. Consumer prices ticked up 0.3% last month, bringing the annual rate to 3%. Core inflation, which strips out food and energy, also eased a bit.1 Gas prices spiked, and food costs crept higher, but those looked more like outliers than the norm. Most prices stayed relatively steady, hinting that the recent inflation surge may be losing steam.1 Wall Street initially responded positively. Stocks surged, with each of the major indices ending the day at record highs. Add in better-than-expected corporate earnings, and markets closed the week with a wave of optimism heading into the Fed's latest rate decision.2 In other words, analysts braced for a blowout. But the numbers came in cooler than expected. Inflation's still rising, just not as fast. And that's what the Fed's been aiming for. The softer inflation data gives Fed Chair Jerome Powell some breathing room. He's been trying to cool inflation without slowing the economy too much. At the most recent meeting (October 28th-29th), the Fed cut rates by 0.25% but emphasized this doesn't guarantee a December cut, with officials wanting to see more data.3 This inflation data provides one piece of the puzzle as the Fed weighs future policy adjustments. Why does that matter? Because lower interest rates can ripple through the economy in ways that may affect your financial life:
* **Borrowing could get cheaper.** When rates come down, you might see some relief on mortgages, auto loans, or credit card balances.
* **Businesses may catch a tailwind.** Lower rates can help companies invest, hire, and grow...supporting the broader economy.
* **Market reactions can vary.** While rate cuts have historically supported markets in some conditions, the response depends on many factors including economic context and future policy expectations. Past performance doesn't guarantee future results, and volatility is always possible.
* **Yields on CDs and savings accounts may dip.** When the Federal Reserve cuts interest rates, banks usually respond quickly by slashing payouts on CDs and savings accounts.
* **The U.S. dollar might dip.** Lower interest rates usually, though not always, clip the U.S. dollar. A weaker greenback makes American-made goods more affordable abroad, which helps exports. But it could also make international travel more expensive if you're planning a trip.

There's one more ripple effect to note, especially for retirees. The government uses the same inflation data in this report to calculate cost-of-living adjustments, or COLAs, for Social Security. Following the recent release, the Social Security Administration announced a 2.8% COLA for 2026. That means benefit payments will get a modest bump starting in January...a welcome boost for millions of retirees trying to keep pace with rising costs.4 This inflation report had the potential to rattle nerves. And with prices still elevated, that concern was valid. The numbers confirmed what matters for planning purposes: inflation is moderating, not accelerating. Markets reflected this in their pricing. And the Fed maintained flexibility for its next moves. These are data points, not turning points. But they help us understand the environment we're navigating.
---
Warmly, **Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IjYwQjJGWjRrekkyTmRPSyIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
**P.S.** Inflation, interest rates, market moves: they're all connected. But what really matters is how they affect _you_. Your financial life should give you clarity and confidence, regardless of what's making headlines. If you've got questions about what all this means for your finances, or want to talk through how changes in rates or prices might impact your plan, let's chat.
---
|
---
Source:

1\. Bureau of Labor Statistics, 2025 [URL: [https://www.bls.gov/news.release/cpi.nr0.htm](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuYmxzLmdvdlwvbmV3cy5yZWxlYXNlXC9jcGkubnIwLmh0bSIsImhhc2giOiI2MEIyRlo0a3pJMk5kT0siLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ)]. 2\. Reuters, 2025 [URL: [https://www.reuters.com/business/wall-st-futures-rise-intel-boost-ahead-inflation-test-2025-10-24/](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cucmV1dGVycy5jb21cL2J1c2luZXNzXC93YWxsLXN0LWZ1dHVyZXMtcmlzZS1pbnRlbC1ib29zdC1haGVhZC1pbmZsYXRpb24tdGVzdC0yMDI1LTEwLTI0XC8iLCJoYXNoIjoiNjBCMkZaNGt6STJOZE9LIiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0)]. 3\. CNBC, 2025 [URL: [https://www.cnbc.com/2025/10/29/fed-rate-decision-october-2025.html](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuY25iYy5jb21cLzIwMjVcLzEwXC8yOVwvZmVkLXJhdGUtZGVjaXNpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDI1Lmh0bWwiLCJoYXNoIjoiNjBCMkZaNGt6STJOZE9LIiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0)] 4\. Social Security Administration, 2025 [URL: [https://www.ssa.gov/cola/](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuc3NhLmdvdlwvY29sYVwvIiwiaGFzaCI6IjYwQjJGWjRrekkyTmRPSyIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)].

Following the recent release, the Social Security Administration announced a 2.8% COLA for 2026. That means benefit payments will get a modest bump starting in January...a welcome boost for millions of retirees trying to keep pace with rising costs.4 This inflation report had the potential to rattle nerves. And with prices still elevated, that concern was valid. The numbers confirmed what matters for planning purposes: inflation is moderating, not accelerating. Markets reflected this in their pricing. And the Fed maintained flexibility for its next moves. These are data points, not turning points. But they help us understand the environment we're navigating. Warmly, Reid Rasner - CEO Omnivest Financial (307) 337-1223 P.S. Inflation, interest rates, market moves: they're all connected. But what really matters is how they affect you. Your financial life should give you clarity and confidence, regardless of what's making headlines. If you've got questions about what all this means for your finances, or want to talk through how changes in rates or prices might impact your plan, let's chat. | Source: 1\. Bureau of Labor Statistics, 2025 ]. 2\. Reuters, 2025 ]. 3\. CNBC, 2025 ] 4\. Social Security Administration, 2025 ]. name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Simple mission, huge impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
folks,
Voter Action Project has an easy-to-understand mission: To increase voter participation across the country.
We have several goals to help guide us in accomplishing that mission -- Expanding ballot access, meeting voters where they are, driving new voters to register, and reengaging lapsed voters to bring them back to participation.
This work keeps getting harder. We're not giving up, however, and we don't think we're alone in this fight for our fundamental right to vote.
Please, pitch in with $25 or whatever you can today to stand with us as we work to protect the right to vote for every American >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=111025_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=111025_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=111025_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=111025_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=111025_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=111025_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=111025_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project started in 2020 with the simple idea that we should all be able to vote by mail during a deadly pandemic, where standing close to one another in voting lines might endanger our health.
We've evolved since then to recognize the threats to our rights and how critical the ability to vote is, whether you do it in person, by mail, early, or on Election Day.
We believe the simple truth that the more Americans who vote, the more our country represents the interests of the people and not the powerful.
Your support helps us power our grassroots efforts against the dark-money millions at work to restrict the right to vote. Chip in to help us fight back >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=111025_2&amount=25]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111025_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111025_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=VA%2BPGhqpKuXtx1Wv9DG9dOV%2B206YooOLsMYoFl8GKv8s7rBdwZbPZupP42vwFLDPUDejIXww9ZNrNZ0i4GUBUOWEPY42n49TI4wut5g9ZmQ%2B0RzgqxGt1I0w9q3oQgsxuWIUCOA5DIjF%2Bp96Lv977F62uhjSsDWfEE3qV2TE3qpO6aeN0iEQupWSP93ly9IvZ1o%2Fo3K1aOfurGVBssx55en%2FBsDFWxcLOYPSZt0zxYusMFhqGrmN6F63BhZVEqMEKPMLWyC0BcWjjSu27tq9Awe7gSA9gTGfcpRsxkxVA8G3NdQkH2ktOz7I8%2BhTX0TaM4W2eTxAcLmxdsak%2F6sLwVXb38UtWgKlgIDsbTqchY4OXDOySM9hL31gkdrj25QLlutc3gdFC27oAD5mpi%2BQiLbRMYUv9Y9pSEiInDyw8TY%3D .

# Trump announces $2000 tariff "dividend" for low and middle income Americans
In a bold Sunday social media blast, **[President Donald Trump vowed](https://substack.com/redirect/486faa88-c6bb-4c9d-8903-5319b4ab4976?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to shower "middle income" Americans with a $2,000 "dividend" from his tariff triumphs, hailing the U.S. as the world's richest nation amid soaring stocks and vanishing inflation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/486faa88-c6bb-4c9d-8903-5319b4ab4976?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tariffs Fuel Economic Glory** : Trump credits aggressive tariff policies for catapulting America to unprecedented wealth, respect, and record-high 401(k)s with near-zero inflation growth.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a10b07dd-7cdc-4a5f-ada5-494681675a3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/137dff9a-e050-4593-b00f-f6c811460ba4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump 's Statement: **_**"** People that are against Tariffs are FOOLS! We are now the Richest, Most Respected Country In the World, With Almost No Inflation, and A Record Stock Market Price. 401K's are Highest EVER. We are taking in Trillions of Dollars and will soon begin paying down our ENORMOUS DEBT, $37 Trillion.
Record Investment in the USA, plants and factories going up all over the place. A dividend of at least $2000 a person (not including high income people!) will be paid to everyone ... All money left over from the $2000 payments made to low and middle income USA Citizens, from the massive Tariff Income pouring into our Country from foreign countries, which will be substantial, will be used to SUBSTANTIALLY PAY DOWN NATIONAL DEBT. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT"_
* **Foes Branded as Fools** : The president derided tariff opponents as "fools," insisting the levies have unlocked national prosperity without the downsides critics predicted.
* **Tax Cuts as Dividend Path** : Treasury chief Scott Bessent floated alternatives like untaxed tips, overtime, Social Security benefits, and deductible auto loans to deliver the promised $2,000 windfall.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/48649ff8-827a-4f43-ac73-3c928499106c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[The Ripple Effect Threatening Your Financial Stability](https://substack.com/redirect/48649ff8-827a-4f43-ac73-3c928499106c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/48649ff8-827a-4f43-ac73-3c928499106c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Why Your Retirement May Never Recover From the Next Market Drop**
This year is full of speculation around major events that may change our way of life forever. **While the outlook on 2025 remains a mystery, ignoring the worst that could happen can severely impact your financial future.**
One negative headline, one Federal Reserve announcement, one global event could trigger a selling frenzy that sends your retirement savings into freefall..
When markets drop suddenly, panic spreads like wildfire. Institutional investors rush to sell, automated trading systems accelerate the plunge, and within hours, a small dip can transform into a financial avalanche.
**[Your 401(k), IRA, and other retirement accounts tied to the stock market stand completely exposed to this volatility.](https://substack.com/redirect/48649ff8-827a-4f43-ac73-3c928499106c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
When markets spiral downward, these paper assets can lose value faster than you can move to protect them. **Fortunately, there 's a little-known IRS provision that could help you shield your retirement from the unprecedented market chaos that could ensue.**
While the entire process is simple to execute, it's too much information to overload you with in this message.

# Bessent scorches ABC anchor with quotes from his own book
In a **[fiery"This Week" exchange,](https://substack.com/redirect/be9e7d35-4726-445b-978e-36cb585919c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent accused ABC anchor George Stephanopoulos of hypocrisy for once branding Republicans "terrorists" during the 1995 shutdown.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3353132f-a47c-43e7-9713-7c01bad75f98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Bessent 's Clinton-Era Ties**: As a former economic advisor to President Bill Clinton, Bessent drew from personal experience in the 1990s shutdowns to counter Stephanopoulos's partisan framing.
* **Anchor 's Defensive Dodge**: Stephanopoulos dismissed Bessent's accusations as a "mischaracterization of history," pivoting back to pressing questions on the Trump administration's funding tactics before Bessent delivered a knock out blow by quoting Stephanopoulos's own memoirs back at him.
* **Historic "Terrorist" Rhetoric**: In a 2000 PBS interview, Stephanopoulos defended Democrats' strategy of labeling GOP lawmakers "terrorists" for demanding tax cuts that risked a national default.

* * *
* * *
# Schumer caves on government shutdown as Democrats descend in to civil war
In a Senate showdown on Sunday night, Democrats advanced a short-term spending bill **[to end the 41-day government shutdown](https://substack.com/redirect/d1b0569b-950a-44b1-87dd-ccec878ac261?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , aiming to reopening federal operations through January 30 amid fierce **[party infighting](https://substack.com/redirect/2cbba3cf-9480-458b-9635-e9fe58d9c24b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over abandoned Obamacare subsidies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d1b0569b-950a-44b1-87dd-ccec878ac261?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Schumer Faces Ouster Calls** : Progressive Rep. Ro Khanna demands Senate Minority Leader Schumer's replacement, blasting him as "no longer effective" for failing to secure healthcare protections in the deal.
* **Fierce Obamacare Subsidy Backlash** : Critics like Rep. Ritchie Torres decry the package as "unconditional surrender," warning it leaves millions vulnerable to skyrocketing premiums without immediate extension.
* **Warner Leads Vocal Opposition** : Sen. Mark Warner rejects the bill outright, arguing it fails to shield Americans from unaffordable healthcare costs or illness-related financial ruin.
* **King Defends Pragmatic Retreat** : Independent Sen. Angus King, who caucuses with Democrats, insists the Democrat's prolonged shutdown strategy has failed after seven weeks, prioritizing government reopening over futile leverage.
* **Bipartisan Votes Shatter Deadlock** : Eight Democrats, including Sens. Shaheen and Hassan, joined Republicans to pass the procedural measure, defying Minority Leader Schumer's opposition despite 14 prior failed attempts.
* **Federal Workers Gain Safeguards** : The agreement reverses layoffs, ensures full back pay for furloughed staff, and bars reductions-in-force through fiscal year 2026 to mitigate the shutdown's human toll.
* **SNAP Funding Extended Securely** : Food stamp benefits for 42 million recipients will be uninterrupted through September 2026.

* * *
* * *
# Trump eyes the creation of 50-year mortgages to ease housing market woes
President Donald Trump is **[eyeing a radical housing overhaul](https://substack.com/redirect/b968507f-9d48-4fca-ba69-a55fdf7de0c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by introducing 50-year mortgages to slash monthly payments and ignite the sluggish market.
* **Extends Loan Terms Dramatically** : By stretching mortgages to 50 years from the standard 30, there is the potential to cut payments by 25% for first-time buyers facing record-high rates.
* **Boosts Affordability Immediately** : The aim is to revive home sales stalled by 7% rates and median prices topping $400,000, targeting millennials and Gen Z who have effectively been locked out of ownership.
* **Congressional Hurdles Ahead?:** A change of this magnitude would likely requires congressional "tweaks" to Federal Housing Administration (FHA) guidelines.

* * *
* * *
# Ex-Meta and Google Execs secure $100M windfall for advanced AI design
Former Google and Meta executives unveiled Majestic Labs on Monday, securing **[$100 million to revolutionize AI server architecture](https://substack.com/redirect/c506899e-960f-4677-9d59-2f9e1c339ec9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that slashes data center costs by replacing 10 racks with one high-memory powerhouse, targeting hyperscalers amid booming AI infrastructure demands.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c506899e-960f-4677-9d59-2f9e1c339ec9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Ex-Google Meta Trio Leads Charge** : Ofer Shacham, Sha Rabii, and Masumi Reynders--veterans of Google's TPU and Meta's FAST team--launched the startup in late 2023, blending Silicon Valley and Tel Aviv teams.
* **Bow Wave Capital Anchors Funding** : $71 million in funding from a Series A round, that closed in September 2025 and led by Bow Wave and Lux Capital, fuels a patent-pending silicon design boasting 1,000 times the memory of standard enterprise servers for AI workloads.
* **Memory Crunch Meets Efficiency Fix** : In-house chip systems will optimize compute-to-memory ratios for large language models, cutting power, cooling, and footprint needs for finance and pharma giants facing $380 billion in 2025 data center and AI spends.
* **Prototypes Eye 2027 Rollout** : Majestic is in talks with undisclosed hyperscaler AI companies about its adoption; with plans for the team to grow to 1,500+ and use 2026 to position Majestic to challenge Nvidia GPUs in niche AI hardware battles in 2027

* * *
* * *
# JP Morgan's Dimon issues stark warning to blue states as exodus grows
JPMorgan Chase CEO **[Jamie Dimon warned](https://substack.com/redirect/9bb7bf48-0092-483a-834b-a1784ca46aa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the America Business Forum here that high-tax, regulation-laden blue states risk economic ruin as businesses and residents flee to pro-growth Sun Belt havens like Florida and Texas, potentially mirroring Europe's stagnation in 30 years without urgent reforms.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9bb7bf48-0092-483a-834b-a1784ca46aa2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Sun Belt Surge Accelerates** : Florida and Texas are luring firms with lower taxes and swift regulation reforms, spawning a "Wall Street South" via new Miami trading floors that challenge northern dominance.
* **JPMorgan 's Texas Tilt**: Despite a new $3 billion New York headquarters, the bank now employs more workers in Texas than the Big Apple, exemplifying talent migration trends.
* **Regulatory Gridlock Exposed** : Dimon highlighted Northern cities can endure 20-year delays for basic changes like bus routes, stifling efficiency and disproportionately harming lower-income residents.
* **Reform Imperative Looms** : Dimon urges states to compete on quality of life policies, lest unchecked exodus erodes prosperity for all Americans.

clean_body: "A dividend of at least $2000 a person (not including high income people!) will be paid to everyone" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "A dividend of at least $2000 a person (not including high income people!) will be paid to everyone" | | | Nov 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Trump plans to return tariff income to the American people Slams tariff critics as "fools" Bessent annihilates ABC's Stephanopoulos with quotes from his own book Schumer caves, Democrats to end the shutdown Liberals are furious and demand Schumer's replacement Trump eyes the creation of 50-year mortgages AI startup run by ex-Google & Meta employees, scores huge investment Blue states get a stark warning from JPMorgan CEO about their future Today 's markets + assets: ✅ DOW: 47292.67 (⬆️ 0.65%) ✅ S&P: 6819.79 (⬆️ 1.35%) ✅ NASDAQ: 23481.85 (⬆️ 2.08%) ⚠ ️🔴CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 17.77 (⬆️ 6.87%) ✅ Gold: $4115.30 (⬆️ 2.69%) ✅ Silver: $50.35 (⬆️ 4.58%) 🔴 Bitcoin: $105,459 (⬇️ 0.57%) The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism Trump announces $2000 tariff "dividend" for low and middle income Americans In a bold Sunday social media blast, to shower "middle income" Americans with a $2,000 "dividend" from his tariff triumphs, hailing the U.S. as the world's richest nation amid soaring stocks and vanishing inflation. | | ---|---|--- Tariffs Fuel Economic Glory : Trump credits aggressive tariff policies for catapulting America to unprecedented wealth, respect, and record-high 401(k)s with near-zero inflation growth. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Trump 's Statement: " People that are against Tariffs are FOOLS! We are now the Richest, Most Respected Country In the World, With Almost No Inflation, and A Record Stock Market Price. 401K's are Highest EVER. We are taking in Trillions of Dollars and will soon begin paying down our ENORMOUS DEBT, $37 Trillion. Record Investment in the USA, plants and factories going up all over the place. A dividend of at least $2000 a person (not including high income people!) will be paid to everyone ... All money left over from the $2000 payments made to low and middle income USA Citizens, from the massive Tariff Income pouring into our Country from foreign countries, which will be substantial, will be used to SUBSTANTIALLY PAY DOWN NATIONAL DEBT. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT" Foes Branded as Fools : The president derided tariff opponents as "fools," insisting the levies have unlocked national prosperity without the downsides critics predicted. Tax Cuts as Dividend Path : Treasury chief Scott Bessent floated alternatives like untaxed tips, overtime, Social Security benefits, and deductible auto loans to deliver the promised $2,000 windfall. | | ---|---|--- Why Your Retirement May Never Recover From the Next Market Drop This year is full of speculation around major events that may change our way of life forever. While the outlook on 2025 remains a mystery, ignoring the worst that could happen can severely impact your financial future. One negative headline, one Federal Reserve announcement, one global event could trigger a selling frenzy that sends your retirement savings into freefall.. When markets drop suddenly, panic spreads like wildfire. Institutional investors rush to sell, automated trading systems accelerate the plunge, and within hours, a small dip can transform into a financial avalanche. When markets spiral downward, these paper assets can lose value faster than you can move to protect them. Fortunately, there 's a little-known IRS provision that could help you shield your retirement from the unprecedented market chaos that could ensue. While the entire process is simple to execute, it's too much information to overload you with in this message. where you can get the details on this measure of protection before it's too late. Bessent scorches ABC anchor with quotes from his own book In a Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent accused ABC anchor George Stephanopoulos of hypocrisy for once branding Republicans "terrorists" during the 1995 shutdown. Bessent 's Clinton-Era Ties: As a former economic advisor to President Bill Clinton, Bessent drew from personal experience in the 1990s shutdowns to counter Stephanopoulos's partisan framing. Anchor 's Defensive Dodge: Stephanopoulos dismissed Bessent's accusations as a "mischaracterization of history," pivoting back to pressing questions on the Trump administration's funding tactics before Bessent delivered a knock out blow by quoting Stephanopoulos's own memoirs back at him. Historic "Terrorist" Rhetoric: In a 2000 PBS interview, Stephanopoulos defended Democrats' strategy of labeling GOP lawmakers "terrorists" for demanding tax cuts that risked a national default. Schumer caves on government shutdown as Democrats descend in to civil war In a Senate showdown on Sunday night, Democrats advanced a short-term spending bill , aiming to reopening federal operations through January 30 amid fierce over abandoned Obamacare subsidies. | | ---|---|--- Schumer Faces Ouster Calls : Progressive Rep. Ro Khanna demands Senate Minority Leader Schumer's replacement, blasting him as "no longer effective" for failing to secure healthcare protections in the deal. Fierce Obamacare Subsidy Backlash : Critics like Rep. Ritchie Torres decry the package as "unconditional surrender," warning it leaves millions vulnerable to skyrocketing premiums without immediate extension. Warner Leads Vocal Opposition : Sen. Mark Warner rejects the bill outright, arguing it fails to shield Americans from unaffordable healthcare costs or illness-related financial ruin. King Defends Pragmatic Retreat : Independent Sen. Angus King, who caucuses with Democrats, insists the Democrat's prolonged shutdown strategy has failed after seven weeks, prioritizing government reopening over futile leverage. Bipartisan Votes Shatter Deadlock : Eight Democrats, including Sens. Shaheen and Hassan, joined Republicans to pass the procedural measure, defying Minority Leader Schumer's opposition despite 14 prior failed attempts. Federal Workers Gain Safeguards : The agreement reverses layoffs, ensures full back pay for furloughed staff, and bars reductions-in-force through fiscal year 2026 to mitigate the shutdown's human toll. SNAP Funding Extended Securely : Food stamp benefits for 42 million recipients will be uninterrupted through September 2026. Trump eyes the creation of 50-year mortgages to ease housing market woes President Donald Trump is by introducing 50-year mortgages to slash monthly payments and ignite the sluggish market. Extends Loan Terms Dramatically : By stretching mortgages to 50 years from the standard 30, there is the potential to cut payments by 25% for first-time buyers facing record-high rates. Boosts Affordability Immediately : The aim is to revive home sales stalled by 7% rates and median prices topping $400,000, targeting millennials and Gen Z who have effectively been locked out of ownership. Congressional Hurdles Ahead?: A change of this magnitude would likely requires congressional "tweaks" to Federal Housing Administration (FHA) guidelines. Ex-Meta and Google Execs secure $100M windfall for advanced AI design Former Google and Meta executives unveiled Majestic Labs on Monday, securing that slashes data center costs by replacing 10 racks with one high-memory powerhouse, targeting hyperscalers amid booming AI infrastructure demands. | | ---|---|--- Ex-Google Meta Trio Leads Charge : Ofer Shacham, Sha Rabii, and Masumi Reynders--veterans of Google's TPU and Meta's FAST team--launched the startup in late 2023, blending Silicon Valley and Tel Aviv teams. Bow Wave Capital Anchors Funding : $71 million in funding from a Series A round, that closed in September 2025 and led by Bow Wave and Lux Capital, fuels a patent-pending silicon design boasting 1,000 times the memory of standard enterprise servers for AI workloads. Memory Crunch Meets Efficiency Fix : In-house chip systems will optimize compute-to-memory ratios for large language models, cutting power, cooling, and footprint needs for finance and pharma giants facing $380 billion in 2025 data center and AI spends. Prototypes Eye 2027 Rollout : Majestic is in talks with undisclosed hyperscaler AI companies about its adoption; with plans for the team to grow to 1,500+ and use 2026 to position Majestic to challenge Nvidia GPUs in niche AI hardware battles in 2027 JP Morgan's Dimon issues stark warning to blue states as exodus grows JPMorgan Chase CEO at the America Business Forum here that high-tax, regulation-laden blue states risk economic ruin as businesses and residents flee to pro-growth Sun Belt havens like Florida and Texas, potentially mirroring Europe's stagnation in 30 years without urgent reforms. | | ---|---|--- Sun Belt Surge Accelerates : Florida and Texas are luring firms with lower taxes and swift regulation reforms, spawning a "Wall Street South" via new Miami trading floors that challenge northern dominance. JPMorgan 's Texas Tilt: Despite a new $3 billion New York headquarters, the bank now employs more workers in Texas than the Big Apple, exemplifying talent migration trends. Regulatory Gridlock Exposed : Dimon highlighted Northern cities can endure 20-year delays for basic changes like bus routes, stifling efficiency and disproportionately harming lower-income residents. Reform Imperative Looms : Dimon urges states to compete on quality of life policies, lest unchecked exodus erodes prosperity for all Americans. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: It’s President Trump, and you’ve got me worried.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

# **_From Trump: You’ve got me worried_**
**__**

I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me.
I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.
Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW...
_But I know you haven’t abandoned me._
I’m reaching out because **_YOUR NAME_** is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you.
**_[So could you take a quick second to reaffirm your support and give me your response to some important questions I have for you?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=449eef060e1544a8a0b7508d4829d125&_e=Us8WuRIhci2BMwyQXwn243tddddImjKFHj0EOAiZRuskFXLQXBXRjT17BWI_r9U0UWMwHOEWh0twxUdY7x6XDN4CzrRaS39VN_XeRK0EVbhc-N8iMZfbJzuP_aqGKp_Z4KrySWBXCdQedb4rP7XCtI88gi40yQ9ouDFb-qpW5UsxciPxSGXu2nR2UiRhJOz4FKs_EChsnQrLisz0d1-roqFFKTHYX90CuDqXcdI5PTzqJ0_uPvQjRkOPNzn0NqKmGDEfSD-QeGdtWrhvk9IZg42GuPPkFzhfFyZ-Bo4w07FdiR2XaR35RRUsNp1R-CfU3ScV56bmhzVfEqY8iNKUDq5xCXqJtpIjUE_4v2G3yhQTGLs91FKfAbyf01yskJ_FtQUtKpq28-BTHnsfuwdmYuJmwIjWJPQ_jf7fIMWfAySrFb6Sp4Me66TPutfAD28Y3qXxryYGaR5gF9MuYkO5OZIg6Baa79XFjhYwS5NRC9r9Zjy4DPTcKAkA91auFSBlYNnmPbeaUu7XqREOsmNPEumcfCSTi4D3vGIDcJjWsnNqq0HHXwysxWwo5ttkjYM-E2j0VmrmGsrrksy1SZmn15w6l7iYwKzjJht4hIg8SVvEsREfticnVJh__2vt7OpGPv1gc7YT-_DcQjOvcJTy37qMFm2mTjULf5cCGiNB65HEoDPKVOeiStHsrfSoPntYWHvII_Iftli4kCDbGacWWl0Slzeq0edAtpHLwcBg2ZY%3D)_**

clean_body: It’s been a while since I heard from you. | | | | From Trump: You’ve got me worried I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me. I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you. Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW... But I know you haven’t abandoned me. I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend -

House Democrats named Eric Swalwell Ranking Member on the Judiciary Select Subcommittee on January 6th over the summer. This is not just a title, it’s a mandate to fight for truth and ensure those who tried to overthrow our democracy are held accountable.

Despite all attempts to deter and distract, Eric is still fighting, but MAGA Republicans are continuing to try to defund the work and block key testimony.

We cannot let them silence the truth. We need to show Eric that he has the resources and support to keep fighting to hold people accountable, no matter how high up they are.

Support the Fight » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2025-FR-November?&refcode=E16111-20251110-Jan6Committee-SB-GOP&amount=25]

[**SIGN OUR PETITION TO SUPPORT SEN. WARREN’S INVESTIGATION INTO TRUMP >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69857?t=6&akid=23596%2E4449941%2EHEG2aM) | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69857?t=7&akid=23596%2E4449941%2EHEG2aM)

[]()
Listen, this whole thing stinks of corruption...

[**FIRST:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69857?t=8&akid=23596%2E4449941%2EHEG2aM) Trump sued _CBS_ and _Paramount,_ alleging that “60 Minutes” edited an interview with Kamala Harris and distorted voters' impressions of her.

[**THEN:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69857?t=9&akid=23596%2E4449941%2EHEG2aM) Instead of fighting back, _Paramount_ folded and paid President Donald Trump $16 MILLION to make it go away.

[**SO NOW...HERE’S THE KICKER:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69857?t=10&akid=23596%2E4449941%2EHEG2aM) _Paramount_ is seeking approval from Trump's administration for a billion-dollar corporate merger.

Thankfully, Elizabeth Warren isn’t pulling any punches and is calling it out for EXACTLY what it looks like:
[]()
Please, Senator Warren is absolutely right – _this payment raises serious red flags, and the American people deserve transparency._
[**So we’re rallying massive public support for her investigation, but we still need 25,000 more signatures from your state before we can send the petition.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69857?t=11&akid=23596%2E4449941%2EHEG2aM) [**If you agree that a full investigation is necessary, please add your name to our petition to support her investigation before 11:59 PM tonight >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69857?t=12&akid=23596%2E4449941%2EHEG2aM)
[ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69857?t=13&akid=23596%2E4449941%2EHEG2aM)

name: New Leadership via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Schumer must resign NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

On Sunday night, Democrats in the Senate stood at a crossroads – and chose
the path of surrender.

40 days into the shutdown, Democrats had a clear demand: extend the
enhanced Affordable Care Act (ACA) subsidies to allow millions to keep
their health care. Instead, Chuck Schumer allowed eight Senate Democrats
to cross the aisle and hand the GOP a clean win. The deal they cut? No
extension. No progress. Nothing.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34628?source=email-20251110&t=1011&akid=9807%2E5885482%2EceGQ3M ]Headline: Chuck Schumer faces Democratic fury after Government shutdown
deal

That’s not leadership – it’s capitulation. And we WILL NOT stand for it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34628?source=email-20251110&t=1012&akid=9807%2E5885482%2EceGQ3M ]Will you add your name now to demand Schumer resign as Senate Minority
Leader? Senate Democrats need to hear from you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34628?source=email-20251110&t=1013&akid=9807%2E5885482%2EceGQ3M ]ADD YOUR NAME

Just look at what happened. Even TRUMP admitted last week Republicans were
losing the shutdown battle. But instead of holding strong, Senate
Democrats “negotiated” and walked away empty-handed – handing the GOP
leverage for the next fight, while sidelining millions of Americans who
can no longer afford health care, all for the ‘promise’ of a future vote
on the subsidies.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34628?source=email-20251110&t=1014&akid=9807%2E5885482%2EceGQ3M ]Ro Khanna tweet about Sen. Schumer's lack of effectiveness as a leader
and the need for him to resign.

But the worst part is, none of this is all that surprising. According to
our brand-new survey, 91% of us believe Chuck Schumer must step aside as
Senate Minority Leader after refusing to endorse Zohran Mamdani. 83% of us
do not feel represented by the current Democratic leadership.

One thing is clear: Schumer has lost the confidence of the Democratic
base. While working families face rising costs and a health care crisis,
he failed to keep Democrats united – caving to centrists, ignoring
progressives and the working class.

We’ve seen this pattern before – insider deals that leave us behind, party
elites telling us to wait our turn while corporate interests get their
way. But this time, grassroots energy is breaking through.

Right now, our organizers are delivering your survey results – to the
media, to party officials, and to candidates for 2026. We’re shining a
spotlight on a broken status quo and making it clear: we need leaders who
will stand up to the billionaire class and fight for working families.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34628?source=email-20251110&t=1015&akid=9807%2E5885482%2EceGQ3M ]But first we need EVERYONE to add their name and amplify this call:
will you join us in pushing Schumer to resign?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34628?source=email-20251110&t=1016&akid=9807%2E5885482%2EceGQ3M ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

clean_body: [ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo Peter Willis, On Sunday night, Democrats in the Senate stood at a crossroads – and chose the path of surrender. 40 days into the shutdown, Democrats had a clear demand: extend the enhanced Affordable Care Act (ACA) subsidies to allow millions to keep their health care. Instead, Chuck Schumer allowed eight Senate Democrats to cross the aisle and hand the GOP a clean win. The deal they cut? No extension. No progress. Nothing. [ ]Headline: Chuck Schumer faces Democratic fury after Government shutdown deal That’s not leadership – it’s capitulation. And we WILL NOT stand for it. [ ]Will you add your name now to demand Schumer resign as Senate Minority Leader? Senate Democrats need to hear from you. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Just look at what happened. Even TRUMP admitted last week Republicans were losing the shutdown battle. But instead of holding strong, Senate Democrats “negotiated” and walked away empty-handed – handing the GOP leverage for the next fight, while sidelining millions of Americans who can no longer afford health care, all for the ‘promise’ of a future vote on the subsidies. [ ]Ro Khanna tweet about Sen. Schumer's lack of effectiveness as a leader and the need for him to resign. But the worst part is, none of this is all that surprising. According to our brand-new survey, 91% of us believe Chuck Schumer must step aside as Senate Minority Leader after refusing to endorse Zohran Mamdani. 83% of us do not feel represented by the current Democratic leadership. One thing is clear: Schumer has lost the confidence of the Democratic base. While working families face rising costs and a health care crisis, he failed to keep Democrats united – caving to centrists, ignoring progressives and the working class. We’ve seen this pattern before – insider deals that leave us behind, party elites telling us to wait our turn while corporate interests get their way. But this time, grassroots energy is breaking through. Right now, our organizers are delivering your survey results – to the media, to party officials, and to candidates for 2026. We’re shining a spotlight on a broken status quo and making it clear: we need leaders who will stand up to the billionaire class and fight for working families. [ ]But first we need EVERYONE to add their name and amplify this call: will you join us in pushing Schumer to resign? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME When we organize, we win, Our Revolution [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. | [POSITION B](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119032541/581704084/-224586671?refcode=ea.4a6a0f3c-6bbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ms=ea.4a6a0f3c-6bbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTZhMGYzYy02YmJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IaEF1_DK-igjkrQSQkONz8PTEUI8tjl8C7vK2RVNCQQ=&emci=c8b72509-5bbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=4a6a0f3c-6bbe-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=17205535)

❌ **Block** abortion care (even though a majority of North Carolinians disagree) | ✅ **Restore** access to abortion care, and refuse to play games with women’s lives
❌ **Jeopardize** access to IVF | ✅ **Defend** patients’ access to IVF
❌ **Endanger** access to common forms of birth control | ✅ **Protect** birth control access
❌ **Threaten** women who experience pregnancy complications, like stillbirth and miscarriage, with criminal charges | ✅ **Respect** patients’ privacy — not punish them for experiences outside of their control
❌ **Force** patients to travel for hours to receive life-saving care | ✅ **Follow** medical best practices and fight for access to care where patients live

– Team Cooper for Senate HQ
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: MAGA’s bounty hunters are coming
body:
Donald Trump is going around the country BRAGGING about his so-called Big Beautiful Bill — calling it a “birthday present for America.”
We're raising funds NOW to hold EVERY SINGLE Republican who voted for this cruelty accountable and elect Democrats who will RESTORE what’s been taken. Chip in NOW to show that Democrats are not backing down >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=071025_2]
Because here’s what Trump is signing into law today:
❌16 million people will lose their healthcare
❌ 25% of nursing homes will shut down
❌ 51,000 preventable deaths every single year
❌ 2 million kids will lose access to food
❌ 1.75 million blue collar jobs will be wiped out
❌ 1.4 million students will lose their Pell Grants
❌ And the ultra-wealthy will get a $975 BILLION tax break
That’s not “beautiful.” That’s a national tragedy.
Our plan is clear:
✅ Expose what this bill really does
✅ Hold every single Republican who supported it accountable at the ballot box
✅ Elect Democrats who will RESTORE what Republicans destroyed and protect working families for good
This is it. We can’t undo Trump’s signature - but we can make every Republican who stood with him regret it.
Chip in $25, $50, $100 - whatever you can - to help us hold Republicans accountable and elect Democrats who will rebuild what we’ve lost >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=071025_2]

clean_body: Donald Trump is going around the country BRAGGING about his so-called Big Beautiful Bill — calling it a “birthday present for America.” We're raising funds NOW to hold EVERY SINGLE Republican who voted for this cruelty accountable and elect Democrats who will RESTORE what’s been taken. Chip in NOW to show that Democrats are not backing down >>> [] Because here’s what Trump is signing into law today: ❌16 million people will lose their healthcare ❌ 25% of nursing homes will shut down ❌ 51,000 preventable deaths every single year ❌ 2 million kids will lose access to food ❌ 1.75 million blue collar jobs will be wiped out ❌ 1.4 million students will lose their Pell Grants ❌ And the ultra-wealthy will get a $975 BILLION tax break That’s not “beautiful.” That’s a national tragedy. Our plan is clear: ✅ Expose what this bill really does ✅ Hold every single Republican who supported it accountable at the ballot box ✅ Elect Democrats who will RESTORE what Republicans destroyed and protect working families for good This is it. We can’t undo Trump’s signature - but we can make every Republican who stood with him regret it. name: Working Families Party
subject: The Dems caved. But we won’t.

body:
People are ready for a real, viable third party. | | | Peter, Late last night, Senate Republicans — aided by eight Democrats — passed a funding bill that will raise health care premiums for millions of Americans. Let’s be clear: This is a rotten deal. After **40 days** of holding out, Republicans got everything they wanted, Democrats got nothing. And **there is simply no excuse** — especially after voters turned out in record numbers last week to elect Democrats on the promise that they would stand up and fight for working families. Establishment Democrats have lost the plot. Voters are looking for leaders who will fight authoritarianism, not surrender to it. **But we have an alternative.** The Working Families Party is a non-delusional third party that’s fighting for a new way of American politics that doesn’t hand power to Republican extremists. **[If you’re sick and tired of establishment Democrats failing to stand up for the working class, then join us by becoming a dues-paying member of the Working Families Party with a monthly donation of $10 or more a month.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9zdmRXkAmsVr6K0qZlQSQeYHYCaksMk4cjLrD9JITmLTayMc-JuHIVXKqeJ2zNeykhNGiN-FiT964ER2XIcn7Kc34xg_uf9xUfv1BF5AbfYd4ueV_EC0OTkcHEfYaJTz341LIRZ0lIFCPdFoQCKAlaY-cP6_IwxLe7l6KmD_1U07JrG6BQhebCfKNdxKLY3snG-zN7BCPwHKtHKEh9m7K5WfP125aKCOYw0lrqnIV_jcy3S61Qo-fKUApDmKfkU-xS5WaC5XqttQtOQWuKz9meZnuEHEICfHkl-d8O0rH4eI5Xzhgspwv4UkrRxcnM9b_qyeCUyf95OkbwyW0bDKhkBfZhTH18G-P1hAP1njSD2Q6FdFOw4aMGRxqRjrSgB2G/4lh/uOwO6owySDezSvZtnK3OaA/h0/h001.3LtYqQNBU0au2-JbsGWlccvrZsPBFdQvcbmL2_NCdCw)** **[Become a dues-paying member](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9zdmRXkAmsVr6K0qZlQSQeYHYCaksMk4cjLrD9JITmLTayMc-JuHIVXKqeJ2zNeykhNGiN-FiT964ER2XIcn7Kc34xg_uf9xUfv1BF5AbfYdtGRcKNjR0MpXELUL3JLMNKZPQTBV1WIAjKLodKx7qJrdlal2bHMXRVdVOcjpJq8rAAWTQZpCs5PgsBq3zPTk3XIwnNlNTlnJMGcgjVo3-SjnaK2amSw7pJGEdALYrp1p_56ICmNy1UvCoHZtLkDIWkoMjNm2HJqe8wGya-kr0zR-RA_BF2PlUKlu7JpZRi6HVtXfwZy59dDtuNDHTyNqHtrGISoPZ-r7nFWXvq3X9naB-z7vrFZ_S_uMCi1QzZreENKnCkmRATgH6B19-Wxfi/4lh/uOwO6owySDezSvZtnK3OaA/h1/h001.PDdzmWVDOfhAOYlX1oY1BG63zc6ZnNjP9nWLlTD7p60)** **_The two major par_**** _ties are failing working people._** Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans have spent the past ten months making life less affordable and more uncertain for working families. And establishment and corporate Democrats have shown us no real plan to fight authoritarianism. **_People are ready for a real, viable third party._** The Working Families Party is building a political party on top of the two-party system. Sometimes we run candidates through Democratic Party primaries, and other times we run candidates on our own. We take on elections from City Council to the U.S. Senate — wherever there’s a path to win, and where winning will deliver real gains for working people. Next year, we have an opportunity to elect a new wave of leaders who understand the pressures that working people are facing every day. But we’ll need to build a massive movement of working people who are serious about what it takes to win. And to do that, we’ll need the resources to power us through the midterms so we can continue to recruit, train, and elect candidates who will fight for us, not kowtow to Trump’s agenda. **_Will you join us?_** **[Become a dues-paying member of the Working Families Party today with a monthly donation of $10 or more a month, and together we can build a party that is beholden to working people — not billionaire Will you join us? In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Troy Downing
subject: You’re exactly who I want to talk to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-n-r61CurCEQK2GSfQ)If you hate BS political emails, good. You’re exactly who I want to talk to, Peter.
This is Troy Downing.
I’m a combat vet, not a career politician. I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.
I ran for Congress — and won — because I tell the truth and fight for __We the People__ , not party bosses, lobbyists, or woke elites.**
****And because I refuse to play their games, the Left is coming after my GOP House seat.**[ RUSH HELP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)They want me out because I call out their radical agenda, support President Trump, and won’t back down on the issues that matter.
In other words, I’m “ _deplorable._ ”
“ _Garbage_.”
“ _MAGA Extremist_.”
They can label me whatever they want, but I guarantee you it won’t stop me from standing up to open-border policy and the mutilation of our kids in the name of “gender ideology.”
But here's the real problem: **Democrats are pummeling us with cash. **
They’ve stockpiled a **_$40 MILLION advantage over Republicans_** , aiming it straight at flipping the House Majority.
If I don’t flip the switch on fundraising soon, defending this seat will be nearly impossible.
And if we lose it, we don’t just lose my seat. We’ll lose our only chance at advancing President Trump’s America First agenda.
I’m not asking for a handout. I’m asking for an ally. [If you’re ready to join this fight, will you chip in $15.50 today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[JOIN THE FIGHT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[DONATE TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Thank you for your patriotic support,
-Troy Downing** _Combat Veteran in Congress_**| |

Since launching her campaign, Carol Obando-Derstine’s focus has been clear: building an economy that works for working families and standing up to extremist Republicans who are tearing away at our freedoms.

Carol is running for Congress because she knows our government can, AND MUST, do better. Carol has a proven commitment to delivering for Pennsylvania families:
* Growing up in a working-class family, Carol knows firsthand the struggles of making ends meet — and she’s committed to building an economy where housing, groceries, and utilities are affordable for everyone.
* As a leader in the energy sector, she’s worked to ensure reliable and affordable energy while creating good-paying jobs.
* She’s ready to fight in Washington to protect reproductive rights, defend healthcare, and expand opportunities for career and technical training that lift families into prosperity.

This race is one of the most competitive in the country and it’s sure to be a nail-biter. The outcome will determine control of the House, so it’s so important we have supporters who step up early.

clean_body: Carol is running for Congress because she knows our government can, AND MUST, do better. | = | Hi Peter, Since launching her campaign, Carol Obando-Derstine’s focus has been clear: building an economy that works for working families and standing up to extremist Republicans who are tearing away at our freedoms. Carol is running for Congress because she knows our government can, AND MUST, do better. = = | | | = Carol has a proven commitment to delivering for Pennsylvania families: Growing up in a working-class family, Carol knows firsthand the struggles of making ends meet — and she’s committed to building an economy where housing, groceries, and utilities are affordable for everyone. As a leader in the energy sector, she’s worked to ensure reliable and affordable energy while creating good-paying jobs. She’s ready to fight in Washington to protect reproductive rights, defend healthcare, and expand opportunities for career and technical training that lift families into prosperity. This race is one of the most competitive in the country and it’s sure to be a nail-biter. The outcome will determine control of the House, so it’s so important we have supporters who step up early. = | | | = Thank you for being part of this team, Team Carol | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
2025 was our biggest year yet.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_election&n=1)
---
|
### Thank You
We want to thank everyone that helped grow the PA Forward Party this election cycle. If you joined a call, attended an event, or voted for a candidate we endorsed, you helped us have a great year. We mostly would like to thank the 12 candidates who chose to work with us this year. This was the most of any [state Forward Party](https://www.forwardparty.com/candidates/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_election&n=2) and it shows the opportunities we have in PA to lead by example. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uzABh1W1uH2xRkdqrl5MmdduHYqLYJPChLV9rtPhvKsj5wshbg8fI0_4jcVHS2lzfw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_election&n=3) Each one of them did their part by volunteering to serve their communities and we're proud to work with them. You won't hear about it from national media, but last week, people across PA were making decisions about how laws are enforced, how kids are educated, and how our democracy functions. It's important that we focus on these elections, because this is where politics starts. In America, our leaders don't come from a special school or club. They're not a separate group or caste of noble people, our leaders come from among us. And when people stop stepping up, our whole democracy gets weaker. Thank you to these candidates for stepping up. As we sit now 6 days after the election. We can confirm 6 Pennsylvania Forward Affiliated candidates were elected to office. We are sure they will serve their communities well, and will serve as great example of the kinds of candidates the Pennsylvania Forward Party supports. [](https://www.forwardparty.com/candidates/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_election&n=4) We look forward to continuing to work with everyone who ran and all of you who supported their campaigns in the coming cycle and beyond. Now’s a great time to get involved or take on a more active role in the party! Please join one of the events listed below or reply to this email to learn more. name: Sharice Davids
subject: If we lose…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’re facing attacks on all fronts right now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119033274/581706499/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmIyYWE2Zi02ZWJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Ur-SbE0qDVRIM99908QtsU3BPornJimHUlwGEqFKOc=) I’m obviously going to do everything in my power to make sure National Republicans don’t gain full control of Kansas next year. But right now, I want to talk about the consequences if that _does_ happen — not because I want to scare you, but because we all need to know exactly what’s at stake. _Here’s what will happen if KS-03 flips red next year:_ Kansas Democrats will lose their only voice in Congress. Our entire Congressional delegation will bow to Donald Trump’s demands. And it would mean yet another blind vote for the National GOP’s corruption-loving, price-hiking, healthcare-slashing agenda. Look, we’re facing attacks on all fronts right now. The Kansas GOP is after me, Donald Trump is after me, even a handful of far-right billionaires have singled me out. They’re spending time, energy, and yes, huge sums of money to replace me with one of their own. [_**I know that sounds scary and stressful, but it’s not supposed to be. Because as long as we re-create the same grassroots movement that defeated the last GOP gerrymander and powered us to victory all those times before, I know we can win again. clean_body: We’re facing attacks on all fronts right now. = I’m obviously going to do everything in my power to make sure National Republicans don’t gain full control of Kansas next year. But right now, I want to talk about the consequences if that does happen — not because I want to scare you, but because we all need to know exactly what’s at stake. Here’s what will happen if KS-03 flips red next year: Kansas Democrats will lose their only voice in Congress. Our entire Congressional delegation will bow to Donald Trump’s demands. And it would mean yet another blind vote for the National GOP’s corruption-loving, price-hiking, healthcare-slashing agenda. Look, we’re facing attacks on all fronts right now. The Kansas GOP is after me, Donald Trump is after me, even a handful of far-right billionaires have singled me out. They’re spending time, energy, and yes, huge sums of money to replace me with one of their own. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. **Nearly 1 in 3 Americans used mail-in voting to cast their ballots in the last election** – and studies confirm it doesn’t favor one party over the other, it simply makes voting more accessible.

Donald Trump knows Americans disapprove of his MAGA agenda – **Trump’s disapproval rating stands at 55% according to _The Economist_.**

That’s why he’s pushing forward an unconstitutional order to ban mail-in ballots and suppress the votes of millions of Americans!

_We’re standing up in Congress to defend the right to vote but we need grassroots Democrats like you to join us._

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
# _Happy Veterans Day from USAF Veteran, Warren Howell_
---
| [Support Veteran, Warren Howell!](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=f193e8436e&e=7c92d84deb)
---
| |
As a young man, Warren Howell joined the United States Air Force to set himself on a path of discipline that would become the cornerstone of his life-long success. Service in the military teaches you quickly that hard work is the only way to meet an objective. There are no short cuts. And there are no free lunches.
Warren has always seen a challenge as nothing more than obstacle to be overcome on the path to victory.
And he is the ONLY Candidate with a detailed plan to put Harris County _on its own path to victory_.
Warren is just as frustrated as you are with the current trajectory of our County Government and that’s why he is bringing decades worth of solid business experience to the race for Harris County Judge. Warren is a successful entrepreneur who will use his experience to bring _**common-sense** _solutions to Harris County government.
_**Under Warren’s leadership, Harris County’s version of DOGE will be the first of its kind in Texas County politics,**_ rooting-out waste, fraud and abuse while prioritizing our most basic statutory obligations - fighting crime, repairing roads, and preventing floods.
**Warren will once again** _**create a surplus**_** while reducing taxes and tolls — keeping your hard-earned money** _** in your pocket**_**,****where it belongs!**
**SMALLER GOVERNMENT = BETTER GOVERNMENT**
See the full plan to _MAKE HARRIS COUNTY GREAT AGAIN_ on the campaign website. [👉www.howellforharriscounty.com.](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=ca7349a4b5&e=7c92d84deb)
Join our winning team and help lead Harris County to a brighter future with leadership that **WORKS FOR THE PEOPLE!**

body:
Winning in 2026 and adapting to a new world.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119034951/581712459/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_FR_GreatListen_111025_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDM1Y2YzOC03MmJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wca2qR0TWIpL7HA11R7nkGz_EIOj6rbQy8CfedfzhvY=&emci=8acf8c32-72be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=7d35cf38-72be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=51844520) Friend, did you catch this conversation I had with Brian Tyler Cohen? 👇 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119034952/581712460/109727453?refcode=em_WEI_FR_GreatListen_111025_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDM1Y2YzOC03MmJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wca2qR0TWIpL7HA11R7nkGz_EIOj6rbQy8CfedfzhvY=) I shared my vision for redistricting in Colorado. _You can catch our full conversation[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119034953/581712461/-803653937?v=cVJ7XED9Cww&refcode=em_WEI_FR_GreatListen_111025_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDM1Y2YzOC03MmJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wca2qR0TWIpL7HA11R7nkGz_EIOj6rbQy8CfedfzhvY=&emci=8acf8c32-72be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=7d35cf38-72be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=51844520)_ It’s pretty straightforward: When Trump and his Republican allies try to gain an unfair advantage through unprecedented mid-cycle redistricting,**we cannot stand idly by.** **[If that’s the kind of fight you can get behind for our state, will you donate $10 to our grassroots campaign? Some have said that we cannot pull off changing our state constitution to allow for an emergency redistricting option if this trend continues. **My answer is this: we must be vigilant and do all we can to defend our republic.** If Republican-led states like Texas, North Carolina, and Missouri are going to start redrawing maps more than once a decade, then we in Colorado cannot be blind to the reality we are living in and do nothing.
**In short, we need to fight hard to win elections in 2026,_and_ we need to be ready to adapt to a changing world of mid-cycle redistricting.**
For Colorado to change our state constitution, more than 55% of voters will need to support adding a "break glass in case of emergency" procedure that allows for mid-cycle redistricting. By adopting such a procedure, Colorado would be in a position to respond to Republican-led states attempting to unfairly redraw their maps — and we might even be able to deter them. _We will fight for what is fair._
**[Because here’s the thing, friend: We _cannot_ let a lawless bully gain an unfair advantage through norm-breaking behavior. As governor, you can count on me to stand up, fight back, and deliver for the people of Colorado just as I have for the past 7 years as your attorney general. | I want to take a moment to thank you for being part of this grassroots team. I know you hear from me a lot, so I appreciate you taking the time to read these messages.

Every voice and every dollar makes a difference in this fight, and I couldn’t do this without you.

But I also need to be honest with you: Republicans have FIVE times more cash on hand than Democrats. They’re pushing their extremist agenda and trying to silence our voices. **Taking back the House majority is the way we can push back against Republican dysfunction and get things done.**

While we can’t compete with their dark money, we can show the strength of our grassroots movement. We can show them that West Michigan isn’t for sale.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I never saw myself serving in the U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is a longer email about my story and how I came to fight for hardworking Coloradans in the Senate, and I hope you’ll read it until the end.
I'll be honest, Peter. I never saw myself serving in the U.S. Senate.
This is a longer email about my story and how I came to fight for hardworking Coloradans in the Senate, and I hope you’ll read it until the end. **[But if you don’t have time, please, take a moment and split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to help us defend our states and take back the Senate. →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9)**
Back in the mid-1980s, I was a geologist – until I was laid off for 27 months. Then, I took every scrap of savings in my bank account and took a gamble on opening my own business, Wynkoop Brewing Company, in downtown Denver.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9)
I remember working 80-hour weeks. I remember lying awake at night wondering how we were going to make it. And I remember being so angry that my government wasn't working for me.
So, I ran for Mayor. And once elected, I focused every day on making decisions based on what was best for Denver.
Then, I was elected Governor on the premise of uniting people, finding common ground, hashing things out, and getting things done.
And after we flipped Colorado’s Senate seat in 2020, I got my hands dirty working hard to deliver real change for Coloradans. We invested billions of dollars to confront the climate crisis, lowered prescription drug costs, made investments to rebuild our infrastructure, and brought thousands of good-paying manufacturing jobs back to America.
But Peter, I’ve also seen how broken Washington is. I see politicians who only listen to those who cut big campaign checks while ignoring the rest of us. And it’s clear we need more leaders who are willing to cut through the political deadlock and work to move this country forward.
Here's why I'm telling you this: **my story is the reason I remain grounded amid the nonsense and dysfunction that's happening in our government.**
Because with all the chaos in Washington, you need somebody who rolls up their sleeves and fights every day for all of us – not just those they agree with.
Like I said, I never thought I'd find myself in the U.S. Senate, but I’m running for re-election because Coloradans deserve a leader they can trust to do right by them. And I'm just a geologist-turned-brewer who entered public service to do what's right for the people of my state.
That’s why I don't take money from corporate PACs like your typical politician. Instead, I rely on grassroots folks like you. And it’s why I'm depending on your contribution today. Even just $5 here or $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
**[So I have to ask: will you split a donation of whatever is meaningful to you between Heartland Patriots and my campaign? Together, we can defend this seat we flipped back in 2020 and keep power in the hands of working people:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to John Hickenlooper and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251110-9686&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9686%2E614464%2E4beXe9)
---
Thanks for all your support,
John

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Outreach via Team Conroy
subject: Become a Citizen Endorser today →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONROY FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | | | | _You're receiving this message because you stood with us during the 2024 election, or a mutual friend shared your information with us. We’re proud to have you in our network, but if you'd prefer not to receive these updates, you can unsubscribe_[ _here_](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=2c7cc2a69f&t=b&e=a7b299e420&c=ffb6c24d30) _._
---
[|
---](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=aaddc93616&e=a7b299e420)
| | Peter – last week, folks across Eastern Washington sent a powerful message: **we’re done with the division and dysfunction of extreme partisan politics.** **We’re ready for leadership that actually listens, works hard, and delivers for our communities.**

From small-town school boards to city councils, our neighbors showed up – not just to vote, but to step up. They’re running for office, volunteering, and standing shoulder-to-shoulder to build something better right here in Eastern Washington.

That’s what this campaign is all about. And with less than a year until the 2026 midterm elections, we need you with us.

[**You’ve been with us from the beginning, Peter – now, will you take the next step and add your name to become a Citizen Endorser of Carmela Conroy for Congress?**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=1162ddf9b9&e=a7b299e420)
---
| **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=446fffe2a5&e=a7b299e420)**
---
| | When you sign on as a Citizen Endorser, you’re not just backing Carmela as a candidate for Washington's 5th Congressional District. You’re joining a movement of people across Eastern Washington who are ready to bring honesty, decency, and common sense back to politics.

Because you’ve seen what’s happening: insurance prices are skyrocketing, family businesses are struggling, roads and bridges are crumbling – while our representative picks fights rather than solving problems.

**Carmela Conroy is ready to change that.** She’ll stand up to MAGA extremists, protect healthcare and public education, restore stability for farmers and other business owners and workers, and defend equal rights under the law.

[**Join Team Eastern Washington today – become a Citizen Endorser of Carmela Conroy for Congress.**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=a77eed7822&e=a7b299e420)
---
| **[BECOME A CITIZEN ENDORSER](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=1cf29b01f0&e=a7b299e420)**
---
| | Carmela is deeply grateful for your support, Peter.

Thank you,

Team Conroy for Congress
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=6ec568777a&e=a7b299e420)

clean_body: We can't believe this, Peter. Tim Scott, Tom Cotton, Ted Cruz, Bernie Moreno, and Kellyanne Conway all reached out asking for your response to complete your 2025 Voter Verification Audit. you submitted your response. we're giving you ONE FINAL NOTICE to complete your audit before we have to REMOVE you from the top patriot list. We need grassroots supporters like YOU now more than ever, Peter. Don't let our country down when it needs YOU the most. Thank you, NRSC HQ | Paid for by the NRSC.
