name: Blake Gendebien
subject: It’s official 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
**It’s official: Elise Stefanik is running for governor, and her seat in Congress is wide open.** I’m Blake Gendebien, the dairy farmer and Democrat running to replace Stefanik and deliver results for rural America. **[Will you stand with me by splitting a $10 contribution or whatever you can between Dan and my campaign today to help us keep the pressure on and show we won't accept this abuse of power?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119040249/581732446/-993713421?amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmVlZjRlNy04NWJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDbq9U3TuiTVzNikhPK7PlzZja68lOJZ6r1rNiUYpeE=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119040250/581732447/-993713421?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmVlZjRlNy04NWJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDbq9U3TuiTVzNikhPK7PlzZja68lOJZ6r1rNiUYpeE=)
---
Our opponents are going to pour millions of dollars into this race to keep this seat and hold onto their slim majority in Congress, so we have to keep up our momentum. But with less than a year until the election, we don’t have any time to waste.
We’ve already received so much grassroots support, but it’s only a fraction of the amount our opponents are about to flood our district with. Now more than ever, we need to raise even more to spread our message across New York and make sure voters know I’m ready to fight for them in Congress.
**[I know we can win this if we work together. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Rep. Dan Goldman today to join our team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119040251/581732448/-993713421?amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmVlZjRlNy04NWJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDbq9U3TuiTVzNikhPK7PlzZja68lOJZ6r1rNiUYpeE=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Dan Goldman and Blake Gendebien will go through immediately:_

We’ve already received so much grassroots support, but it’s only a fraction of the amount our opponents are about to flood our district with. # **_From Trump: You’ve got me worried_**
**__**

I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me.
I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.
Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW...
_But I know you haven’t abandoned me._
I’m reaching out because **_YOUR NAME_** is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you.
**_[So could you take a quick second to reaffirm your support and give me your response to some important questions I have for you?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=f44add79d8814efb8d02e1bdbb002f07&_e=JvQBtUeXHaQpkvFlBKnQsCLM8fdDF10YB5x-zx0jklgnMGefmFAbX59LmiI3xpT6KWKhHYM7NpVAn0ETIVcNOW-Bh8A4mytCT10SQUrJqEXw2QbiD6rVu3qLsp95IP9yJ1ZQjW98mPzcuwqjJNHl6A6XfClMWtCpAAbrR_cCgilOEcfiZZpU_T0AP05e-DlBujTpalTQHLxmswlD_KTPeI5oyEqjbwgq75MGq8UkuBMMknEU5f-J8mj-4rTFtz2mOS5poKBTOhrBiokJ1ddeo9sAZdL6vVDJ_7wEwM6SM9caNj5tUURvBzkffurlmzJsVStq5vzvGiFLA9xAXKY0orUh1AoLuaEuuvIw2f_HfTFVcuPrUF671vki6KQt29LzqoiLGt2qOTmqY79Ok8DkESo6-2chyzFPLqtKhb1CzuzqArFtMBiu12dPXjfe2OI2ms4FSQ5w8YqLIuvA8yiprWXe8RYibuaVBtbJ85PKNLrlFYpzAUc5xWhkOqYMngZ3EQJHWvgXeKxcQXUj4aqy1DkW0lqHBuPV7uAfWPHGqcxrlWQ-wnUjDrXTcETM7fKcgoz7n-04pgysMQGh6tvBTHvjV0K4vraKsf5Vr2EV5t7q3pfmGDjPKNdJQ8gKBTW7T5_RLrkAPVOf8jTwPqYtU2xcqpdLlR760hHJ5QqJuH55dfvXDR8JMIWlQaedcOkRTs-NOoJB2g1wxkib5ZnOK8j0Y0zRc5qTbOTufHxb73c%3D)_**

clean_body: It’s been a while since I heard from you. | | | | From Trump: You’ve got me worried I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me. I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you. Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW... But I know you haven’t abandoned me. I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. ## [THIS is what happens when you ask the left why they are protesting...](https://substack.com/redirect/e42d6504-6536-4744-8cb6-98906d465457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e42d6504-6536-4744-8cb6-98906d465457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Protesters quickly moved to silence PolitiBrawl's Matt Miller as soon as he arrived at the Supreme Court with a microphone to ask them why they were protesting and engage in respectful debate with willing participants.
What happened next is absurd...
"Don't talk to him he's a fascist! He's not here for us!" a woman dressed in a Handmaid's Tale costume interrupted his every attempt to engage with activists.
"Charlie Kirk motherf**ker over here!!" another protester warned the crowd that someone with different opinions had infiltrated their rally.
**[Watch the absolute circus that unfolded next:](https://substack.com/redirect/e42d6504-6536-4744-8cb6-98906d465457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **[Trump's Reset Can Give Birth To America's Greatest Era Yet](https://substack.com/redirect/640ac996-6a82-46da-8d95-b798534714db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/640ac996-6a82-46da-8d95-b798534714db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate.**
Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen.
**Now, 92 years later,[President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](https://substack.com/redirect/640ac996-6a82-46da-8d95-b798534714db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people.
**A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price.**
That's a 72x increase!
**If activated, it could**
* **Reinforce America 's financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

**Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump 's Gold Reset.**
However, only those who download a copy of our **2025 Wealth Protection Guide** will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset.
**[Claim Your FREE Guide Now](https://substack.com/redirect/640ac996-6a82-46da-8d95-b798534714db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and discover how to position yourself for this golden opportunity.**
[Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/640ac996-6a82-46da-8d95-b798534714db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Trump demands $1 billion from BBC over edited documentary**
President Trump's legal team **[sent a letter Sunday](https://substack.com/redirect/ed9b51db-c090-4bf8-8f39-f09eeadee0cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** giving the BBC until Friday to retract "false, defamatory, disparaging, and inflammatory statements" from a Panorama documentary about January 6, or face a $1 billion lawsuit, after the broadcaster edited his speech to omit his call for supporters to protest "peacefully and patriotically."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7055a3ec-261f-44c2-a410-1373dee976c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Documentary spliced speech to mislead viewers:** The BBC documentary, titled "Trump: A Second Chance" and aired a week before the 2024 election, spliced together three separate parts of Trump's speech to show him saying "we fight like hell" without including his statement urging supporters to "peacefully and patriotically make your voices heard," which Trump's legal team calls intentional defamation causing "overwhelming financial and reputational harm."
* **Two BBC executives already resigned over scandal:** BBC director-general Tim Davie and BBC News chief Deborah Turness both stepped down in recent days amid growing controversy over the editing, with Turness stating the controversy "has reached a stage where it is causing damage to the BBC" and that "the buck stops with me."
* **Trump demands retraction, apology, and compensation:** The legal notice demands "a full and fair retraction of the documentary," an immediate apology, and compensation by 5 p.m. EST on November 14, 2025, while instructing the BBC not to destroy any relevant documents, with Trump's spokesperson saying the president "will continue to hold accountable those who traffic in lies, deception, and fake news."

* * *
## [Florida AG launches investigation against JP Morgan Chase for alleged political targeting of Biden's enemies](https://substack.com/redirect/a93ecab7-1c84-4235-8ec9-4651815f673b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[](https://substack.com/redirect/a93ecab7-1c84-4235-8ec9-4651815f673b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier announced an investigation into JPMorgan Chase over the bank's alleged cooperation with a Biden administration operation that targeted political adversaries, including Trump Media & Technology Group.](https://substack.com/redirect/a93ecab7-1c84-4235-8ec9-4651815f673b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# _**Socialist Reality Check:**_**NY Gov. Hochul pumps brakes on Mamdani 's free bus plan**
Gov. Kathy Hochul **[cast doubt Saturday](https://substack.com/redirect/3423bf57-c0ac-4f73-8e32-9cdb4302be26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on supporting Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani's $700 million signature campaign promise for free city buses, saying at the SOMOS political retreat in Puerto Rico "I cannot set forth a plan right now that takes money out of a system that relies on the fares of the buses and the subways," though she suggested finding ways to make transit "more affordable."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3423bf57-c0ac-4f73-8e32-9cdb4302be26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Growing rift between moderate governor and socialist mayor-elect:** Hochul's cautious stance marks the latest split with Mamdani since endorsing him in September, as she has balked at much of his actual agenda--notably taxing the rich to pay for $10 billion in freebies including no-cost child care and free buses--with supporters twice recently chanting "Tax the rich" at her, prompting the governor to respond "The more you push me, the more I'm not going to do what you want."
* **Mamdani needs Albany support for socialist agenda:** The governor's guarded approach could spell problems for Mamdani as his grand plans largely require support from both Hochul and lawmakers in Albany, though the two top Democratic state legislators--House Speaker Carl Heastie and Senate Majority Leader Andrea Stewart-Cousins--have been significantly more open to helping deliver his core campaign promises, while Hochul hinted that delivering free child care could take "years and billions of dollars."

* * *

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Health care shouldn’t be treated like a political football.
body:
|
#
Friend, Last night, members of the Senate announced a so-called “deal” to reopen the government – but let’s be honest about what it really is. **It’s a cave that lets Affordable Care Act tax credits expire – leaving millions of families facing higher health care costs and fewer options.** For months, we have been warning about the consequences of $1 trillion in Medicaid cuts and what would happen if Congress failed to extend the ACA tax credits that help families afford coverage. And now we’re seeing it play out in real time: families across Michigan are seeing their insurance premiums go through the roof – some by more than $1,000 a month. These are not costs that families living paycheck to paycheck – most of my constituents – can afford. This is families’ lives and livelihoods we’re talking about, friend. It’s parents in mid-Michigan worried about affording their prescriptions, workers juggling multiple jobs just to cover basic care, and our neighbors doing everything right – and still falling behind because Washington refuses to act. **So when this “deal” comes to the House this week, I’ll be voting no.** Because health care shouldn’t be treated like a political football – it’s the difference between stability and crisis for millions of families. We need a bipartisan budget that extends these critical tax credits, lowers costs, and delivers real relief for working people. That’s what I’ll keep fighting for – because Michiganders deserve a government that has their back, not one that sells them out. Thank you, Kristen | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119040378/581733089/-1307106724?refcode=em-11.10.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDJiMjJlNC04NmJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=46FG5c7iHTeSK-jbackp58e9txB06jirHeH253GcVKk=)

clean_body: | Friend, Last night, members of the Senate announced a so-called “deal” to reopen the government – but let’s be honest about what it really is. It’s a cave that lets Affordable Care Act tax credits expire – leaving millions of families facing higher health care costs and fewer options. For months, we have been warning about the consequences of $1 trillion in Medicaid cuts and what would happen if Congress failed to extend the ACA tax credits that help families afford coverage. And now we’re seeing it play out in real time: families across Michigan are seeing their insurance premiums go through the roof – some by more than $1,000 a month. These are not costs that families living paycheck to paycheck – most of my constituents – can afford. This is families’ lives and livelihoods we’re talking about, friend. It’s parents in mid-Michigan worried about affording their prescriptions, workers juggling multiple jobs just to cover basic care, and our neighbors doing everything right – and still falling behind because Washington refuses to act. So when this “deal” comes to the House this week, I’ll be voting no. Because health care shouldn’t be treated like a political football – it’s the difference between stability and crisis for millions of families. We need a bipartisan budget that extends these critical tax credits, lowers costs, and delivers real relief for working people. That’s what I’ll keep fighting for – because Michiganders deserve a government that has their back, not one that sells them out. Thank you, Kristen | = | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

But Stefanik will be watching us closely, and we need to usher in a record-breaking fundraising day to show Stefanik she doesn’t stand a chance.

And when the Trump administration threatened to cut NY police funding, Stefanik stayed silent.

**New Yorkers need a governor who will stand up to Trump and fight like hell for them**.

clean_body: = I have some news to share: Republican Elise Stefanik just announced her campaign for Governor. And Stefanik’s special interest donors have already rushed her $12 million to take me down and flip New York red. I’ve never backed down from a fight — and I sure as hell won’t start now. But Stefanik will be watching us closely, and we need to usher in a record-breaking fundraising day to show Stefanik she doesn’t stand a chance. = I’ll be blunt: Sellout Stefanik is a self-serving politician who cares more about Donald Trump’s approval than what’s best for New York families. She supports Trump’s expensive tariffs that are jacking up the costs of everything from clothing to groceries for New Yorkers. She voted multiple times against the Child Tax Credit. Stefanik brags about being the “deciding vote” for his agenda that will rip away health care from 1.5 million New Yorkers and put 5 rural hospitals in her district on the chopping block. And when the Trump administration threatened to cut NY police funding, Stefanik stayed silent. New Yorkers need a governor who will stand up to Trump and fight like hell for them. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kathy Hochul and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you and ever upward, Kathy If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Urgent Senate Update: I Voted NO
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501305548%2501Urgent%2bSenate%2bUpdate%2b-%2bI%2bVoted%2bNO%250115428.56802034.7597340.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501305548%2501Urgent%2bSenate%2bUpdate%2b-%2bI%2bVoted%2bNO%250115428.56802034.7597340.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **November 10, 2025** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
### Urgent Senate Update: I Voted NO
I have voted seven times for a responsible funding agreement to end the shameful Trump shutdown, hold the president accountable to the law, and prevent health care costs from skyrocketing for tens of millions of Americans. I have always been prepared to reach a compromise, but the funding bill that passed the Senate tonight does not come close to meeting those terms. Not only does it fail to prevent the impending explosion of health care costs, it also lacks the necessary guardrails to stop President Trump from ignoring the law and illegally withholding funds for important priorities. It is a bad deal for the American people. That is why I voted NO.

While I am very disappointed that the so-called deal did not include these essential elements, I will not stop fighting for them. Donald Trump has been illegally shutting down our government in pieces since he tapped Elon Musk to take a chainsaw to essential public services. We need to establish guardrails to prevent that from happening. We also need to defuse the ticking time bomb of the health care crisis that Trump and Republicans refuse to address. When Trump and congressional Republicans passed their so-called "big, beautiful bill," they extended and expanded tax cuts for their billionaire buddies and the very wealthy, but they refused to extend tax credits that help middle-class families afford their health insurance. This will not only harm approximately 190,000 Marylanders who receive these tax credits, it will also push up costs for everyone else in the insurance market. They also slashed Medicaid and cut other provisions of the Affordable Care Act (ACA) to help finance their tax cuts for the rich. As a result of their actions, nearly 14 million Americans will lose their health coverage entirely, premiums will more than double on average for over 20 million Americans, and it's estimated that over 50,000 Americans will die prematurely each year. This is absolutely unacceptable, and we must fight to reverse the damage they are doing and rebuild and reform our health care system.

Trump has also deliberately tried to cut off food assistance (SNAP) and force millions of families to go hungry -- to use them as pawns in his shutdown scheme. It was clear all along that he had the authority to use a SNAP contingency fund established by the Congress. He chose not to do so. Indeed, federal courts ruled that he was required to use those SNAP funds. Still, even now, the Trump Administration is contesting the order to provide full November benefits to millions of families. It is yet another example of the depravity of Trump and his cronies.

During this shutdown, I have worked to pass my legislation -- called the True Shutdown Fairness Act -- to ensure that all federal employees and servicemembers get paid and none get fired during the shutdown. That bill would also have held federal contractors -- from maintenance and custodial staff to construction and security workers -- harmless. Like federal employees, they had nothing to do with this shutdown and should not be the ones punished for it. Republicans blocked that legislation from moving forward.

When the government reopens, the Trump Administration must follow the law that Senator Cardin and I passed after the first Trump shutdown to ensure all federal employees receive the full back pay they are owed. The Trump Administration tried to scare federal employees by casting doubt on that requirement, but it is unambiguous and federal employees will receive full back pay. I will continue working to support our federal workers, contractors, and servicemembers as well as stand up to this Administration's attacks on our communities and their disregard for the unacceptable rising costs Americans are facing.

Onwards,
Chris Van Hollen
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100064&__crop=15428.56802034.7597340.7517223)
|
---

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F10_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F10_e]
Friend,
On Sunday, Governor Greg Abbott officially launched his reelection campaign right here in CD-18. Today, we held a press conference calling on him to finally schedule the special election Runoff for Texas’ 18th Congressional District.
For far too long, the people of this district have paid taxes, faced rising costs, and watched Congress make critical decisions, all without anyone fighting for them in Washington. That’s unacceptable.
Instead of standing with the people, Gov. Greg Abbott is playing political games, leaving our community without a voice in Congress.
We are demanding that he stop the delays, stop the politics, and put people over politics by scheduling this special election run off date immediately. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F10_e&refcode2=92bebd3f-88be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b]
Will you chip in today to help us fight back and make sure our community’s voice is heard? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F10_e&refcode2=92bebd3f-88be-f011-8194-00224823ff9b]

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Hell in a handbasket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter, I apologize for coming to you on such short notice. Now, I know you're busy, but I'm going to ask you to read this message in its entirety.

_Trust me, it 's that important._

clean_body: Peter, I apologize for coming to you on such short notice. Now, I know you're busy, but I'm going to ask you to read this message in its entirety. Trust me, it 's that important. For those that don't know me, my name is Bill Hagerty, and I'm a United States Senator representing the great state of Tennessee. Before that, I served as President Trump's ambassador to Japan, fighting for America First policies on the other side of the world. I've poured my heart and soul into every second of this fight, and as one of President Trump's top allies in the Senate, I was proud to do it. But Democrats and the vast network of left-wing NGOs are laser-focused on blocking the Trump America First agenda at all costs. You know the threat firsthand, Peter. Every time you turn on the TV, there's some sleazy career politician spreading lies about President Trump and the good folks that make up our movement. Just look at Chuck Schumer - he shut down the government over giving taxpayer-funded healthcare to illegals! I've seen these politicians up close, and I know what they're capable of. And now, top Democrats and their cabal of shadow donors are orchestrating a million-dollar scheme to throw me out of the Senate. Yours in patriotism, Bill Hagerty, | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Charlene Fernandez, Chair
subject: Analysts are counting us out. Let's prove them wrong.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119041385/581736598/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU3YmVmYWYtODliZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jR_E8Fal81D2aIGrE-O5ZKG5KqiAONyqdGq_5VFZm-U=)
---
Hi there, Political analysts are already questioning Arizona Democrats' chances in 2026. According to a new Axios report, Republican pundits are calling our 2022 victories — when Katie Hobbs, Adrian Fontes, and Kris Mayes swept the top three statewide offices — an "anomaly" rather than a sign of Democratic strength. **Here's the number they keep pointing to: Republicans now have 333,000 more registered voters than Democrats.** That's double the registration gap we faced in 2022, when we narrowly won key races statewide. Also, since 2022, Arizona has gained 142,000 new independent voters. These are the voters who decide elections — and they're watching Republicans stage shutdown theatrics, lie about healthcare, and call opponents "domestic terrorists" while refusing to address the cost of groceries. Yes, we need to close the registration gap. That's why voter registration is one of my top priorities as Chair. We're working to build year-round organizing across Arizona to register voters in communities that have been overlooked. [**Will you support our work to register voters, organize across Arizona, and prove the analysts wrong in 2026?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119041386/581736599/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU3YmVmYWYtODliZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jR_E8Fal81D2aIGrE-O5ZKG5KqiAONyqdGq_5VFZm-U=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119041387/581736600/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU3YmVmYWYtODliZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jR_E8Fal81D2aIGrE-O5ZKG5KqiAONyqdGq_5VFZm-U=)
---
**Here's what I know from organizing in Arizona my whole life: When we show up in every county and talk to voters about what actually matters to them, we win.**
The analysts say 2022 was an anomaly. I say it was a preview of what happens when we organize effectively and Republicans nominate extremists out of touch with Arizona voters.
Thanks for standing with us,
Charlene Fernandez
Chair, Arizona Democratic Party
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119041388/581736601/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU3YmVmYWYtODliZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jR_E8Fal81D2aIGrE-O5ZKG5KqiAONyqdGq_5VFZm-U=)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: No wonder
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| It's no wonder why working people feel left behind.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5096%2E35263%2ELkS1ZY)
Folks, Last night, the Senate voted to pass a government funding bill to start the process of re-opening the federal government. But this bill fails to provide any safeguards to protect healthcare access for 275,000 Wisconsinites. **That's why I voted against it.** I will not vote for a budget that doesn’t lower working people’s healthcare costs. I’ll always put Wisconsin families first, and what I've been hearing from Wisconsinites in every part of the state is telling: working families are already being squeezed, and they certainly can't afford to have their health care costs skyrocket. That's why I've been working in Washington to find a solution that would allow us to re-open the government AND protect Wisconsinites' healthcare. Meanwhile, Donald Trump and my Republican colleagues refused to talk about defending the American people's access to healthcare. **It's no wonder why working people feel left behind.** **[I'm keeping up the fight for working families every single day in the Senate, and this work has never been as important as it is right now. If you're with me, will you pitch in any amount that's in your budget today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5096%2E35263%2ELkS1ZY)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-nov25.j5UyuQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5096%2E35263%2ELkS1ZY)

clean_body: | It's no wonder why working people feel left behind. Folks, Last night, the Senate voted to pass a government funding bill to start the process of re-opening the federal government. But this bill fails to provide any safeguards to protect healthcare access for 275,000 Wisconsinites. That's why I voted against it. I will not vote for a budget that doesn’t lower working people’s healthcare costs. I’ll always put Wisconsin families first, and what I've been hearing from Wisconsinites in every part of the state is telling: working families are already being squeezed, and they certainly can't afford to have their health care costs skyrocket. That's why I've been working in Washington to find a solution that would allow us to re-open the government AND protect Wisconsinites' healthcare. Meanwhile, Donald Trump and my Republican colleagues refused to talk about defending the American people's access to healthcare. It's no wonder why working people feel left behind. body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119041969/581738427/1733485174?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWMzY2QyYzgtOGJiZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rdHhYGcCKhk56CQCe798IfxZqyNuNuvuG-hikCE-Jbc=)
I'm pissed off. Last night, eight Senate Democrats betrayed the American people and voted with Republicans to end their shutdown. Democratic voters won huge last week, sending a message that they want us to fight against Trump and the GOP trying to rip away SNAP benefits and make health care more expensive. And now just a week later, Democratic Party leadership gave up the only leverage we had to protect working people from skyrocketing health care costs. And what did we get for it?

**No** guarantee on affordable healthcare. **No** plan to lower costs. Just a promise to “maybe” vote on it later -- and we all know damn well MAGA Republicans won’t. This is why people don’t vote. This is why Republicans can still win elections. Most importantly, this is why the American people are struggling to survive. **We deserve new leadership in Washington**. Working people in CA-22 and across this country are calling on their representatives to fight like all of our lives depend on it - _because they do_. And here’s my pledge to you. For as long as I’m breathing, I’ll be fighting. clean_body: | = I'm pissed off. Last night, eight Senate Democrats betrayed the American people and voted with Republicans to end their shutdown. Democratic voters won huge last week, sending a message that they want us to fight against Trump and the GOP trying to rip away SNAP benefits and make health care more expensive. And now just a week later, Democratic Party leadership gave up the only leverage we had to protect working people from skyrocketing health care costs. And what did we get for it? No guarantee on affordable healthcare. No plan to lower costs. Just a promise to “maybe” vote on it later -- and we all know damn well MAGA Republicans won’t. This is why people don’t vote. This is why Republicans can still win elections. Most importantly, this is why the American people are struggling to survive. We deserve new leadership in Washington. Working people in CA-22 and across this country are calling on their representatives to fight like all of our lives depend on it - because they do. And here’s my pledge to you. For as long as I’m breathing, I’ll be fighting. name: Adam Schiff
subject: It’s corruption, plain and simple
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9172%2E5257348%2EviAVpf)
Derek —
Trump is “redecorating” — by which I mean destroying a historic property that belongs to the American people.
_And dozens of wealthy investors are footing the bill._
Some donors we knew about, like Apple and Meta, but we just learned that the White House didn't disclose all their donors for this scandalous project.
Who are all these mysterious donors? What are they and their companies receiving in exchange for footing the redecorating bill?
**[I'm calling on the White House to release the full donor list immediately so we can see how deep their corruption goes. Pitch in $10 to support me in my fight for transparency and fairness in Washington.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=q42025_abs_em.bOXSWp&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9172%2E5257348%2EviAVpf)**

---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q42025_abs_em.aHbpL5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=9172%2E5257348%2EviAVpf)
---
We just learned about a few of these secret donors who have business before the Trump administration.
* Jeff Yass, a major investor in TikTok, donated $2.5 million
* BlackRock, which is currently trying to buy the Panama Canal ports, gave Trump another $2.5 million
* Extremity Care gave $2.5 million while trying to get more money for their Medicare contracts

President Trump has a history of handing out favors to people who donate to his campaign or patronize his hotels. **It’s corruption, plain and simple.** And it undermines the idea that our government should work for everyone, not just the ultra-wealthy and well-connected.
**[Every dollar helps us hold Trump and his enablers accountable — and keep pushing for the reforms our democracy desperately needs. Thank you for pitching in what you can.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251110_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=9172%2E5257348%2EviAVpf)**
Thanks,
Adam

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Re: Tell your governor to protect same-sex marriage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
29 states still have same-sex marriage bans on the books. If SCOTUS tears down Obergefell v. Hodges, they won’t issue marriage licenses. | |
---
Peter, The Supreme Court is feeling the pressure from the people. **Today, they announced they would not hear Kim Davis’ appeal to overturn same-sex marriage.** The MAGA justices may be looking for ways to rehabilitate their image after all the times they’ve helped Trump get away with illegal activity. But their threat to same-sex marriage rights remains. Chief Justice Roberts wrote the dissent in _Obergefell_ , and Justice Thomas took aim at gay marriage when the Court ripped away abortion rights in _Dobbs_. **This fight is far from over.** [**We need our governors across the country to step up and make sure that their states residence's marriages remain safe, no matter what the Court does in the future. Tell them to fight to overturn bans and pass protections for same-sex marriage.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRjp-vX_MniR796E0xIBGDZQw7_7Tqb1PGdhZhMMZP6-vK_2Tr9mj3vfRDS4Or6wL9tclfXLgu4Fkk48bLfCoSZrS3fW_TWxx3g-b1N6CpRPCY4vDadIaim9mw8vYmkoPJFv1n56d5N9esMTYCKlTKCL8glOmgVd7kG6ateoZgh4ZdOuRB-V8-y7lGNqQvTimpufNTPDBEISrQdXt327h59uQTHq5_2ObeA42Nj-c3YOH_4ZAjZcFIwEWrXQTKswhlmqDDimH-HGiVX9vb6c0f_5ZLIdFri7x382c5mRIWB06ZAGgwDTRUogMbcdkQ15N0FBQwexzelLRghedL7WuoJotyRCQI3xVgAehvBPLEspc/4lh/_OdKo1s9RXCODUmP8p7i9w/h0/h001.oCwE3gl1xyhBYLdY2ASJwVi9FVB3XqvcNnt6PEk534M) Thank you for keeping the Supreme Court accountable to the people, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy **\-- PREVIOUS EMAIL --** Peter, The Supreme Court held a closed-door meeting Friday to consider whether to hear a case challenging _Obergefell v. Hodges_ , the decision legalizing same-sex marriage across the country. These nine justices are holding a secret meeting to decide whether or not to tear American families apart. **This is exactly why MAGA extremists worked so hard to pack the Supreme Court—they want to drag America back to a time when we were less free.** **If this MAGA Court overturns**** _Obergefell_****, 29 states will still have their same-sex marriage bans on the books.** Even though Congress protected same-sex marriage at the federal level, these state bans could still dissolve families in the eyes of the states. [**Striking down**** _Obergefell_****would be a disaster for the millions of gay couples who live in states with same-sex marriage bans. Send a message to your governor today, urging them to protect gay marriage at the state level.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRjp-vX_MniR796E0xIBGDZQw7_7Tqb1PGdhZhMMZP6-vK_2Tr9mj3vfRDS4Or6wL9y5JhKFd4ekvZoL9aD5WBu_vJmSqrWQFhYCoiI8LwN-zVop_ZyMZaxCglN_g64rtZm9fMYHM8DbFGnU2CQWjpjdI8D8aDj6emhQSotWjr5tPSNow3kK_ywKxyIiwTBQcGBZ_pwAtudEuJIJHmrLywV6xWXVmMTpOifxRo5Nxcv-G2ZDNYYzGyxZaNOjA29Ew7rJCfh5DkhzAKDGD9CSSza17PrX-XIkJ4HcZ8485pma3Lxv7Rwxd-18CktekayKhwGNg1TuFK589dMJc3wmucTGe2g6KesStqkFSP3O2WMaw/4lh/_OdKo1s9RXCODUmP8p7i9w/h1/h001.y0KhwBPPzwXOFuv_U0GMHnSbOHitc7o9Dy1BzZUDWXc) SCOTUS may or may not take up the case they’re meeting about now. The case stems from Kentucky county clerk Kim Davis, who refused to issue a marriage license to a same-sex couple. The couple sued Davis, and she was ordered to pay $300,000. Davis is asking the Court to cancel that debt and overturn same-sex marriage while she’s at it. But whether through this case or another, a challenge to same-sex marriage rights is coming. In his opinion for _Dobbs_ , the case that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Justice Clarence Thomas specifically called for the Court to overturn _Obergefell_ as a next step. **States must step up to protect families who live in them from this out of control Supreme Court.** **This extremist Supreme Court no longer sees itself as accountable to the American people.** And now the Justices are meeting behind closed doors to decide whether or not to break up millions of American families. [**Write a message to your governor today. If your state doesn’t have a ban, our tool will give you a message urging your governor to keep protecting LGBTQ+ rights. clean_body: 29 states still have same-sex marriage bans on the books. If SCOTUS tears down Obergefell v. Hodges, they won’t issue marriage licenses. | | Peter, The Supreme Court is feeling the pressure from the people. Today, they announced they would not hear Kim Davis’ appeal to overturn same-sex marriage. The MAGA justices may be looking for ways to rehabilitate their image after all the times they’ve helped Trump get away with illegal activity. But their threat to same-sex marriage rights remains. Chief Justice Roberts wrote the dissent in Obergefell , and Justice Thomas took aim at gay marriage when the Court ripped away abortion rights in Dobbs. This fight is far from over. Thank you for keeping the Supreme Court accountable to the people, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy \-- PREVIOUS EMAIL -- Peter, The Supreme Court held a closed-door meeting Friday to consider whether to hear a case challenging Obergefell v. Hodges , the decision legalizing same-sex marriage across the country. These nine justices are holding a secret meeting to decide whether or not to tear American families apart. This is exactly why MAGA extremists worked so hard to pack the Supreme Court—they want to drag America back to a time when we were less free. If this MAGA Court overturns Obergefell, 29 states will still have their same-sex marriage bans on the books. Even though Congress protected same-sex marriage at the federal level, these state bans could still dissolve families in the eyes of the states. SCOTUS may or may not take up the case they’re meeting about now. The case stems from Kentucky county clerk Kim Davis, who refused to issue a marriage license to a same-sex couple. The couple sued Davis, and she was ordered to pay $300,000. Davis is asking the Court to cancel that debt and overturn same-sex marriage while she’s at it. But whether through this case or another, a challenge to same-sex marriage rights is coming. In his opinion for Dobbs , the case that overturned Roe v. Wade , Justice Clarence Thomas specifically called for the Court to overturn Obergefell as a next step. States must step up to protect families who live in them from this out of control Supreme Court. This extremist Supreme Court no longer sees itself as accountable to the American people. And now the Justices are meeting behind closed doors to decide whether or not to break up millions of American families. Thank you for fighting for the rights of all Americans, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . name: Team Pou
subject: This is a bad deal.
body:
Congress should listen.

| |
---
Friend, Just last week, voters in New Jersey and across the country sent a clear, powerful message: **They are tired of soaring costs and a failing economy.** They voted against the MAGA agenda — an agenda that spikes health care premiums while protecting wealthy donors and corporate special interests. Nellie is speaking out, and Congress should listen. The new Senate funding proposal is a slap in the face to everyone who bore the pain of this shutdown. Families who had their SNAP benefits delayed or cut. Federal workers and contractors who went without pay. Seniors and parents who couldn’t get the help they needed. After all that hardship, this deal delivers nothing meaningful to the people most harmed. Instead, this proposal asks working families to swallow even higher health care costs. Nearly $3,000 more a year for many. That is unacceptable. **Because Nellie came to Congress to lower costs for New Jersey families, she will not support this bad deal.** We should be lowering premiums, reinstating SNAP benefits immediately, and protecting the programs families rely on to survive. That’s the work Nellie came to Washington to do, and she's not backing down. But she needs your help to keep fighting. **[We’re one of the most competitive districts in the country. Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us fight back and demand a fair deal for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119042479/581740376/-3691057?refcode=251110_tp_senatedeal_l1&ms=251110_tp_senatedeal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjc2MGM0MmYtOGRiZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=awqxKeGoUiAK1H6iDvVDx4FYkDQP9tv0bGYYhnJAcRA=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119042486/581740383/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=251110_tp_senatedeal&ms=251110_tp_senatedeal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjc2MGM0MmYtOGRiZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=awqxKeGoUiAK1H6iDvVDx4FYkDQP9tv0bGYYhnJAcRA=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119042487/581740384/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=251110_tp_senatedeal&ms=251110_tp_senatedeal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjc2MGM0MmYtOGRiZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=awqxKeGoUiAK1H6iDvVDx4FYkDQP9tv0bGYYhnJAcRA=)

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. Nearly $3,000 more a year for many. That is unacceptable. Because Nellie came to Congress to lower costs for New Jersey families, she will not support this bad deal. We should be lowering premiums, reinstating SNAP benefits immediately, and protecting the programs families rely on to survive. That’s the work Nellie came to Washington to do, and she's not backing down. But she needs your help to keep fighting. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. New Jersey sent a clear message in this year’s election. This deal will not lower costs, and we can count on Nellie to fight against it. Thank you for standing with us. Team Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Will you help fund the next Resistance Lab?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
In less than a year, tens of thousands of people from every single state have attended a Resistance Lab.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251110-5614-footer&t=1&akid=5614%2E420207%2EhMQQu7)
Peter,
When Trump was re-elected, I knew we couldn’t just dust off the old playbook and call it a day. We needed to channel our anger, fear, and frustration into a sustained nonviolent movement that would root out authoritarianism for good.
**That’s why I started the Resistance Lab.** And in less than a year, tens of thousands of people from every single state have attended one. They’ve learned from experts what it takes to beat authoritarianism, how to organize their neighbors, build strong coalitions, and take on injustice nonviolently. It’s a really unique and deep training, and people come out of it inspired and ready to act and build momentum to reach the scale we need in every community across the country.
These trainings have gotten _big_ , with thousands of people online in each one from all 50 states. We have utilized special technology that allows people to break into small groups, even virtually, and people love this! It means we get out of our silos, and someone from California talk to someone from Florida or Texas. It means we connect across our geographies and build our understanding, skills and momentum. It gives us all HOPE and a game plan so we’re not waiting for someone else to tell us what to do.
All that technology is not cheap—nor is the work it takes to put on the training and get people to sign on. Each one costs about $10,000 in hard costs—and that doesn’t include our staff time.
And Peter, I’ve been funding all of this through my campaign because I know how important it is and I’m committed to it no matter what. I’m one of very few members of Congress who actually uses my campaign to build the people’s power through this kind of grassroots organizing, and I do it because I believe it’s working. But to keep it up, I need your help.
**To help fund our next Resistance Lab, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 from grassroots supporters like you.**
[**So Peter, can I count on you to pitch in $3, or any amount that works for you, to help us reach our goal and continue doing this incredibly important work?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251110.vHUl-H&refcode=em20251110-5614&amount=3&t=2&akid=5614%2E420207%2EhMQQu7)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251110.vHUl-H&amount=3&refcode=em20251110-5614&t=21&akid=5614%2E420207%2EhMQQu7)**
[**And if you haven’t already, make sure to sign up for our next Resistance Lab this weekend on Sunday, November 16. We’re hoping to make it our biggest one yet!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/50885?utm_source=em20251110-5614&t=22&akid=5614%2E420207%2EhMQQu7)
Thank you, thank you, thank you for your support,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251110-5614-footer&t=23&refcode2=5614_420207_hMQQu7&akid=5614%2E420207%2EhMQQu7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=5614%2E420207%2EhMQQu7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5614%2E420207%2EhMQQu7)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Kathy Hochul
subject: re: Elise Stefanik
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Please read this note from NY Governor Kathy Hochul – who has a critical update on her race.
-Jacky Rosen
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119042497/581740396/-532389888?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5646-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWIwYzYyOS04ZGJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MBkrF6tpGjg4vXp1x2W2UnrTemH95U4h24yRVqgOGc=)
Friend, I have some news to share:
And Stefanik’s special interest donors have already rushed her $12 million to take me down and flip New York red.
I’ve never backed down from a fight — and I sure as hell won’t start now.
But Stefanik will be watching us closely, and we need to usher in a record-breaking fundraising day to show Stefanik she doesn’t stand a chance.
**[That’s why I’m calling on my top supporters to help me before midnight and prove the strength of our team. Can I count on you to split a donation between myself and Jacky Rosen?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119042498/581740397/-532389888?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5646-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWIwYzYyOS04ZGJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MBkrF6tpGjg4vXp1x2W2UnrTemH95U4h24yRVqgOGc=)**
I’ll be blunt, friend: Sellout Stefanik is a self-serving politician who cares more about Donald Trump’s approval than what’s best for New York families.
She supports Trump’s expensive tariffs that are jacking up the costs of everything from clothing to groceries for New Yorkers. She voted multiple times against the Child Tax Credit.
Stefanik brags about being the “deciding vote” for his agenda that will rip away health care from 1.5 million New Yorkers and put 5 rural hospitals in her district on the chopping block.
And when the Trump administration threatened to cut NY police funding, Stefanik stayed silent.
**New Yorkers need a governor who will stand up to Trump and fight like hell for them.**
[Friend, I need all hands on deck to fight back. So I’m asking again: Will you split a donation between my campaign and Jacky Rosen before midnight to help me outraise Stefanik and win this race for every New Yorker? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119042499/581740398/-532389888?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5646-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWIwYzYyOS04ZGJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MBkrF6tpGjg4vXp1x2W2UnrTemH95U4h24yRVqgOGc=)
| | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119042500/581740399/-532389888?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5646-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWIwYzYyOS04ZGJlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MBkrF6tpGjg4vXp1x2W2UnrTemH95U4h24yRVqgOGc=)

Kathy

If not, you may miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Because of the government shutdown, I can only keep this position open until midnight, so act fast because I really want YOU to be my White House Advisor! Your support of me and the MAGA movement has meant the world to me. We have truly been through it all together, this is why... I love you & I’m crossing my fingers that you still feel the same way about me. If you love me, will you make it known to my closest MAGA patriots by becoming an Official Trump White House Advisor? name: Jon Ossoff
subject: My decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.
And this Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– please rush $5 to my reelection campaign today.
**Here’s the link to donate:**[**https://act.electjon.com/go/donate**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251110-1-f&t=1&akid=1068%2E5691347%2Ek_5iu_)
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please make a contribution to my reelection campaign today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251110-1-f&t=2&akid=1068%2E5691347%2Ek_5iu_)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251110-1-f&t=3&akid=1068%2E5691347%2Ek_5iu_)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff
[
---

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=1068%2E5691347%2Ek_5iu_) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1068%2E5691347%2Ek_5iu_) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

# **_From Trump: You’ve got me worried_**
**__**

I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me.
I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.
Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW...
_But I know you haven’t abandoned me._
I’m reaching out because **_YOUR NAME_** is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you.
**_[So could you take a quick second to reaffirm your support and give me your response to some important questions I have for you?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=04527d5d030c48d7ab506039e003bee6&_e=0sFAi1oCbCIB1VqPF4DBUwGt9_vMOfGx472rRk4ADRDQ9ptLu_eF-zzg1X05BRQhNnAyBzIvtFBjPyDKCXNs0bwqKlny9xpp3_npy3q7dem2uxTfAuV0UYzbF_gS-e98UxHHeeeVX9VBekoeFtY16abbB4OJTA4KOmhD6fPCV17TdprM7t3K34SPfjd0mF4QaTa-zw9zLTlbf1iteTAxdwF8in7FT_91mV_u426Yd4469fcP-7ODeqgaaxTZSddNGBNOTqj0a0oihtc4KK227qi5vr9Topye37a5Nm1ouN6AbPgt6K8_t-VmnZo88cTRCI_hGiYZLjrDJbn4jg8SoCH6T1cA4crphtJIHBVcqt5nPMmXG08gPIj5DAy9L69gNDrp-6_nodDFHNqHPgBXhxjdAOJ_yV5SQ0xKeFa9Xyt8FS4qiD8yHyE0LH1H1flQMyvFlvz5pqf_X61y3H2-NGMpUpP4glulZcs1HPKve_aHR6Fq7o8B1XKIPbXtY7SIxaadBt8YhEBVIXu4xfSdQXc1XeDCD_6fODX2RYSAWEhQjQ50KngNdvNadrBzelLkBEChrVZON0CHP1FeeIJXWHUMDt7CywEYsWDcoIanGWmUEjFh9JrC_VAQiqC-NfrqantJ7HfMdMVH33cw5eJ9i22NMpNsZ2o0gI3m0uz-GKRHwQMiPR_hBR_EM80QnuIxsiONEHu63wm46R17nqZL-hfOs8-esbljrKRXnY2JNPE%3D)_**

I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Help unhoused veterans thrive:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
All Things Women helps veterans survive and thrive. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWebLW0Sxo3_NUhj9WQDzQV14YJYEr_MEge0dYOtUvFxAQ9QqEA1NuHc40ghbvrFTAw-YD3_eHb5WzeSh-jLqDc3_VaZldh3j93aEJlqI3FJObGRWHaIAvMpyv0cmTZE-ZAoFtYuaZJyeNX75UHxQSYA/4lh/p6IGjtS0R-GMBaI4MQgHGA/h0/h001._5rBKO4eQQJNlkg0QtDFOccQ1vXIF1lY8u1DGmj_W1g)
---
Friend, Tomorrow is Veterans Day. I just re-introduced legislation to expand healthcare for veterans, and I’m fighting alongside veterans against the Trump administration’s cuts to VA jobs, healthcare, and food programs. Thousands of veterans in every state use SNAP to put food on the table. Many of those folks have a disability and live with at least one child. Even more U.S. veterans are at risk of losing essential care and housing. **It’s not enough to thank our veterans with words; they deserve quality healthcare, secure housing, employment if able, and fully funded life-saving services.** So today, I’m lifting up an organization that supports female veterans experiencing homelessness or housing instability: All Things Women. **All Things Women supports veterans with dignified emergency shelter and transitional housing, as well as rapid assistance with stable housing.**[**Can you chip in to fund this work?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwobcPJr_EtF2F6sxhsEtaprIfjuNp9haHPJVpFNhncRb5L8GvKVBvWYHM2b5kI1V8iXMG3QOnvzhu2bfYNA3SyfbL9OBXdJw_c8Vvc35tmmWpF1w5yqWH9g5qEMzo3HGqzLWmuCPXlKRDlNtNzHDfSeAFkL-mjYIq1jGMmi6hUHzmqu3Lh3qqOwcE-GjYDUz6xyG9C0dnMUs8p2eyYmljn1D0Dc8hp8dLlvqWPDDB_Mji9gYCVbi4QEREmiFq5Z1_D1IMxF892nAaM96xq9XpatY/4lh/p6IGjtS0R-GMBaI4MQgHGA/h1/h001.3GBsAXUwfLtZ-6w5SFSqX12apdQYrGEUcZy5HVTLL2M) This community-led nonprofit provides wrap-around services, including free healthy and nutritious food for families, job readiness assistance, free clothing and resources, and childcare support. All Things Women also prioritizes mental health support—including trauma counseling and peer-to-peer support, where women veterans build community and trust, feeling seen and overcoming isolation. [**Please donate today to support housing, food, healing, and jobs for women veterans.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwobcPJr_EtF2F6sxhsEtaprIfjuNp9haHPJVpFNhncRb54fuz5DZUqUFN1odN8LG0UD0OBYao79axWoFH5Kl7Flj_41e41qkUphDC2YI712ij_jMKRhna-i0SFs4KFcVeM2Hik6AoxbWCyVPOqJq5AWxFwnIN1PxXV7OESKy54EWuqL5T47cIUYPrElUctMEMKHZEeoI8ECkwyve5WxvyNtjTjG6EwcrTIcnGICbErS_GBiGENcI8zjd6yMBbjSbKZcnmSrw2egDGGels5rcSy_s/4lh/p6IGjtS0R-GMBaI4MQgHGA/h2/h001.s68H7smQnZxnIKHIGN3gUSLyAcZEFTUcr3Oeev4Cj4Q) _All Things Women Inc. is a 501(c)3 organization, so your donation will be tax-deductible._ | [SUPPORT VETERANS](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwobcPJr_EtF2F6sxhsEtaprIfjuNp9haHPJVpFNhncRb5r3xwI90pfTJdCORwC6JptQA-0rlR5UpKN997gfZFCnfB6WxkcXyuNNgLhz_0jY6mMehtEzDl2sM2xqmagDQXNOHPHYHkOGF0JBlz_8HN9fTEfGDcJNBkUotobXfSh3qOZoTmBLzqFW4oII3gZXSuSXM92ePlbKekylHJCqZnjC8BjRfJK6XxmK0P8UENWZyqa1as2QG-X2Ephl-0WN3LhaxIQUm6LFtlbmaOP3aew84/4lh/p6IGjtS0R-GMBaI4MQgHGA/h3/h001.YC8CKVsA9d_ij_1fQSEQappotNU-VIZAbeyFHpY4VII)
---
Disrupting cycles of poverty and inequity, All Things Women has successfully housed hundreds of formerly unhoused veterans into permanent housing.
Last year alone, they provided shelter and transitional housing for 76 families, and donated tens of thousands of diapers, clothing, and food items.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwobcPJr_EtF2F6sxhsEtaprIfjuNp9haHPJVpFNhncRb5EBIHv-DAVwR2k95qPXl3CgWSpLyq3dYIMmxcZvenGdc9u6fhWcX6KULjPlEQh0qXs8jTnRSN99nYRfsPqwy_5-9ZSs8FxipX2wP1S9NTfPHOu4P1HAnjfsJzrMjFePOoGjXxNC1Vp6XQWJtnZxXie-VmVFv4-uWTanIjhqQ70sAHfxZ62-MB33VWgYLqcnJLhyGvX3TEt5haHc8BflDpwEUgA-igov8wM3WJ8MK4h14/4lh/p6IGjtS0R-GMBaI4MQgHGA/h4/h001.Zmsb2oelVog_kXCGd0RezWreiL6lvQhrr50B_ihfAG0)
Every year, they also participate in a resource fair for around 120 women veterans in need, with on-the-spot screening and housing support, connections to community partners, and a peer-circle mini-session. Like the group’s longer-term services, these sessions help reduce isolation among women veterans.
**More and more, we need groups like All Things Women to fill in the government’s gaps**. The group was developed by local women of color who came together in response to a lack of programs and services serving their communities—which is so often the foundation of mutual aid programs.
**All Things Women is a center for healing and empowerment that helps veterans and families survive and thrive.** But they need our support: Their utility bill alone is $2,000 per month, and their shelter rent is $10,000 per month.
[**Please chip in whatever amount you can to support veterans in need.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwobcPJr_EtF2F6sxhsEtaprIfjuNp9haHPJVpFNhncRb572-7ACPVDFqRNNqiHTixRH1ALKmUsV3rLm-yCp1E6Ebi4Fzvii_b2LFsz-W2-Y0verL5g3iK-ZsH2x69JSl83iibf0uFmg2dfieSERJnSvXEBqQhwuJDCM0M7ihBLxmqtvLBwd6xyQ7cc1RJyXwFSnf_qfBOewpEEZuAh9x-ppEjjlWynffOszUEYKs0Z5fRrYlAbCAhWXMpor6-Q6L6Uoo3kT9nQPqSQaEkmTyMQvs/4lh/p6IGjtS0R-GMBaI4MQgHGA/h5/h001.a0VN0PH28e7zw1xosJ890sH3ERe4ua-IT1CrQSaXpdo)

clean_body: All Things Women helps veterans survive and thrive. | | | Friend, Tomorrow is Veterans Day. I just re-introduced legislation to expand healthcare for veterans, and I’m fighting alongside veterans against the Trump administration’s cuts to VA jobs, healthcare, and food programs. Thousands of veterans in every state use SNAP to put food on the table. Many of those folks have a disability and live with at least one child. Even more U.S. veterans are at risk of losing essential care and housing. It’s not enough to thank our veterans with words; they deserve quality healthcare, secure housing, employment if able, and fully funded life-saving services. So today, I’m lifting up an organization that supports female veterans experiencing homelessness or housing instability: All Things Women. All Things Women supports veterans with dignified emergency shelter and transitional housing, as well as rapid assistance with stable housing. This community-led nonprofit provides wrap-around services, including free healthy and nutritious food for families, job readiness assistance, free clothing and resources, and childcare support. All Things Women also prioritizes mental health support—including trauma counseling and peer-to-peer support, where women veterans build community and trust, feeling seen and overcoming isolation. All Things Women Inc. is a 501(c)3 organization, so your donation will be tax-deductible. | Disrupting cycles of poverty and inequity, All Things Women has successfully housed hundreds of formerly unhoused veterans into permanent housing. Last year alone, they provided shelter and transitional housing for 76 families, and donated tens of thousands of diapers, clothing, and food items. Every year, they also participate in a resource fair for around 120 women veterans in need, with on-the-spot screening and housing support, connections to community partners, and a peer-circle mini-session. Like the group’s longer-term services, these sessions help reduce isolation among women veterans. More and more, we need groups like All Things Women to fill in the government’s gaps. The group was developed by local women of color who came together in response to a lack of programs and services serving their communities—which is so often the foundation of mutual aid programs. All Things Women is a center for healing and empowerment that helps veterans and families survive and thrive. But they need our support: Their utility bill alone is $2,000 per month, and their shelter rent is $10,000 per month. Thank you for supporting our veterans. Together we’ll continue fighting back against Trump’s cruel cuts, and pushing for a government and country that treats veterans with the dignity they deserve. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10423%2E434096%2ETpYE43 ]John Fetterman

Derek, our farmers are collateral damage in Trump's trade war. 😡

After the Trump administration unveiled its so-called "Farmers First" policy, the president decided to hand Argentina a *$40 BILLION* bailout – helping the ultrawealthy, propping up one of our biggest agricultural competitors, and gut-punching American farmers.

Meanwhile, farm bankruptcies are already up *57%* this year. Crop prices are down. And Trump gutted Medicaid with his Big, Ugly Bill, now law, which is forcing rural hospitals to close and health care costs to skyrocket.

Between Trump's bailout and his reckless tariffs, farmers in PA and across this country are losing billions while Argentina and China cash in.

So while Trump sells out American farmers, John’s standing up for them – whether it's:

🛑 Suing to stop Trump’s illegal USDA cuts.
🌾 Backing agricultural research investment.
🚜 Or helping farmers repair their equipment.

But John needs to know if you have his back. We selected you as one of [7] people from 18326 to complete this poll, so please respond immediately:

Mike Johnson and John Thune ONLY care about holding onto power for themselves and Donald Trump – **_and they could care LESS about the American people._**

When discussing the Republican government shutdown, this is what they had to say:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69858?t=10&akid=23597%2E4449941%2ElJOdKh)
Republicans are **TERRIFIED** to give D.C. Statehood because it would result in Congress gaining [**2 MORE Democratic Senators**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69858?t=11&akid=23597%2E4449941%2ElJOdKh) and inch us closer to taking back the majority.

[**It’s a petty powergrab that withholds representation from the 700,000 people that live in Washington, DC!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69858?t=12&akid=23597%2E4449941%2ElJOdKh)

Thank you for your participation,

Fight For Reform

body:
It’s a simple calculus: every minute our new ad isn’t up and running, Hochul and Mamdani are attacking us.
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ae548e2289104924a449cfc9b35de0d5&_e=3rmOWyQWcHxjpHjclykQAbtdv5RpxGPy0xp41-gCfqutTi8BxlRjogKXnPaxK60kt_CzMD0TknBbq_NH_9tZE38TCthN-LqFvtxXvNsYL3xdBkc5jeQjVelmTQKPmwTtLJBzOrWocXVZxaihafSqhxV0zxcxZrB9SC4575SHy6E0avH227t2xf422QmT1NSZ9LaibS55vyKJ4gNf9oxtau6bYGfKWtSz8JStRTBTbbqUK1wp-U1nJzexlwKjRoHvNkowe2-9vBWRLHCU6XdOjxJ7c14fpn7IbMeAzBDbqFAavdTI2KiKdv17gbif4QBMOEw_hbfmd-14yS3sVzfAVoNbTrv92w31tx5oNCfHj4jCHo5AS-QpjDm2rBbB2Qd9CayeYi6pNoN2jq79TR7vs51gaS7YyjhULYeDDHKWyl4ZLNC4eHW175BMP3lNkWBHZ1tP0yih20HynBZCakUqVKlzzGmBPyllOcBs8QVJMAW8JLY5CHv8mxaAEZQ0RIU0_Ihq1-Hw1GoXezCFsSSUfwaNl9c6a4Agd_4Ajf3TbTfFmjQ3-My9c87UJBjoQiY6c0Fb7ygTHR-6Y8x3h9cnbVwMuv0g_yeN2b9s4EDPiekKDYIilYZJPY0VCwhUdTo2)
---
Friend,
---
I’m officially running to be the next Governor of New York to FIRE Kathy Hochul, serve as the FINAL FIREWALL against Zohran Mamdani, and SAVE the Empire State from a full-blown communist takeover.
---
With so much at stake, I didn’t waste even a minute producing our very first ad of the campaign.
---
_But with polls already showing us** _LEADING Hochul by 1 POINT_** , she and Mamdani haven’t wasted any time either... _
---
Within just _seconds_ of announcing my campaign, they already began blasting out a lying attack ad to smear me!
---
**This election will come down to a simple calculus, Friend:_every minute our own ad isn’t up and running is another minute Hochul and Mamdani are directly attacking us._**
---

clean_body: It’s a simple calculus: every minute our new ad isn’t up and running, Hochul and Mamdani are attacking us. | Friend, I’m officially running to be the next Governor of New York to FIRE Kathy Hochul, serve as the FINAL FIREWALL against Zohran Mamdani, and SAVE the Empire State from a full-blown communist takeover. With so much at stake, I didn’t waste even a minute producing our very first ad of the campaign. But with polls already showing us LEADING Hochul by 1 POINT , she and Mamdani haven’t wasted any time either... Within just seconds of announcing my campaign, they already began blasting out a lying attack ad to smear me! This election will come down to a simple calculus, Friend:every minute our own ad isn’t up and running is another minute Hochul and Mamdani are directly attacking us. But that's where my top supporters like YOU come in. Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A vote for this deal is a mistake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The American people want to see Democrats standing up and fighting back.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2698%2E4032634%2EGI_dwZ)
---
Throughout this Republican government shutdown, Donald Trump made clear that he is willing to hurt people — hungry children, federal employees, working families — in order to get his way. And Republicans in Congress are more than willing to bend over backwards to help Trump advance his harmful agenda more efficiently. The American people want to see Democrats standing up and fighting back. **That’s why I will not support a deal ending the government shutdown that does nothing to make health care more affordable.** A vote for this deal is a mistake. The fight to lower costs is a righteous fight, and we must not give it up. Look, we are in a health care emergency right now. We need to keep fighting to fix our broken health care system and lower costs for working people. Twenty-four million Americans are getting notices right now that their health care premiums are about to increase by twice or three times the amount they were last year. All Democrats are asking for is a one-year extension on these tax credits that help Americans afford their health care, so that we don’t pull the rug out from under them. This would cost less than Donald Trump’s $40 billion bailout for Argentina. Republicans in Congress extended tax breaks for billionaires and billionaire corporations, but they are refusing to extend tax credits to lower health insurance premiums for millions of working people. It’s clear where their priorities are. And so while Trump and Republicans inflict more pain on people, Democrats’ most important job is to fight back and lower costs for working people — and I’m in this fight all the way. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---
